Original: If you have at least 24 [FOOD] in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] then a percentage of any further [Production|PRODUCE] will start to 'spoil'. The initial penalthy is -50%, and every every additional 12 [FOOD] another half of the remaining Production will be lost. Storing up large quantities of [FOOD] can provide security but isn't the most efficient way to run your economy.
Translation: 如果你的[库存|STOCKPILE]中至少有 24 点[FOOD]，之后继续[生产|PRODUCE]的部分食物就会开始“腐坏”。初始惩罚为 -50%；之后每增加 12 点[FOOD]，剩余产量还会再损失一半。大量储存[FOOD]能提供安全感，但并不是最高效的经济方式。

Original: If your Tribe runs out of [FOOD] all of your [Clans'|CLAN] [Mood|MOOD] will drop by 1 per turn. If more than half of your clans become Resentful you will be overthrown and lose the game![BLANK-LINE]Each of your [Clans'|CLAN] [Families|FAMILY] [Consumes|CONSUME] 0.2 per [Turn|TURN], so make sure you have enough to last through the winter!
Translation: 如果部族耗尽[FOOD]，所有[氏族|CLAN]的[心情|MOOD]每回合都会下降 1。若超过半数氏族变得怨恨，你将被推翻并输掉游戏！[BLANK-LINE]每个[氏族|CLAN]的[家庭|FAMILY]每[回合|TURN][消耗|CONSUME] 0.2 点，因此务必确保食物足够撑过冬天。

Original: in a [Profession|PROFESSION] or [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], however with at least 1 Move Point remaining it may be Unpacked at any time.[BLANK-LINE]Moving your Settlement allows you to shift which [Tiles|TILE] are in your [Borders|BORDERS], making it possible to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE] on nearby [Deposits|DEPOSIT] and extending how far you receive free [Supply|SUPPLY].
Translation: 去学习[职业|PROFESSION]或[纪律|DISCIPLINE]；不过只要还剩至少 1 点移动力，它可以随时解除打包。[BLANK-LINE]移动定居点会改变哪些[地格|TILE]处于你的[边界|BORDERS]内，从而可以在附近[矿藏|DEPOSIT]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]，并扩大你获得免费[补给|SUPPLY]的范围。

Original: in Active [Professions|PROFESSION] leave the [SETTLEMENT] and appear on the map (as opposed to [Settled|SETTLED] Professions). Some Clans have Traits that make them prefer or dislike such Professions.
Translation: 处于主动[职业|PROFESSION]时会离开[SETTLEMENT]并出现在地图上（不同于[定居|SETTLED]职业）。有些氏族的特质会让他们偏好或厌恶这类职业。

Original: In addition to the major [Factions|FACTION] there are also a number of [Structures|STRUCTURE] owned independently by local people. They mind their own business, but their Structures and [Clans|CLAN] can be captured by a [Warrior|WARRIOR], should you defeat whatever defender is present.
Translation: 除了主要[派系|FACTION]外，还有一些由本地人独立拥有的[建筑|STRUCTURE]。他们通常只顾自己的事，但只要你击败当地守军，就可以用[战士|WARRIOR]夺取他们的建筑和[氏族|CLAN]。

Original: in Settled [Professions|PROFESSION] remain inside the [SETTLEMENT] (as opposed to [Active|ACTIVE] Professions). Some Clans have Traits that make them prefer or dislike such Professions.
Translation: 处于定居[职业|PROFESSION]时会留在[SETTLEMENT]内（不同于[主动|ACTIVE]职业）。有些氏族的特质会让他们偏好或厌恶这类职业。

Original: in some [Active|ACTIVE] [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION] like [FARMER] and [MINER] can Construct [Structures|STRUCTURE] to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] or [Dense Forests|FOREST]. This requires either [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS], and is generally not something you'll start doing until a year or two into the game.
Translation: 中的某些[主动|ACTIVE][平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，如[FARMER]和[MINER]，可以建造[建筑|STRUCTURE]，从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]或[茂密森林|FOREST]中[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。这需要[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS]，通常要到游戏一两年后才会开始。

Original: in some [Active|ACTIVE] [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION] like [GATHERER] and [HUNTER] to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] or [Dense Forests|FOREST] without the need for a [Structure|STRUCTURE]. Foraging is generally a less efficient way of [Producing|PRODUCE] Resources though, so once you've [Learned|LEARN] Professions capable of [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] Structures and have the [TIMBER] to do so it's probably time to switch over.
Translation: 中的某些[主动|ACTIVE][平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，如[GATHERER]和[HUNTER]，无需[建筑|STRUCTURE]即可从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]或[茂密森林|FOREST]中[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。不过采集通常不是最有效的[生产|PRODUCE]资源方式；一旦你[学会|LEARN]了能够[建造|CONSTRUCT]建筑的职业并拥有[TIMBER]，大概就该切换过去。

Original: Increases the default button pixel height from 40 to 70 (note that this won't affect EVERY button in the game).
FailureReason: Skipped by policy: user setting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings'.

Original: Infantry [Units|UNIT] are the basic [Warriors|WARRIOR] of AtG. They're not especially fancy, but they get the job done. They only require 1 [Supply|SUPPLY] from their [Tile|TILE], making them more flexible than their expensive [Cavalry|CAVALRY] counterparts.
Translation: 步兵[单位|UNIT]是 AtG 中基础的[战士|WARRIOR]。他们并不花哨，但足以完成任务。他们所在[地格|TILE]只需提供 1 点[补给|SUPPLY]，因此比昂贵的[骑兵|CAVALRY]更灵活。

Original: Influence is a Leader's 'diplomatic currency' that can be spent on future diplomatic interactions with the Leader it was earned with in order to get them to do more than they would normally be willing.[BLANK-LINE]Influence is gained in equal amount any time a Leader's [Relationship Level|RL] increases.
Translation: 影响力是领袖的“外交货币”，可在未来与获得该影响力的那位领袖互动时花费，使其愿意做出通常不会接受的让步。[BLANK-LINE]每当一位领袖的[关系等级|RL]提升时，你都会获得等量影响力。

FailureReason: Skipped by policy: user setting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings'.

Original: Leaders which share the same Religion receive a [Relationship Level|RL] bonus, while those who do not receive a penalty (the exact amount being determined by each Leader's [Traits|LEADER-TRAIT]). Switching Religions can be a good way of making friends, but also enemies - abandoning the faith of another Leader can make them especially upset.
Translation: 信奉同一宗教的领袖会获得[关系等级|RL]加成，不同宗教则会受到惩罚（具体数值由各领袖的[特质|LEADER-TRAIT]决定）。改信宗教可以帮助结交朋友，也可能制造敌人；背弃另一位领袖的信仰尤其会激怒对方。

Original: Leverage is the sum total of [Relationship Level|RL], [Influence|INFLUENCE], and [Reputation|REPUTATION] being spent or used as part of one possible diplomatic exchange. Influence and Reputation can be held back, in which case they don't contribute to the overall Leverage score.
Translation: 筹码是一次可能的外交交换中投入或使用的[关系等级|RL]、[影响力|INFLUENCE]和[声誉|REPUTATION]总和。影响力和声誉可以保留不用；若保留，则不会计入总筹码值。

Original: Make the left mouse button act as the right, and vice-versa.
FailureReason: Skipped by policy: user setting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings'.

Original: Maps in AtG are divided into a grid of hex tiles.[BLANK-LINE]You can show or hide the grid by pressing [HOTKEY:G], and pressing [HOTKEY:1] will make it darker or lighter.
Translation: AtG 的地图由六边形地格组成。[BLANK-LINE]按 [HOTKEY:G] 可以显示或隐藏网格，按 [HOTKEY:1] 可以让网格变深或变浅。

Original: Minerals are one of the three types of [Deposits|DEPOSIT] in At the Gates ([Animals|ANIMAL] and [Plants|PLANT] being the other two).[BLANK-LINE]Like all Deposits, Minerals can be [Harvested|HARVEST] to [Produce|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE], but all types must first be [Identified|UNIDENTIFIED] by a [DIGGER] or [SURVEYOR].[BLANK-LINE]There are 7 types of Minerals in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-IRON][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-STONE][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-COAL][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-PEAT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-SALT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GOLD][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GEMS]
Translation: 矿物是 At the Gates 三类[资源点|DEPOSIT]之一，另外两类是[动物|ANIMAL]和[植物|PLANT]。[BLANK-LINE]与所有资源点一样，矿物可以被[采收|HARVEST]来[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]，但所有类型都必须先由[DIGGER]或[SURVEYOR][识别|UNIDENTIFIED]。[BLANK-LINE]AtG 中有 7 类矿物：[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-IRON][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-STONE][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-COAL][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-PEAT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-SALT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GOLD][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GEMS]

Original: Mines are a group of [Mineral|MINERAL]-[Producing|PRODUCE] [Structures|STRUCTURE] that include [IRON-MINE-1:S], [COAL-MINE-1:S], [PEAT-MINE-1:S], [GOLD-MINE-1:S], [GEM-MINE-1:S], [SALT-MINE-1:S], and [STONE-QUARRY-1:S].
Translation: 矿场是一组[产出|PRODUCE][矿物|MINERAL]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，包括[IRON-MINE-1:S]、[COAL-MINE-1:S]、[PEAT-MINE-1:S]、[GOLD-MINE-1:S]、[GEM-MINE-1:S]、[SALT-MINE-1:S]和[STONE-QUARRY-1:S]。

Original: Most [Deposits|DEPOSIT] start off Unidentified and you must have a [Clan|CLAN] in an appropriate [Profession|PROFESSION] figure out what it is before you can use it.[BLANK-LINE][Plants|PLANT] can be identified by [GATHERER:S] and [REAPER:S], [Minerals|MINERAL] by [DIGGER:S], and [Animals|ANIMAL] by [HUNTER:S] and [TRAPPER:S]. Deposits of any kind can be identified by the [SURVEYOR].
Translation: 多数[资源点|DEPOSIT]开局时尚未识别，必须让一个处于合适[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]查明其内容，才能使用。[BLANK-LINE][植物|PLANT]可由[GATHERER:S]和[REAPER:S]识别，[矿物|MINERAL]可由[DIGGER:S]识别，[动物|ANIMAL]可由[HUNTER:S]和[TRAPPER:S]识别。任意类型的资源点都可由[SURVEYOR]识别。

Original: Most [Professions|PROFESSION] have 2 associated Upgrade [Techs|TECH] you can [Learn|LEARN] and then purchase for [Clans|CLAN] in that Profession. The [Resource|RESOURCE] cost of each Upgrade is different, so pay attention! Upgrades only apply for that specific Profession - switch to something else and the effect will be lost.[BLANK-LINE]Note that a Profession's Upgrade Techs can be [Studied|STUDY] in either order - you need not finish one before the other, despite how they're stacked in the screen.[BLANK-LINE]Upon reaching [Level|LEVEL] 10 in a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] a Clan can be given one free Upgrade.
Translation: 大多数[职业|PROFESSION]都有 2 项关联的升级[科技|TECH]，你可以[习得|LEARN]后为该职业的[氏族|CLAN]购买。每项升级所需[资源|RESOURCE]不同，请留意！升级只适用于特定职业；切换到其他职业后效果会失去。[BLANK-LINE]注意，一个职业的升级科技可以按任意顺序[研究|STUDY]；尽管它们在界面中上下叠放，你不必先完成其中一个才能研究另一个。[BLANK-LINE]当一个氏族在某项[纪律|DISCIPLINE]中达到[等级|LEVEL] 10 时，可以获得一次免费升级。

Original: Move your cursor over any yellow text to learn more about the game concept - even from [inside other tooltips!|TOOLTIPS]
Translation: 将鼠标移到任何黄色文字上，即可了解对应的游戏概念，甚至可以从[其他悬停提示内部继续查看！|TOOLTIPS]

Original: Mute the soft 'tap' sound effect played when a tooltip appears.
FailureReason: Skipped by policy: user setting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings'.

Original: Once you've [Studied|STUDY] a [Tech|TECH] long enough to accumulate the full [KNOWLEDGE] cost you may then make use of it:[BLANK-LINE][*]After Learning a [Profession|PROFESSION] you may then [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in it.[BLANK-LINE][*]After Learning an [Upgrade|UPGRADE] you can then spend the [Resources|RESOURCE] required to apply it to a Clan in the associated Profession.[BLANK-LINE][*]Each of the 6 [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] Techs you can Study at the start of the game allows you to give one of your Clans 2 free [Levels|LEVEL] in that Discipline.
Translation: 当你[研究|STUDY]一项[科技|TECH]并积累到完整[KNOWLEDGE]花费后，就可以使用它：[BLANK-LINE][*]习得一个[职业|PROFESSION]后，你可以用它[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]。[BLANK-LINE][*]习得一项[升级|UPGRADE]后，你可以花费所需[资源|RESOURCE]，将其应用到对应职业的氏族身上。[BLANK-LINE][*]游戏开始时可研究的 6 项[纪律|DISCIPLINE]科技，每项都能让你的一个氏族在该纪律中免费获得 2 个[等级|LEVEL]。

Original: Packing Up your [SETTLEMENT] allows it to [Move|MOVE-POINT] around the map like a [Unit|UNIT]. This takes 1 full
Translation: 打包你的[SETTLEMENT]后，它可以像[单位|UNIT]一样在地图上[移动|MOVE-POINT]。这需要完整 1 个

Original: Pastures are a group of [Structures|STRUCTURE] which add [Animals|ANIMAL] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] that include [CATTLE-PASTURE-1:S], [SHEEP-PASTURE-1:S], [PIG-PASTURE-1:S], and [HORSE-PASTURE-1:S].[BLANK-LINE]Pastures are [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S].
Translation: 牧场是一组会把[动物|ANIMAL]加入你[库存|STOCKPILE]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，包括[CATTLE-PASTURE-1:S]、[SHEEP-PASTURE-1:S]、[PIG-PASTURE-1:S]和[HORSE-PASTURE-1:S]。[BLANK-LINE]牧场由[RANCHER:S][建造|CONSTRUCT]。

Original: Pillaging takes 1 [Turn|TURN] and provides a lump sum of [Resources|RESOURCE] as plunder, but damages the target [Structure|STRUCTURE] until it's Repaired. Pillaging a [Farm|FARM] or [SETTLEMENT] also provides free
Translation: 劫掠需要 1 [回合|TURN]，并一次性获得一批[资源|RESOURCE]作为战利品，但会损坏目标[建筑|STRUCTURE]，直到其被修复。劫掠[农场|FARM]或[SETTLEMENT]还会免费提供

Original: Plants are one of the three types of [Deposits|DEPOSIT] in At the Gates ([Animals|ANIMAL] and [Minerals|MINERAL] being the other two).[BLANK-LINE]Like all Deposits, Plants can be [Harvested|HARVEST] to [Produce|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE], but most types must first be [Identified|UNIDENTIFIED] by a [GATHERER], [REAPER], or [SURVEYOR].[BLANK-LINE]There are 7 types of Plants in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S] (always Identified)[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FRUIT-TREES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S] (always Identified)[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BARLEY:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-OLIVES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GRAPES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FLAX:S]
Translation: 植物是 At the Gates 三类[资源点|DEPOSIT]之一，另外两类是[动物|ANIMAL]和[矿物|MINERAL]。[BLANK-LINE]与所有资源点一样，植物可以被[采收|HARVEST]来[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]，但多数类型必须先由[GATHERER]、[REAPER]或[SURVEYOR][识别|UNIDENTIFIED]。[BLANK-LINE]AtG 中有 7 类植物：[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S]（总是已识别）[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FRUIT-TREES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S]（总是已识别）[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BARLEY:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-OLIVES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GRAPES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FLAX:S]

Original: Relationship Level is a metric measuring how much one Leader likes another.[BLANK-LINE]Having a strong Relationship Level will make another Leader less likely to attack and more inclined to positive diplomatic interactions, but important actions will also often require spending [Influence|INFLUENCE] or [Reputation|REPUTATION].[BLANK-LINE]A Leader's Relationship Level generally starts at 0 and can range from -10 to +10.
Translation: 关系等级用于衡量一位领袖对另一位领袖的好感。[BLANK-LINE]较高的关系等级会让另一位领袖不太可能攻击你，也更愿意进行正面外交互动；但重要行动通常还需要花费[影响力|INFLUENCE]或[声誉|REPUTATION]。[BLANK-LINE]领袖的关系等级通常从 0 开始，范围为 -10 到 +10。

Original: Replaces the [Close] button found at the bottom of many screens and popups with an [x] in the top-right corner.
FailureReason: Skipped by policy: user setting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings'.

Original: Repuation is a Leader's global 'diplomatic currency' that can be spent on future diplomatic interactions with ANY Leader in order to get them to do more than they would normally be willing.[BLANK-LINE]Reputation is a valuable commodity hard to earn - doing so usually involves great risk, sacrifice, or boldness.
Translation: 声誉是领袖的全局“外交货币”，可在未来与任何领袖的外交互动中花费，使他们愿意做出通常不会接受的让步。[BLANK-LINE]声誉很有价值，也很难获得；获得声誉通常需要承担巨大风险、付出牺牲，或表现出非凡胆识。

Original: Resources are the economic currency of AtG, and in conjunction with [Clans|CLAN] are essential to doing just about anything.[BLANK-LINE]There are two basic kinds of Resources: raw and refined. An example of a raw Resource is [IRON], which is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] but can't actually be used for anything until refined into [WEAPONS] or [TOOLS].[BLANK-LINE]The most important Resource in the game is [FOOD], as without it your Clans will [Starve|STARVE]. [FAME] determines how often new Clans join you. [KNOWLEDGE] determines how fast you can [Study|STUDY] new [Professions|PROFESSION]. [TREASURE] is a versatile Resource that is especially useful for buying other Resources from [Caravans|CARAVAN]. [TIMBER] is required to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] basic [Structures|STRUCTURE], while [STONE-BLOCKS] are needed for more advanced versions which don't ever [Degrade|DEGRADE] and run out.
Translation: 资源是 AtG 的经济货币，与[氏族|CLAN]一起构成几乎一切行动的基础。[BLANK-LINE]资源分为两类：原料和加工品。[IRON]就是原料资源，可从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]中[采收|HARVEST]，但必须先精炼成[WEAPONS]或[TOOLS]才能真正使用。[BLANK-LINE]游戏中最重要的资源是[FOOD]，没有它，你的氏族会[挨饿|STARVE]。[FAME]决定新氏族加入的频率。[KNOWLEDGE]决定你[研究|STUDY]新[职业|PROFESSION]的速度。[TREASURE]用途广泛，尤其适合从[商队|CARAVAN]购买其他资源。[TIMBER]用于[建造|CONSTRUCT]基础[建筑|STRUCTURE]，更高级且不会[损耗|DEGRADE]枯竭的版本则需要[STONE-BLOCKS]。

Original: Rivers are a major [Terrain|TERRAIN] barrier. Normally, crossing Small Rivers is difficult and Large Rivers is impossible, but Rivers can freeze in the winter and become as easy to cross as flat ground.
Translation: 河流是重要的[地形|TERRAIN]障碍。通常，小河难以跨越，大河无法跨越；但河流会在冬季结冰，届时穿越它们会像穿越平地一样容易。

Original: Roads allow [Armies|ARMY] to ignore any [Terrain|TERRAIN]-based and [Seasonal|SEASON] [Movement|MOVE-POINT] penalties associated with a [Tile|TILE].
Translation: 道路能让[军队|ARMY]无视[地格|TILE]上由[地形|TERRAIN]和[季节|SEASON]造成的[移动|MOVE-POINT]惩罚。

Original: Slowly depletes the [Resources|RESOURCE] available on [Tiles|TILE] being harvested.
Translation: 会缓慢耗尽正在采收的[地格|TILE]上可用的[资源|RESOURCE]。

Original: Some [Professions|PROFESSION] are considered 'Social', which can affect how long it takes to [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in them or alter the effectiveness of a Clan, based on that Clan's [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT]. Most Clans don't need to care about this, but some do, so pay attention. Some Clans will actual refuse to work in Social Professions entirely![BLANK-LINE]Social Professions can be recognized by the
Translation: 有些[职业|PROFESSION]属于“社交”职业。根据氏族的[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]，这可能影响[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]所需时间，或改变氏族在该职业中的效率。多数氏族无需在意这一点，但有些氏族很在意，所以请留心。有些氏族甚至会完全拒绝从事社交职业！[BLANK-LINE]社交职业可通过

Original: Structures are [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [Clans|CLAN] in [Active|ACTIVE] [Professions|PROFESSION], usually to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] of some kind present on a map [Tile|TILE].[BLANK-LINE]Structures are much better at [Producing|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE] than [Foragers|FORAGE], and should be prioritized as soon as [TIMBER] and other sources of more advanced [Structure|STRUCTURE]-based [Resources|RESOURCE] are available.[BLANK-LINE]Advanced versions [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] from [STONE-BLOCKS] can be assigned [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to further increase their [Production|PRODUCE].
Translation: 建筑由处于[主动|ACTIVE][职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN][建造|CONSTRUCT]，通常用于[采收|HARVEST]地图[地格|TILE]上的某种[资源|RESOURCE]。[BLANK-LINE]建筑[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]的效率远高于[采集者|FORAGE]；一旦有[TIMBER]以及其他更高级的建筑型[资源|RESOURCE]来源，就应优先建设。[BLANK-LINE]用[STONE-BLOCKS]建造的高级版本可以分配[学徒|APPRENTICE]，进一步提高其[产出|PRODUCE]。

Original: Supply represents the basic goods needed to keep a [Unit|UNIT] functioning. During the summer most [Clans|CLAN] will be able to freely collect what they need from their [Tile|TILE], but is no longer the case once it becomes [Cold|COLD]. At this point a Unit may need to [Encamp|ENCAMP] to avoid taking [Damage|DAMAGE]. Some [Units|UNIT], like the [LIGHT-CAVALRY], actually require more than 1 Supply Point, so always keep an eye on what a Tile actually provides!
Translation: 补给代表维持[单位|UNIT]运作所需的基本物资。夏季时，多数[氏族|CLAN]都能在所在[地格|TILE]自由收集所需物资；但一旦变为[寒冷|COLD]，情况就不再如此。此时单位可能需要[扎营|ENCAMP]以避免受到[伤害|DAMAGE]。有些[单位|UNIT]，如[LIGHT-CAVALRY]，实际需要超过 1 点补给，因此务必留意地格到底能提供什么。

This shuts down the [Production|PRODUCE] of [Plants|PLANT] by [Farms|FARM] and [Foragers|FORAGE], and usually forces you to subsist off of the [FOOD] you've [Stored|STORED-TURN] earlier in the year.

Original: There are 2 [ways to win|WINNING] in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*] Conquering the [Capital City|CAPITAL] of one of the two [Roman Empire Factions|ROME].[BLANK-LINE][*] Becoming 'Magister Militum' and taking over [Rome|ROME] from within by sending five [Clans|CLAN] to become Roman Legions.[BLANK-LINE]Note that there are two Roman [Factions|FACTION]: the Eastern and Western halves of the previously-whole-in-better-days Roman Empire, and either one can satisfy your [Victory Conditions|WINNING].[BLANK-LINE]Conquering a Roman capital will require locating it on the map and significant military preparation. Although various setbacks will befall the Romans they start off quite strong and can put up quite a fight.[BLANK-LINE]Becoming Magister Militum is more of an economic victory, as to send a [Clan|CLAN] to [Rome|ROME] not only means sending it off for a year but also providing it with expensive, late-game equipment.
Translation: AtG 中有 2 种[胜利方式|WINNING]：[BLANK-LINE][*]征服两个[罗马帝国派系|ROME]之一的[首都|CAPITAL]。[BLANK-LINE][*]成为“军务长官”，派出五个[氏族|CLAN]成为罗马军团，从内部接管[罗马|ROME]。[BLANK-LINE]注意，罗马有两个[派系|FACTION]：曾经统一而强盛的罗马帝国分裂为东西两半，征服任一方都能满足你的[胜利条件|WINNING]。[BLANK-LINE]征服罗马首都需要先在地图上找到它，并进行充分的军事准备。罗马会遭遇各种挫折，但开局依旧强大，能打出相当顽强的抵抗。[BLANK-LINE]成为军务长官更接近经济胜利，因为派一个[氏族|CLAN]前往[罗马|ROME]不仅要让其离开一年，还要提供昂贵的后期装备。

Original: There are 3 kinds of Techs which you can [Study|STUDY] and [Learn|LEARN]:[BLANK-LINE][*][Professions|PROFESSION][BLANK-LINE][*][Upgrades|UPGRADE][BLANK-LINE][*][Discipline|DISCIPLINE] [Level-Up|LEVEL] Techs
Translation: 你可以[研究|STUDY]并[习得|LEARN] 3 类科技：[BLANK-LINE][*][职业|PROFESSION][BLANK-LINE][*][升级|UPGRADE][BLANK-LINE][*][纪律|DISCIPLINE][升级|LEVEL]科技

Original: There are six [Disciplines|DISCIPLINE] which [Professions|PROFESSION] and [Clans|CLAN] can belong to: [HONOR], [AGRICULTURE], [LIVESTOCK], [METALWORKING], [CRAFTING], and [DISCOVERY].[BLANK-LINE]Clans gain [Experience|XP] and can increase their [Level|LEVEL] in the Discipline their Profession belongs to, which reduces the [Turns|TURN] needed to [Train|TRAIN] it in more advanced Professions within that Discipline.
Translation: [职业|PROFESSION]和[氏族|CLAN]可归属于六种[纪律|DISCIPLINE]：[HONOR]、[AGRICULTURE]、[LIVESTOCK]、[METALWORKING]、[CRAFTING]和[DISCOVERY]。[BLANK-LINE]氏族会获得[经验|XP]，并提升其职业所属纪律的[等级|LEVEL]，从而减少在该纪律内[训练|TRAIN]更高级职业所需的[回合|TURN]。

Original: Vision is the ability to see what's on a [Tile|TILE]. Tiles in and next to your [Borders|BORDERS] are visible, as are those near your [Units|UNIT]. Some Units can see further, like [EXPLORER:S].
Translation: 视野是看见[地格|TILE]上内容的能力。你[边界|BORDERS]内及相邻的地格可见，你的[单位|UNIT]附近地格也可见。有些单位视野更远，例如[EXPLORER:S]。

Original: Warrior [Professions|PROFESSION] are [Active|ACTIVE] Professions which can fight one another (as opposed to [Civilian|CIVILIAN] Professions). Warriors can also capture Civilian [Units|UNIT], and capture or pillage [Structures|STRUCTURE].
Translation: 战士[职业|PROFESSION]是可以彼此交战的[主动|ACTIVE]职业（不同于[平民|CIVILIAN]职业）。战士还可以俘获平民[单位|UNIT]，并占领或劫掠[建筑|STRUCTURE]。

Original: Water is an impassable [Terrain|TERRAIN] type. [SETTLEMENT:S] next to large enough bodies of water can build [GALLEY:S].
Translation: 水域是一种不可通行的[地形|TERRAIN]。[SETTLEMENT:S] 若毗邻足够大的水体，可以建造 [GALLEY:S]。

Original: When an [Army|ARMY]'s Morale is reduced to 0 they to Retreat to an adjacent
Translation: 当一支[军队|ARMY]的士气降至 0 时，会撤退到相邻的

Original: When an enemy [Structure|STRUCTURE] or [Clan|CLAN] is captured from another [Faction|FACTION] it is 'Occupied' for 6 turns, and during this time it will no longer [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE].
Translation: 从另一个[派系|FACTION]手中夺取敌方[建筑|STRUCTURE]或[氏族|CLAN]后，它会处于“占领”状态 6 回合；在此期间，它不再[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。

Original: when Producing more Food than you're Consuming, and lose them when the opposite is the case.[BLANK-LINE]Each turn that passes your Tribe consumes exactly 1 Stored Turn of Food.
Translation: 当食物产出高于消耗时会增加，反之则减少。[BLANK-LINE]每过一回合，你的部族会消耗 1 个食物存粮回合。

Original: Will suffer [Damage|DAMAGE] on a [Tile|TILE] unless it has a [Supply Level|SUPPLY] of at least

You can Punish a [Clan|CLAN] in your [SETTLEMENT] after it's committed a [Crime|CRIME] or become involved in a [Feud|FEUD]. Doing so settles the matter and any associated penalties, but strips the Clan of their [Profession|PROFESSION] and [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], and gives them a permanent [Mood|MOOD] penalty.
Translation: 当你的[SETTLEMENT]中的[氏族|CLAN]犯下[罪行|CRIME]或卷入[纷争|FEUD]后，你可以惩罚他们。这样会了结事件及相关惩罚，但会剥夺该氏族的[职业|PROFESSION]和[纪律|DISCIPLINE]，并给予永久[心情|MOOD]惩罚。

Original: You can spend [WEAPONS] to Fortify your [SETTLEMENT] or any [Structure|STRUCTURE] and increase the range your [Borders|BORDERS] extend from it by 1 ring of [Tiles|TILE]. The cost of doing so increases each time, but this can be a way to reach one or two specific, important [Deposits|DEPOSIT] you just need to have.+
Translation: 你可以花费[WEAPONS]加固你的[SETTLEMENT]或任意[建筑|STRUCTURE]，使其扩展出的[边界|BORDERS]范围增加 1 圈[地格|TILE]。每次加固的花费都会提高，但这能帮你触及一两个必须拿到的重要[矿藏|DEPOSIT]。+

Original: You can spend an Emissary via the Diplomacy Screen with any [Leader|LEADER] to improve your [Relationship Level|RL] with them. Emissaries are acquired by [producing|PRODUCE] [PRESTIGE].
Translation: 你可以在外交界面对任意[领袖|LEADER]派遣一名使者，以改善与其的[关系等级|RL]。使者通过[生产|PRODUCE][PRESTIGE]获得。

Original: Your [SETTLEMENT] is able to Train one [Clan|CLAN] at a time, and usually in a [Profession|PROFESSION]. Professions grant a Clan the ability to [Harvest|HARVEST] or refine [Resources|RESOURCE], explore the map, [Fight|WARRIOR] enemies, and more.[BLANK-LINE]You can also Train Clans in a specific [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] by clicking on the 'Train Clan in Discipline' button in the Clans Screen. This can be a good way to get a Clan ready for a role you know you want it to serve in but don't have the Resources or have finished [Studying|STUDY] the target Profession yet. Switching a Clan from one Discipline to another is free, and you can further increase its [Level|LEVEL] in a Discipline this way, but this requires spending [PARCHMENT].[BLANK-LINE]If there's nothing you want to Train during the turn you can click the 'Skip' button in the bottom-left corner of the Clans Screen in order to finish the turn.
Translation: 你的[SETTLEMENT]一次可以训练一个[氏族|CLAN]，通常是训练其[职业|PROFESSION]。职业能让氏族[采收|HARVEST]或精炼[资源|RESOURCE]、探索地图、[作战|WARRIOR]等。[BLANK-LINE]你也可以在氏族界面点击“训练氏族纪律”按钮，让氏族接受特定[纪律|DISCIPLINE]训练。当你已经知道某个氏族将来要承担的角色，但暂时缺少资源，或尚未完成目标职业的[研究|STUDY]时，这会很有用。氏族在不同纪律之间切换是免费的，也可以用这种方式进一步提高其纪律[等级|LEVEL]，但需要花费[PARCHMENT]。[BLANK-LINE]如果本回合没有想训练的内容，可以点击氏族界面左下角的“跳过”按钮来结束回合。

Original: Your stockpile of [Resources|RESOURCE] is visible on the left side of the World Screen. Once 'in the bank' you can save Resources for future purposes, or trade them away at the [Caravan|CARAVAN] for other Resources you need.[BLANK-LINE][FOOD] is a special type of Resource that other kinds of Resources like [WHEAT] and [GRAPES] automatically turn into when [Produced|PRODUCE]. [FOOD] also enters your stockpile as ['Stored Turns'|STORED-TURN], rather than a specific quantity like other Resources.
Translation: 你的[资源|RESOURCE]库存显示在世界界面左侧。资源一旦“入库”，就可以留待将来使用，或在[商队|CARAVAN]处换取你需要的其他资源。[BLANK-LINE][FOOD]是一种特殊资源，[WHEAT]和[GRAPES]等其他资源在[生产|PRODUCE]时会自动转化为食物。[FOOD]进入库存时也会以[“储存回合”|STORED-TURN]形式记录，而不是像其他资源那样记录具体数量。
% 来自[氏族|CLAN]中的[家庭|FAMILY]数量

Translation: 可按 [HOTKEY:V] 或点击屏幕右上角按钮再次查看此列表。
想在定居点外担任[主动|ACTIVE][职业|PROFESSION]

Original: Will refuse to attack enemy Armies
"Clean thyselves?" What?! Yer talking like a Roman.
Translation: “把自己洗干净？”什么？！你说话像个罗马人。

Original: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION) huh? Yeah, we should have some fun with that!
Translation: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION) 啊？好，我们应该能玩出点花样！

Original: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION) you say? Excellent, there's nothing worse than being stuck in our tents.
Translation: 你说 (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)？太好了，没有什么比困在帐篷里更糟。

Original: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION). Right. We'll get right on it.
(TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)... Hmm... Yes, we can probably use an axe for that.
Translation: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)……嗯……是的，我们大概能把斧头用在那上面。

Original: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)... Not really sure how that works, but let's give it a try.
Translation: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)……不太清楚那是怎么回事，但试试看吧。

Original: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)? Are you kidding? Well, if this is what you need to crush our foes, then so be it.
Translation: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)？你开玩笑吗？好吧，如果这是粉碎敌人所需，那就这样。

Original: *Yawn*[NEWLINE]Our homeland was never this boring... Maybe we should head back.
Translation: *哈欠*[NEWLINE]我们的故乡从没这么无聊……也许我们该回去。

Original: A new start will be nice, but it's only a matter of time until everyone here turns against as well. That's just how people are. You can't trust them.
Translation: 重新开始会不错，但这里所有人迟早也会背叛我们。人就是这样，不能信任。

Original: Admittedly, it's probably wise keeping us away from all the fancy tool work, but don't make the mistake of thinking we can't be good at anything.
Translation: 承认吧，让我们远离那些精细工具活也许是明智的，但别以为我们就什么都做不好。

Original: After looking around a bit we must admit that this place seems very exciting. We'd love to stick around.
Translation: 我们四处看了看，不得不承认这里很让人兴奋。我们很愿意留下。

Original: After talking to a few of your clansman and inspecting the living quarters, we've determined that this could indeed be a suitable home for us.
Translation: 和你的几位氏族成员谈过，又检查了住处之后，我们判断这里确实可以成为我们的合适家园。

Original: Ah, so you're the folks who've been hogging all of the good land for themselves. Seems you're going to have to share it with us now, huh?
Translation: 啊，所以你们就是那些把好地全占着的人。看来现在你们得和我们分享了，对吧？

Original: Ah, we meet at last! Yes, we dreamt of this moment. It also foretold that together we would accomplish great things.
Translation: 啊，我们终于见面了！没错，我们梦见过这一刻。梦里还预示，我们会一起成就伟业。

Original: Ah, we've heard so much about you from the other Clans in the area. If you have some time we can tell you about the best sources of food, rivers to avoid, trees to piss behind. You know, all the important stuff.
Translation: 啊，我们从附近其他氏族那里听说了很多关于你的事。如果你有时间，我们可以告诉你哪里食物最多，哪些河别碰，哪些树后面最适合小解。你知道，都是重要消息。

Original: AHA! You must be the leader of this very... great... tribe! Tonight we drink in your honor!
Translation: 啊哈！你一定就是这个非常……伟大……部族的领袖！今晚我们为你举杯！

Original: Ahhh... lying around and doing nothing is the best.
Translation: 啊……躺着什么都不做最好了。

Original: All across this world, there is carnage and slaughter. When is it our turn?
Translation: 这世上到处都是杀戮与屠灭。什么时候轮到我们？

Original: All our crops died... probably bad soil or something. So we've abandonded that worthless patch. Things growing better over here?
Translation: 我们的庄稼全死了……大概是土不好之类的。所以我们放弃了那块没用的地。这里长势更好吗？
好吧，这应该会很有意思！

Original: Although our rugged homeland might be too dangerous to live in now we still know it like the back of our hands.
Translation: 我们的崎岖故乡如今也许太危险，不能居住，但我们仍对那里了如指掌。

Original: Animals with short tails are the worst, because then you can always see their... their... you know...
Translation: 短尾巴的动物最糟，因为你总能看见它们的……它们的……你懂的……

Original: Anything you need us to build?
Translation: 有什么需要我们建造的吗？

Original: Are there any animals nearby that you'd like us to look after?
Translation: 附近有什么动物需要我们照看吗？

Original: Are you sure we've got enough food to make it through the winter?
Translation: 你确定我们的食物足够撑过冬天吗？

Original: Are you too haunted by visions of nightmarish oaks and spruces? We come to cure this affliction.
Translation: 你也会被噩梦般的橡树和云杉幻象纠缠吗？我们来治好这毛病。

Original: At least having nothing to do gives us time to hide our stuff from everyone's lustful eyes.
Translation: 至少没事做的时候，我们能把东西藏起来，躲开所有贪婪的目光。

Original: Bacon would be a whole lot better without those fatty bits along the edges. Removing them is a pain.
Translation: 培根要是没有边上那些肥肉就好多了。把它们剔掉太麻烦。

Original: Being a Scout sounds like fun... but Blacksmith doesn't sound too bad either...[NEWLINE]Ah, screw it. Where's dinner?
Translation: 当斥候听起来挺有趣……不过铁匠好像也不坏……[NEWLINE]啊，算了。晚饭在哪？

Original: Better results are obtained by taking the time to make sure one really knows the ins and outs of the task at hand.
Translation: 花时间真正弄清手头任务的方方面面，才能得到更好的结果。

Original: Can you just show us which tents are ours?
Translation: 你能直接告诉我们哪些帐篷归我们吗？

Original: Checking in on us again, huh? Do you not trust us or something?
Translation: 又来检查我们了？你是不信任我们还是什么？

Original: Close your eyes and imagine an endless, beautiful landscape. That was our home. Maybe one day we will return.
Translation: 闭上眼，想象一片无边无际的美丽大地。那曾是我们的家。也许有一天我们会回去。
该死！我们没能比 (CLAN_ON_TILE) 更早到这里。

Original: Death is always looming nearer than anyone realizes.
Translation: 死亡总是比任何人意识到的都更近。

Original: Did anyone hear that? I have a baaaad feeling about this...
Translation: 有人听见了吗？我有种咩——妙的预感……

Original: Did someone order a one-clan wrecking crew?
Translation: 有人点了一支单氏族破坏队吗？

Original: Did you know you're losing a lot of potential gains by not putting every able-bodied clansman to work.
Translation: 你知道吗？没有让每个健壮的氏族成员都去工作，会损失很多潜在收益。

Original: Do not miss your opportunity to enjoy life's flavors.
Translation: 别错过享受人生滋味的机会。

Original: Do you also find that everything always takes so much longer than you expect it will?
Translation: 你是不是也觉得，每件事都比预想的耗时更久？

Original: Doing nothing isn't so bad. It's a lot better than being silently mocked.
Translation: 什么都不做也没那么糟。总比被人默默嘲笑强多了。

Original: Don't even think about sending us out in the winter. Seriously.
Translation: 别想在冬天把我们派出去。说真的。

Original: Finally, we made it.[NEWLINE]Hey, are we done yet? We've got a lot to unpack and the longer we talk to you the longer it'll be before we're done.
Translation: 终于到了。[NEWLINE]嘿，我们结束了吗？我们还有很多东西要卸，你和我们谈得越久，我们就越晚弄完。

Original: Finally... out of the trees and into civilization. You must understand - the forest is absolutely the most terrible place imaginable.
Translation: 终于……离开树林，来到文明之地了。你得明白，森林绝对是能想象到的最可怕的地方。

Original: Follow sheep around for as long as we have and you'll smell like them too.
Translation: 像我们这样跟着羊群走了这么久，你也会闻起来像它们。

Original: Give us something to do, lest we grow fat and lazy.
Translation: 给我们点事做吧，免得我们又胖又懒。

Original: Greetings! Is it true that your people keep tents up all year? Ha, ridiculous! Summers are far too sweltering for that business.
Translation: 问候！听说你们的人一年到头都支着帐篷？哈，太荒唐了！夏天可热得受不了。

Original: Greetings. We'd like to join, if we may.
Translation: 你好。如果可以的话，我们想加入。

Original: Have you considered using human heads on sticks to ward off attackers? We will provide the heads.
Translation: 你考虑过把人头插在木桩上吓退进攻者吗？人头我们来提供。

Original: Have you ever seen the glimmer of the stars above the forest canopy? No? Good, leave it to us. It's dangerous out there.
Translation: 你见过森林冠层上方闪烁的星光吗？没见过？很好，交给我们吧。外面很危险。

Original: Hey, so... how often do *you* have nightmares of burning to death?
Translation: 呃，问一下……你会经常梦见自己被烧死吗？

Original: Hmmm, we just came up with an idea on the way here. Would you like to hear about it?
Translation: 嗯……来的路上我们刚想到一个点子。你想听听吗？

Original: How much longer before we can actually, you know, do something?
Translation: 还要多久我们才能真正，嗯，做点什么？

Original: I can't even remember how many bandits attacked us on the way here. Oh, don't worry, we're fine.[NEWLINE]Now that you mention it though, maybe someone could help remove the arrow from my brother Hanseric's knee?
Translation: 我都记不清来路上有多少强盗袭击过我们了。哦，别担心，我们没事。[NEWLINE]不过既然你提到了，也许有人能帮忙把我兄弟汉瑟里克膝盖上的箭拔出来？

Original: I guess this place is as good as any.
Translation: 我想这里和别处也差不多。

Original: I have a bad feeling about this... About what? I mean... you know, everything!
Translation: 我有种不好的预感……关于什么？我是说……你知道，所有事！

Original: I hope it's alright if we settle along with you and your people here.
Translation: 希望我们能和你以及你的人一起在这里定居。

Original: I keep falling asleep trying to figure out how many sheep we have.
Translation: 每次想数清我们有多少只羊，我都会睡着。

Original: I suppose ending up in a place like this is better than being dead. Heh, I guess we'll see.
Translation: 我想落到这种地方，总比死了强。呵，走着瞧吧。

Original: If there is anything, anything at all you need, do not hesitate to call on us.
Translation: 如果你需要任何事，任何事都可以，尽管召唤我们。

Original: If we don't keep the other Clans in line no one will.
Translation: 如果我们不让其他氏族守规矩，就没人会这么做了。

Original: If you've got an assignment, we'd be glad to hear of it... as long as you're certain it won't involve a fiery demise.
Translation: 如果有差事，我们很愿意听听……只要你确定不会让我们葬身火海。

Original: It's a bit disgusting that other clans are always poring through our garbage... Are they starving or something?
Translation: 其他氏族总在翻我们的垃圾，真有点恶心……他们是在挨饿还是怎么？

Original: It's a low-stress existance not having to work, but we wouldn't mind contributing either.
Translation: 不用干活确实轻松，但我们也不介意出点力。

Original: It's not even that contagious, you know...
Translation: 你知道，这也没那么容易传染……

Original: It's only paranoia if your theories turn out to be wrong. Otherwise, it's wisdom!
Translation: 只有当你的理论被证明是错的，那才叫多疑。否则，那叫智慧！

Original: It's so cold. Again. Just like every year. We can't take much more of this...
Translation: 又这么冷。每年都一样。我们快撑不住了……

Original: It's so obvious that (CLAN_ON_TILE)'s tents are bigger than everyone else's? I mean, come on, what did they ever do to deserve that?
Translation: (CLAN_ON_TILE) 的帐篷明显比别人的都大吧？我是说，拜托，他们凭什么？

Original: I've been thinking about that old tree for weeks.
Translation: 我已经想那棵老树想了好几个星期。

Original: Job... no job... Let's be honest, does it really matter?
Translation: 有活……没活……说实话，这真的重要吗？

Original: Joining your tribe will be the best thing that ever happens to us, we just know it!
Translation: 加入你的部族会是我们遇到过最好的事，我们就是知道！

Original: Just waiting around 'til we can smash some face, I guess.
Translation: 大概就是等着什么时候能去砸几张脸吧。

Original: Let us know if there's anyone you need to work out a deal with.
Translation: 如果你需要和谁谈成交易，就告诉我们。

Original: Live in the moment - tomorrow is never guaranteed.
Translation: 活在当下吧，谁也不能保证明天。

Original: Look no further for a sturdy axe.
Translation: 想找结实的斧头，就不用再找了。

Original: Mary's pretty feverish, Ghend's got the runs and Jim's got a broken leg, but other than that, we're good to go.
Translation: 玛丽发着高烧，根德拉肚子，吉姆断了条腿，不过除此之外，我们随时能上。

Original: Maybe if we had jobs to distract us life wouldn't seem so terrible...
Translation: 也许有活干来分散注意力，人生就不会显得这么可怕……

Original: No tasks that will leave us soaked, please.
Translation: 请别安排会把我们弄湿的差事。

Original: No, we haven't been riding nonstop for days. In fact we don't even have horses. (new line) ...Why do you ask?
Translation: 不，我们没有连续骑马好几天。事实上我们连马都没有。（换行）……你为什么这么问？

Original: Not sure if you're aware, but there seems to be a stain on your tunic.
Translation: 不知道你有没有发现，你的束腰外衣上好像有块污渍。

Original: Not sure why people are always feeling the need to cause a fuss.
Translation: 不太明白为什么人们总觉得非得闹出点动静。

Original: Nothing is as simultaneously practical and fashionable as fur.
Translation: 没有什么比毛皮更实用又时髦。

Original: Oh man, can't believe we actually made it here intact... WAIT! That rock just moved! You saw it, didn't you?
Translation: 天啊，真不敢相信我们居然完整地到了这里……等等！那块石头刚才动了！你看见了，对吧？

Original: Oh the things we've been through. You have no idea. First, there was this strange merchant who wouldn't stop talking about how he found some mineral spring that could heal any wounds. And then...
Translation: 哦，我们经历过的事情可多了。你根本想不到。先是有个奇怪的商人，不停说他找到一处能治愈任何伤口的矿泉。然后呢……

Original: Oh! I was so deep in thought I almost didn't notice this... er... settlement here.
Translation: 哦！我想得太入神，差点没注意到这座……呃……定居点。

Original: On our travels we heard tales of your great leadership. We can already see there's truth to them.
Translation: 旅途中我们听说过你卓越领导的传闻。现在看来，传闻确有其事。

Original: On our way over, we noticed a few points of interest in the area. Perhaps we could take a better look for you and report back.
Translation: 来的路上，我们注意到附近有几处值得留意的地方。也许我们可以替你仔细看看，再回来报告。

Original: Only a 27 day journey. Record time for that distance, you know!
Translation: 只用了 27 天就走到这里。以这段距离来说，这可是纪录时间！

Original: Only one of two things should occupy a mind at any given time. Those things are Production and Reproduction. At the moment, we're not being productive, so...
Translation: 一个人的脑子任何时候都只该想着两件事之一：生产和繁衍。现在我们没有在生产，所以……

Original: Our first home is the forest. Then why are we here? Two is better than one, of course.
Translation: 森林是我们的第一个家。那我们为什么来这里？当然是两个家比一个好。

Original: Our hut's getting a bit crowded with stuff. We should probably sell some of it off. Well, next Spring maybe...
Translation: 我们的棚屋被东西塞得有点满。也许该卖掉一些。嗯，也许等明年春天吧……

Original: Our last clan leader was incredibly ingrateful. We hope you'll be different...
Translation: 我们上一任氏族领袖极其忘恩负义。希望你会不同……

Original: Our old tribe disbanded, but that's alright. Why look back when you're offered new opportunities?
Translation: 我们的旧部族解散了，不过没关系。有新机会摆在眼前，何必回头看呢？

Original: Our youngest just felled his first tree!
Translation: 我们家最小的孩子刚砍倒了他的第一棵树！

Original: People and animals get bigger because we put other things into our stomachs. How is it exactly that plants get bigger? They don't eat! It simply boggles the mind.
Translation: 人和动物会变大，是因为我们把别的东西吃进肚子里。可植物到底怎么变大？它们又不吃东西！真令人费解。

Original: Phew, we weren't made to live in this kind of weather.
Translation: 呼，我们可不是为这种天气而生的。

Original: Phew... You wouldn't believe how long we've been walking now. Had to of been, hell, AT LEAST a few hours.[NEWLINE]So... have you got somewhere we can sit?
Translation: 呼……你根本不会相信我们已经走了多久。该死，至少也有好几个小时吧。[NEWLINE]所以……有地方能坐吗？

Original: Please don't ask where we're from or why we're here. It's... a truly depressing story. You wouldn't want to hear it anyway.
Translation: 请别问我们从哪来，也别问为什么来。这是……一个真正令人沮丧的故事。反正你也不会想听。

Original: Please let us in, there are bears out there. Bears!
Translation: 请让我们进去，外面有熊。熊啊！

Original: Please... Stop looking at us like that...
Ready your finest meats and clear a table in your dining hall, for we have arrived, and that, my friend, is cause for celebration!
Translation: 备好你们最好的肉，在餐厅清出一张桌子，因为我们到了，而这位朋友，正是值得庆祝的理由！
准备好了，有能力，也很愿意！

Original: Really, an assignment already? We were just getting settled in...
Translation: 真的，这么快就有差事？我们才刚安顿下来……

Original: Really? That's where you're going to have us stay? This simply will not do. We're going to have to rearrange some things.
Translation: 真的？你准备让我们住在那里？这绝对不行。我们得重新布置一些东西。

Original: Sacrifice in this life will be rewarded in the next.
Translation: 今生的牺牲，会在来世得到回报。

Original: Salvation from the elements awaits us here, I know it!
Translation: 这里一定能让我们逃过风霜，我知道！
唉。[NEWLINE]这一切都太……没意义了。

Original: Sitting around is the worst... you just think about all the terrible things that can happen. And probably will happen. Ugh...
Translation: 干坐着最糟了……你只会去想所有可能发生的可怕事情。而且它们大概真的会发生。唉……

Original: Sleeping with nothing but the open sky above you is the way to go.
Translation: 头顶只有开阔天空就能入睡，那才是正道。

Original: So we can stay?[NEWLINE]Come on, what's the catch?
Translation: 所以我们可以留下？[NEWLINE]别装了，有什么条件？

Original: So, do you have something for us to do yet or are we just going to keep sitting around and scaring little kids?
Translation: 所以，你到底有没有事情让我们做，还是要让我们继续坐在这里吓小孩？

Original: So, you really want us to be (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)? Seriously? Ugh... this is going to be terrible.
Translation: 所以，你真想让我们当 (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)？认真的？唉……这肯定会糟透。

Original: So... What's there to do around these parts? C'mon, don't tell us you're stuck up like that last tribe.
Translation: 所以……这附近有什么好玩的？拜托，别告诉我们你们像上个部族一样端着架子。

Original: Some people get seasick. Well, I'll be the first to tell you: we get landsick. Yeah. That's a thing
Translation: 有些人会晕船。那我第一个告诉你：我们会晕陆。没错，真有这回事。

Original: Some time to rest after that slog would be great.
Translation: 那段苦路之后，能休息一会儿就太好了。

Original: Sure, I suppose we'll be doing that then. We're all just packhorses to the powerful, after all.
Translation: 好吧，我想我们会去做的。毕竟在强者眼里，我们都只是驮马。

Original: Sure, we agree to join your tribe, but we're going to do things our way. Got it?
Translation: 行，我们同意加入你的部族，但事情要按我们的方式来。明白了吗？

Original: Thank you for taking us in, we promise you will not regret it. As we now owe you a great debt, what would you have us do?
Translation: 感谢你收留我们，我们保证你不会后悔。既然我们如今欠你一份大恩，你希望我们做什么？

Original: Thanks for inviting us in, but I must warn you that we may need some extra space. We've got some new additions on the way...!
Translation: 感谢你邀请我们进来，但我得先提醒，我们可能需要额外空间。路上又要添新人了……！

Original: Thanks for taking us in. In return, we'd be happy to build or repair something for you.
Translation: 谢谢你收留我们。作为回报，我们很乐意替你建点什么，或修点什么。

Original: Thanks for welcoming us - I assure you that we'll be of value to this community.
Translation: 感谢收留我们。我向你保证，我们会对这个共同体有价值。

Original: The ability to use tools is what seperates men from the beasts. The ability to use them well is what seperates men from lesser men!
Translation: 会使用工具，是人与野兽的区别。会把工具用好，则是人与庸人的区别！

Original: The gods smile most upon those who toil.
Translation: 诸神最眷顾辛勤劳作之人。

Original: The gods spoke to us and commanded that we settle here with you. I hope you understand.
Translation: 诸神向我们开口，命我们与你们一同定居于此。希望你能理解。

Original: The gods will it: We shall labor.
Translation: 诸神如此旨意：我们将劳动。

Original: The guy in charge of (CLAN_ON_TILE) has this truly monsterous pimple between his eyes. It makes it... quite difficult to even speak with him.
Translation: 负责 (CLAN_ON_TILE) 的那家伙，两眼中间长着一颗可怕的大脓包。这让人……实在很难和他说话。

Original: The key to a maintaining a strong body is to be constantly pushing yourself to the limit!
Translation: 保持强健体魄的关键，就是不断把自己逼到极限！

Original: The sooner we can get out of this crowded pile of humanity the better...
Translation: 我们越早离开这堆拥挤的人群越好……

Original: The story's that great great great grandpa (CLAN_NAME) took a bear as a lover. As you can see, the bear blood's been a little watered down now. But still, it really explains some things.
Translation: 传说高高高祖父 (CLAN_NAME) 曾把一头熊当作爱人。你也看得出来，熊血现在被冲淡了些。但这仍然很能解释一些事。

Original: The trees speak. They told us to come here.
Translation: 树木开口了。它们叫我们来这里。

Original: The way things are done can often be improved by carefully rethinking one's approach.
Translation: 许多事情只要重新仔细考虑做法，就能改进。

Original: The woods are full of eyes...
The world is so small, but c'mon, there's got to be more places to go somewhere!
Translation: 世界这么小，但拜托，总该还有更多地方可去吧！

Original: There is no higher calling than reproduction, wouldn't you say?
Translation: 没有比繁衍更崇高的使命了，你说呢？

Original: There must be some use for us.
There's no real point in going on, but it seems the gods aren't done tormenting us. So... here we are.
Translation: 继续下去也没什么意义，但看来诸神还没折磨够我们。所以……我们来了。

Original: These lands are dangerous, and it seems we are to ride with you for now. Know that we do not intend to remain here forever though.
Translation: 这些土地很危险，看来我们暂时要与你同行。但你要知道，我们并不打算永远留在这里。

Original: These lands could use a few more trees, don't you think?
Translation: 这片土地可以多几棵树，你不觉得吗？

Original: They told us to settle down. They told us to wear pants. Heh heh... they won't make that mistake again!
Translation: 他们让我们安分下来。他们让我们穿裤子。嘿嘿……他们不会再犯那种错误了！

Original: This is the only place we've ever known. It's hard to believe we'll eventually have to leave it behind one day...
Translation: 这是我们唯一熟悉的地方。很难相信有一天我们终究得把它抛在身后……

Original: This kind of easygoing life isn't bad! Just let know if you need a hand with anything though.
Translation: 这种随遇而安的日子并不坏！需要帮手就告诉我们吧。

Original: This land is flat like the sea. We don't like the sea.
Translation: 这片土地像海一样平。我们不喜欢海。

Original: This place looks okay. Might as well stop here.
Translation: 这地方看着还行。那就停在这里吧。

Original: This wasn't exactly where we were headed, but I'll be damned if we're going back out there. We'll be staying.
Translation: 这不完全是我们原本要去的地方，但该死，我们绝不会再回到外面。我们要留下。

Original: To where do we travel? Some place with a fine cuisine, I hope.
Translation: 我们要去哪儿？希望是个菜肴不错的地方。

Original: Umm... errr... is it okay that we're just... hanging around and not doing anything...?
Translation: 呃……那个……我们就这样……待着不做事……没关系吗？

Original: Unfortunately, it seems we can't stay on our own if we want to keep our heads. Even so, it would be best if you let us do our own thing.[NEWLINE]Deal?
Translation: 遗憾的是，想保住脑袋，我们似乎不能再独自待着。即便如此，最好还是让我们按自己的方式行事。[NEWLINE]成交？

Original: Wait, what was that? You saw it, right?
Translation: 等等，那是什么？你也看见了，对吧？

Original: Wait, what?! We have to give it all to you in order to join your tribe? Maybe this wasn't such a good idea after all...
Translation: 等等，什么？！为了加入你的部族，我们得把东西全交给你？也许这主意根本不怎么样……

Original: Wait... you mean we can just stay here? No strings attached? Well, that's new.
Translation: 等等……你的意思是我们可以就这么留下？没有附加条件？这倒新鲜。

Original: We are called (NAME) and hail from lands soggy and smelly. But dry ground... well, this is new.
Translation: 我们叫 (NAME)，来自潮湿又难闻的土地。但干地……嗯，这倒是新鲜。

Original: We are ready to confront the wilds.
Translation: 我们已经准备好面对荒野。

Original: We cannot stop thinking about ways we could be of better use to the community.
Translation: 我们一直停不下来地想着，怎样才能更好地为共同体效力。

Original: We changed our mind about that other thing. Now we're thinking it might be nice to have a public bathhouse... OH or a ___ could be neat!
Translation: 我们对之前那件事改主意了。现在觉得建个公共浴场可能不错……哦，或者来个 ___ 也挺好！

Original: We could make ourselves useful. As long as it doesn't involve touching anything furry.
Translation: 我们可以派上用场。只要别碰任何毛茸茸的东西。

Original: We do truly hope you have some plants which need tending to. We have some skill in such work, you see.
Translation: 我们真心希望你有些需要照料的植物。你看，我们对这种活还算有些本事。

Original: We find it pretty unsettling to be sitting around all day in giant tents filled with strangers.
Translation: 整天坐在装满陌生人的巨大帐篷里，实在让我们不太自在。

Original: We find water to be no great obstacle, should you ever have a job which might take advantage of that.
Translation: 如果你有能发挥这一点的差事，水对我们来说并不算什么障碍。

Original: We heard about the great things going on over here and just had to come get in on the action!
Translation: 我们听说这里有不少了不起的事，就忍不住赶来参与！

Original: We heard about you and talked about coming here and pretty soon we couldn't even think about anything else, so here we are!
Translation: 我们听说了你的事，也谈过要来这里，很快我们就再也想不了别的，所以我们来了！

Original: We heard there's food and drink here. Hmmm. Needs a little more excitement though!
Translation: 我们听说这里有吃有喝。嗯。不过还需要更刺激一点！

Original: We know our numbers might be small, but we plan on working hard for you.
Translation: 我们知道人数也许不多，但我们打算为你努力干活。

Original: We left no one alive at that last place. Be careful that you don't end up like them.
Translation: 上一个地方我们一个活口都没留。小心别落得和他们一样。

Original: We ought to be making the most of our time rather than wasting it idling. Life is short and there's so much to see and do.
Translation: 与其闲着浪费时间，不如好好把握每一天。生命短暂，值得去看的、去做的事情太多了。

Original: We really wish (CLAN_ON_TILE) would just stop staring at us... What did we ever do to them...
Translation: 我们真希望 (CLAN_ON_TILE) 别再盯着我们看了……我们到底做错了什么……

Original: We were going to go by "Swampmen" but something about that seemed strange for some reason...
Translation: 我们本来想自称“沼泽人”，但不知为什么，总觉得哪里怪怪的……

Original: We won't need the tour, thank you. We've gone ahead and done a good bit of looking around already.
Translation: 不用带我们参观了，谢谢。我们已经自己看过不少地方。

Original: We'd just like to point out that many other clans are assigned to specific tasks...
Translation: 我们只是想指出，很多其他氏族已经被安排了具体任务……

Original: We'd left a few supplies behind to lighten our loads, figuring you'd have replacements. Thankfully, we've arrived just in time. A day or so longer and we may have starved...!
Translation: 我们为了减轻负重丢下了一些补给，想着你会有替代品。幸好我们来得正是时候。再晚一两天，我们可能就饿死了……！

Original: We'd really appreciate a place to stay. Another night out in the rain and we'll certainly lose our minds.
Translation: 我们真的需要一个落脚处。再在雨里过一夜，我们肯定会疯掉。

Original: Weeks of stale trail rations have deepened our appetite. Open your cupboards, and let us see what you have to quench it.
Translation: 几周陈旧的路粮让我们的胃口更大了。打开你的柜子，让我们看看有什么能填饱它。

Original: Weird question but, uh, are these tents flammable?
Translation: 问题有点怪，不过这些帐篷会着火吗？

Original: We'll be making our own fun since, hell, we ain't got nothing better to do!
Translation: 反正闲着也是闲着，我们会自己找乐子的！

Original: We'll be moving in. For how long? Indefinitely. So, have your clans move their tents away from that spot right there - yes, that one, with the nice view - we'll be settling down there.
Translation: 我们要搬进来了。住多久？无限期。所以，让你的氏族把帐篷从那块地方挪开，对，就是那块视野不错的地方，我们要在那里安顿。

Original: We'll lend you a hand for now, but don't expect us to do so forever. Everything in life has its price.
Translation: 我们暂时会帮你一把，但别指望我们永远如此。人生万事都有价码。

Original: We're glad you agree that life's not all about work.
Translation: 很高兴你也同意，人生不全是干活。

Original: We're here to get our fair share. You understand, right?
Translation: 我们是来拿自己应得那份的。你明白吧？

Original: We're here when you need us.
Translation: 需要我们时，我们就在这里。

Original: We're looking for a change of scenery. Got room for a few more?
Translation: 我们想换个地方生活。还能容下几个人吗？

Original: We're ready to head out, so just give us a destination!
Translation: 我们已经准备出发，只要给个目的地！

Original: We're too weak to go on any further... May we end our travels here?
Translation: 我们太虚弱，走不动了……可以在这里结束旅程吗？

Original: We've arrived earlier than projected and still have plenty of energy - what needs doing?
Translation: 我们比预计更早抵达，而且还有不少力气。有什么需要做的？

Original: We've been using all this free time to practice agriculture by growing house plants! That reminds me, what does it mean when the ends of the leaves turn yellow?
Translation: 我们一直用这些空闲时间种盆栽，练习农活！说起来，叶尖变黄是什么意思？

Original: We've begun preparing ourselves for an assignment. Let us know when you have one.
Translation: 我们已经开始为一项任务做准备。有安排时就告诉我们。

Original: We've got a few pretty good ideas of some ways we could help out around here.
Translation: 我们有几个相当不错的点子，也许能帮上这里的忙。

Original: What are those sticks with metal shapes on the end that everyone is walking about with?
Translation: 大家手里拿着走来走去的那种末端有金属块的木棍是什么？

Original: What, really? You want us to be (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION) while (CLAN_ON_TILE) does... whatever they're doing, while we'd clearly do a much better job at it?
Translation: 什么，真的？你想让我们去当 (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)，而 (CLAN_ON_TILE) 却在做……不管他们在做什么？明明我们会做得更好。

Original: Whenever one looks into the cold, black eyes of beasts, it's certain they're only thinking one thing... how to kill us all.
Translation: 只要看见野兽冰冷漆黑的眼睛，就知道它们脑子里只想着一件事……怎么把我们全杀掉。

Original: When's the next Caravan show up?
Translation: 下一支商队什么时候来？

Original: Where did you sat you put our axes?
Translation: 你刚才说把我们的斧头放哪儿了？

Original: Why does everyone else get something to do while we just sit around here?
Translation: 为什么别人都有事做，我们却只能坐在这里？

Original: Why is everyone wearing shirts while the weather is so fantastic?
Translation: 天气这么好，为什么大家还穿着上衣？

Original: Without anything else to do, it's hard not to get lost in dark thoughts...
Translation: 没别的事可做时，很难不陷进阴暗的念头里……

Original: Would rather sit around than have you ask us to do something absurd, which would force me to put my foot down.
Translation: 宁愿坐着，也不想让你要求我们做些荒唐事，逼得我不得不拒绝。

Original: Wouldn't it be amazing if we discovered a hidden valley that was home to a plethora of giant, ancient creatures?
Translation: 如果我们发现一座隐藏山谷，里面生活着许多巨大的古老生物，那不是太惊人了吗？

Original: Wow... you keep this place really clean.
Translation: 哇……你们把这里收拾得真干净。

Original: Yeah, that's right, we're (NAME). What of it? That name mean something to you? We'd better never catch you talking behind our backs.
Translation: 没错，我们就是 (NAME)。怎么了？这个名字对你有意义吗？最好别让我们听见你在背后议论。

Original: Yeah, we know, you don't have to say it. We'll just be... off in the corner. Like always...
Translation: 是的，我们知道，你不必说。我们会……待在角落里。像往常一样……

Original: Yeah, yeah, we pledge our loyalty and all that. No need to show us around, just get your maps and bring out your gear.
Translation: 行了行了，我们宣誓效忠之类的。不用带我们参观，把地图拿来，把装备拿出来。

Original: Yep, sounds fine. I'll do it.
Translation: 嗯，听起来不错。我们会去做。

Original: Yes, this is the place we were always meant to be! Don't you agree?[NEWLINE]Wait... what's that over there?
Translation: 对，这就是我们命中注定该来的地方！你不也这么觉得吗？[NEWLINE]等等……那边是什么？

Original: Yes... he asked one of us to hold the hammer for a minute... I didn't think what happened would happen. Accidents like that just emphasize the inherent danger of tools.
Translation: 是的……他让我们中的一个人帮忙拿一下锤子……我没想到会变成那样。这种事故正说明工具天生危险。

Original: You do know that washing all the time dries out your skin, right?
Translation: 你知道一直洗来洗去会让皮肤变干吧？

Original: You ever wonder what life will be like for people living appriximately sixteen hundred years from now?
Translation: 你有没有想过，大约一千六百年后的人会过着什么样的生活？

Original: You have people who start and tend the village cookfires, right? Because we're pretty tired of having to deal with that ourselves.
Translation: 你们有人负责生火和照看炊火，对吧？我们真的受够自己处理这些事了。

Original: You know when you break a nose and it makes that satisfying "crunch" sound? Yeah. Was just thinking about that...
Translation: 你知道打断鼻梁时那种令人满意的“咔嚓”声吗？嗯，刚刚正想到那个……

Original: You know, if you don't have anything for us to do maybe we could visit our old home. You know, a bit of a vacation?[NEWLINE]Okay, yeah, didn't think so...
Translation: 你知道，如果没什么事要我们做，也许我们可以回旧家看看。算是休个小假？[NEWLINE]好吧，是的，我就知道不行……

Original: You know, taking it easy has some real health benefits.
Translation: 你知道吗，放轻松确实对健康有好处。

Original: You wouldn't believe how long it's taken us to get here, and after people told us we didn't have far to go, no less!
Translation: 你绝不会相信我们走到这里花了多久，何况那些人还说路不远！

Original: Your people take their shoes off when entering their huts... Strange.
Translation: 你们的人进棚屋前会脱鞋……真奇怪。

Original: Your settlement is weak and vulernable. With the right amount of iron and blood, we can fix that.
Translation: 你的定居点软弱又脆弱。只要有足够的铁与血，我们就能修好这一点。

Original: [Factions|FACTION] with the 'Roman' Trait are civilized and typically highly-advanced, and generally look and act very differently from Factions which don't have the Trait.

Original:
[Armies|ARMY] outside of your [Control|CONTROL] no longer automatically have [Supply|SUPPLY]. The EMPHASISed [Tile|TILE] is an example.

 The hover help box in the bottom-right corner of the screen will show you the [Supply|SUPPLY] available on a [Tile|TILE].
Translation: 位于你的[控制|CONTROL]之外的[军队|ARMY]不再自动拥有[补给|SUPPLY]。被强调的[地块|TILE]就是一个例子。屏幕右下角的悬停帮助框会显示某个[地块|TILE]上的可用[补给|SUPPLY]。

Original:
[Clans|CLAN] also have their own personalities, and 2 Traits which differentiate them from other Clans.

 These Traits can be good things, like starting with free [Levels|LEVEL] in a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], but can also be bad, like taking longer to [Train|TRAIN] in new [Professions|PROFESSION]. There are several dozen Traits in the game, and almost every [Clan|CLAN] is special in some way or another.
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]也有自己的性格，以及 2 个使其区别于其他氏族的特质。这些特质可能是好事，例如一开始就在某个[学科|DISCIPLINE]中拥有免费[等级|LEVEL]；也可能是坏事，例如[训练|TRAIN]成新[职业|PROFESSION]需要更久。游戏中有数十种特质，几乎每个[氏族|CLAN]都以某种方式与众不同。

Original:
[Clans|CLAN] appear automatically at a rate determined by how much [FAME] you're generating.

 At first Clans will appear fairly regularly, but over time you'll need to increase your Fame by an ever-greater amount in order for new recruits to hear of your deeds and seek out your leadership.
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]会以由你产生多少[FAME]决定的速度自动出现。最初氏族会相当规律地出现，但随着时间推移，你需要越来越多地提高名声，新的追随者才会听闻你的事迹并寻求你的领导。

Original:
[Clans|CLAN] contain 1 [Family|FAMILY] when they arrive, and over time will eventually grow to contain 10.

 Each [Family|FAMILY] costs 1 [FOOD] per [Turn|TURN]. Thus while older [Clans|CLAN] can be quite valuable for all of the [XP|XP] they've accumulated over time this does come at a price.
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]抵达时包含 1 个[家庭|FAMILY]，之后会逐渐增长到 10 个。每个[家庭|FAMILY]每[回合|TURN]消耗 1 [FOOD]。因此，虽然老[氏族|CLAN]因长期积累的[经验|XP]而非常有价值，但这也有代价。

Original: \n [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] costs either [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS], depending on whether you want a basic (temporary) Structure or an advanced (permanent) one. [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based Structures are incredibly useful, as they last forever and can even have Apprentices assigned to them to increase their [Production|PRODUCE], but they're quite expensive so don't expect to have any until at least turn 50.\n
Translation: [建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]会消耗[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS]，取决于你想要基础（临时）建筑还是高级（永久）建筑。基于[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]的建筑极其有用，因为它们永久存在，甚至可以分配学徒来提高[产出|PRODUCE]；但它们相当昂贵，所以至少到第 50 回合前别指望拥有。

Original: \n [Deposits|DEPOSIT] are eventually [Depleted|DEPLETE] after a couple of years as the supply of [Resources|RESOURCE] on its [Tile|TILE] is used up. You will eventually need to migrate in search of new [Deposits|DEPOSIT] to [Harvest|HARVEST] - keep your eye out for new [Resources|RESOURCE] you might be able to build your economy around!\n
Translation: 几年后，[矿藏|DEPOSIT]会随着其[地块|TILE]上的[资源|RESOURCE]被用尽而最终[枯竭|DEPLETE]。你最终需要迁徙，寻找新的[矿藏|DEPOSIT]来[采集|HARVEST]。留意你可能围绕其建立经济的新[资源|RESOURCE]！

Original:
[Deposits|DEPOSIT] can provide you with [Resources|RESOURCE] useful in [Training|TRAIN], [Construction|CONSTRUCT], and trade. You can [Harvest|HARVEST] them by [Foraging|FORAGE] or by Constructing [Structures|STRUCTURE] on them.

 [Plants|PLANT] are Harvested by [Farms|FARM], [Animal Herds|ANIMAL] by [Pastures|PASTURE], and [Minerals|MINERAL] by [Mines|MINE]. [TIMBER] is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Forests|FOREST] both on and [COLOR:EMPHASIS]next to[/COLOR] [LOGGING-CAMP-1:S], rather than from specific [Deposits|DEPOSIT].
Translation: [矿藏|DEPOSIT]可以提供用于[训练|TRAIN]、[建造|CONSTRUCT]和贸易的[资源|RESOURCE]。你可以通过[采集|FORAGE]来[采集|HARVEST]它们，也可以在其上建造[建筑|STRUCTURE]。[植物|PLANT]由[农场|FARM]采集，[动物群|ANIMAL]由[牧场|PASTURE]采集，[矿物|MINERAL]由[矿井|MINE]采集。[TIMBER]不是来自特定[矿藏|DEPOSIT]，而是从[LOGGING-CAMP-1:S]所在及[COLOR:EMPHASIS]相邻[/COLOR]的[森林|FOREST]中[采集|HARVEST]。

Original: \n [FONT:CLEAN-SMALL]Our [ARCHER:S] are [Producing|PRODUCE] [+###:PRODUCED] [???:TO-RESOURCE|###:PRODUCED] from [???:FROM-RESOURCE][FONT:TITLE-HUGE] for [/FONT][COLOR:BAD-RED][...:LEADER-NAME][/COLOR] each [Turn|TURN] (total of [###:TURNS] [Turn|Turns|###:TURNS] left).[/FONT]\n
Translation: [FONT:CLEAN-SMALL]我们的[ARCHER:S]每[回合|TURN]正在从[???:FROM-RESOURCE][FONT:TITLE-HUGE]为[/FONT][COLOR:BAD-RED][...:LEADER-NAME][/COLOR][产出|PRODUCE] [+###:PRODUCED] [???:TO-RESOURCE|###:PRODUCED]（总共还剩 [###:TURNS] [回合|回合|###:TURNS]）。[/FONT]

Original: \n [FOOD] is an essential [Resource|RESOURCE] which your [Clans|CLAN] eat each turn. Should you run out your tribe will [Starve|STARVE], reducing [Resource Production|PRODUCE], [Morale|MORALE], and more. You can [Harvest|HARVEST] it from a variety of map-based [Deposits|DEPOSIT] with the help of a [Forager|FORAGE]. The [Caravan|CARAVAN] occasionally has [FOOD] for sale, but don't expect to be able to reliably feed your [Clans|CLAN] this way.\n
Translation: [FOOD]是你的[氏族|CLAN]每回合都会食用的关键[资源|RESOURCE]。如果耗尽，部族会[挨饿|STARVE]，降低[资源产出|PRODUCE]、[士气|MORALE]等。你可以借助[采集者|FORAGE]从地图上的各种[矿藏|DEPOSIT]中[采集|HARVEST]食物。[商队|CARAVAN]偶尔会出售[FOOD]，但不要指望能长期靠这种方式养活你的[氏族|CLAN]。

Original: \n [FOOD] is different from other [Resources|RESOURCE] in that it enters your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] as ["Stored Turns"|STORED-TURN] rather than a fixed, spendable quantity. You consume exactly 1 [Turn of Food|STORED-TURN] each Turn. The amount of raw [FOOD] above your needs you're able to [Produce|PRODUCE] is turned into surplus turns you can spend later (100% excess [Production|PRODUCE] equals +1 [Stored Turn|STORED-TURN]).\n
Translation: [FOOD]不同于其他[资源|RESOURCE]，它进入[库存|STOCKPILE]时不是固定可花费数量，而是[“储备回合”|STORED-TURN]。你每回合正好消耗 1 [食物回合|STORED-TURN]。你能[产出|PRODUCE]的、超过需求的原始[FOOD]会转化为以后可用的盈余回合（100% 额外[产出|PRODUCE]等于 +1 [储备回合|STORED-TURN]）。

Original:
[FOOD] is the most important [Resource|RESOURCE], as if you ever run out your tribe will [Starve|STARVE].

 [TREASURE] is also very useful, as it can be used to buy a variety of [Resources|RESOURCE] from the [Caravan|CARAVAN] (as well as upgrade it with new wares), and even ply neighboring [Leaders|LEADER] with gifts.

 Your [FAME] is what determines how often new [Clans|CLAN] join your tribe, and there are a handful of [Professions|PROFESSION] which can help you [Produce|PRODUCE] more.
Translation: [FOOD]是最重要的[资源|RESOURCE]，因为一旦耗尽，部族就会[挨饿|STARVE]。[TREASURE]也很有用，因为它可以从[商队|CARAVAN]购买各种[资源|RESOURCE]（也可以升级商队货物），甚至可以用礼物拉拢邻近[领袖|LEADER]。你的[FAME]决定新[氏族|CLAN]加入部族的频率，也有少数[职业|PROFESSION]可以帮助你[产出|PRODUCE]更多名声。

Original:
[Foragers|FORAGE] and [TIMBER]-based [Structures|STRUCTURE] [Deplete|DEPLETE], and then eventually [Exhaust|EXHAUST] the available [Resources|RESOURCE] on a Tile, so you'll usually need to move your [SETTLEMENT] a couple times in order to find more.

 In the mid-game you'll be able to [Found a Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM], settle down in one place, and [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based [Structures|STRUCTURE] that last forever.
Translation: [采集者|FORAGE]和基于[TIMBER]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]会[消耗|DEPLETE]并最终[耗尽|EXHAUST]地块上的可用[资源|RESOURCE]，因此你通常需要迁移[SETTLEMENT]几次来寻找更多资源。游戏中期，你将能够[建立王国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]，在一个地点定居，并[建造|CONSTRUCT]基于[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]、可永久存在的[建筑|STRUCTURE]。

Original:
[Foraging|FORAGE] can be performed on any [Tile|TILE], anywhere, but this doesn't provide very many [Resources|RESOURCE].

 On the other hand, [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] is a much better long-term investment, but requires more advanced [Professions|PROFESSION], spending [Resources|RESOURCE], and the [Deposit|DEPOSIT] in question must be within your [Control|CONTROL] (which often requires moving your [SETTLEMENT]).
Translation: [采集|FORAGE]可以在任何地方的任何[地块|TILE]上进行，但不会提供很多[资源|RESOURCE]。另一方面，[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]是更好的长期投资，但需要更高级的[职业|PROFESSION]、花费[资源|RESOURCE]，且相关[矿藏|DEPOSIT]必须位于你的[控制|CONTROL]内（这通常需要迁移[SETTLEMENT]）。

Original: \n [Founding your Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM] is a big step, and costs 20 Parchment. This is an action you probably won't be ready for until at least turn 50 - before this your goal is simply to explore the map and develop your economy in order to open up larger strategic plays in the midgame.\n
Translation: [建立你的王国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]是一大步，需要花费 20 羊皮纸。你大概至少要到第 50 回合才会准备好这样做；在此之前，你的目标只是探索地图并发展经济，为中期更大的战略行动打开空间。

Original: \n [Harvesting Resources|HARVEST] from a Tile [Depletes|DEPLETE] and eventually completely [Exhausts|EXHAUST] it. The only way to avoid this is by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based [Structures|STRUCTURE], which both last forever and can have their [Production|PRODUCE] increased by assigning [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to them.\n
Translation: 从地块[采集资源|HARVEST]会使其[枯竭|DEPLETE]，并最终完全[耗尽|EXHAUST]。避免这种情况的唯一办法是[建造|CONSTRUCT]高级的[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR][建筑|STRUCTURE]；它们既能永久存在，也可以通过指派[学徒|APPRENTICE]提高[产出|PRODUCE]。

Original: \n [Health|HEALTH] is another important stat. It starts at 100 and if it reaches 0 a [Unit|UNIT] dies. As it drops it also lowers a Unit's [Power|POWER]. Avoiding [Health|HEALTH] loss is especially important on long campaigns, as [Units|UNIT] don't automatically recover Health, and can only do so in the [SETTLEMENT] by spending [OIL] and [CLOTH].\n
Translation: [生命值|HEALTH]是另一个重要属性。它从 100 开始，如果降到 0，[单位|UNIT]就会死亡。生命值下降时，也会降低单位的[战力|POWER]。在长期战役中避免[生命值|HEALTH]损失尤其重要，因为[单位|UNIT]不会自动恢复生命值，只能在[SETTLEMENT]中花费[OIL]和[CLOTH]恢复。

Original: \n [Morale|MORALE] is similar to a [Health|HEALTH], except that it recovers automatically each turn. Attacking [Units|UNIT] lose more Health in combat, while defenders lose more [Morale|MORALE]. The goal of the attacker is to reduce the defender's Morale to 0, which causes them to chaotically retreat from their Tile, lose any defensive bonuses they had, and lose a huge amount of [Health|HEALTH] as they flee.\n
Translation: [士气|MORALE]类似[生命值|HEALTH]，但每回合会自动恢复。进攻[单位|UNIT]在战斗中损失更多生命值，防御者则损失更多[士气|MORALE]。进攻方的目标是把防御者士气降到 0，这会使其混乱地从所在地块撤退，失去所有防御加成，并在逃跑时损失大量[生命值|HEALTH]。

Original:
[Pillaging|PILLAGE] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] provides an immediate lump sum of [Resources|RESOURCE].

 Holding onto a [Structure|STRUCTURE] allows you to enjoy all the benefits of owning it after a few [Turns|TURN] of it being [Offline|OFFLINE] due to Occupation.

 It's usually better to own a [Structure|STRUCTURE], but [Pillaging|PILLAGE] it can be a good option if you're too far from home or in desperate need of Resources.
Translation: [劫掠|PILLAGE][建筑|STRUCTURE]会立即提供一笔[资源|RESOURCE]。保留[建筑|STRUCTURE]则允许你在其因占领而[离线|OFFLINE]几个[回合|TURN]后享受所有拥有它的好处。通常拥有[建筑|STRUCTURE]更好，但如果你离家太远或急需资源，[劫掠|PILLAGE]也可能是好选择。

Original:
[Professions|PROFESSION] allow Clans to do several things.

 Clans in [Active|ACTIVE] Professions can roam the map to fight or explore or build Structures, while those which remain in Settled Professions can [Produce|PRODUCE] or refine [Resources|RESOURCE] or provide other kinds of economic benefits.
Translation: [职业|PROFESSION]让氏族能做多种事情。处于[主动|ACTIVE]职业的氏族可以在地图上游走，战斗、探索或建造建筑；留在定居职业中的氏族则可以[产出|PRODUCE]或精炼[资源|RESOURCE]，或提供其他经济收益。

Original: \n [Researching|STUDY] new [Professions|PROFESSION] and their [Upgrades|UPGRADE] is important to keeping your economy and military on-track. Your best bet is to prioritize getting a basic [Resource|RESOURCE]-refinement pipeline set up (e.g. [Harvesting|HARVEST] [IRON] and then turning it into [WEAPONS] with your initial [Research|STUDY] choices, as this will give you something to sell to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] in exchange for whatever else you might lack.\n
Translation: [研究|STUDY]新的[职业|PROFESSION]及其[升级|UPGRADE]，对于维持经济和军事发展非常重要。最佳做法是优先建立基础[资源|RESOURCE]加工链（例如[采集|HARVEST][IRON]，再通过初始[研究|STUDY]选择把它转化为[WEAPONS]），这样你就有东西可以卖给[商队|CARAVAN]，换取可能缺少的其他资源。

Original:
[Resources|RESOURCE] are [Harvested|HARVEST] from map [Deposits|DEPOSIT] and [dense Forests|FOREST] by [Foragers|FORAGE], and later in the game by more efficient and expensive [Structures|STRUCTURE].

 [Deposits|DEPOSIT] eventually run out, so you'll need to continuously find new ones - at least until you're able to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] highly-advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based [Structures|STRUCTURE], which last forever.
Translation: [资源|RESOURCE]由[采集者|FORAGE]从地图上的[矿藏|DEPOSIT]和[茂密森林|FOREST]中[采集|HARVEST]，游戏后期则由更高效也更昂贵的[建筑|STRUCTURE]产出。[矿藏|DEPOSIT]最终会耗尽，因此你需要不断寻找新的矿藏，至少在你能够[建造|CONSTRUCT]高度先进、基于[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]且永久存在的[建筑|STRUCTURE]之前是这样。

Original:
[Resources|RESOURCE] are one of the 2 fundamental building blocks of the game's economy ([Clans|CLAN] being the other one). Your main source will be [Harvesting Deposits|HARVEST], though it is possible to Harvest [TIMBER] from [dense Forests|FOREST].

 You'll use [Foragers|FORAGE] to [Harvest your Resources|HARVEST] the first couple years, before you start [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE], and can supplement this [Production|PRODUCE] with purchases from the [Caravan|CARAVAN] if it's visiting.
Translation: [资源|RESOURCE]是游戏经济的两大基础之一（另一个是[氏族|CLAN]）。你的主要来源是[采集矿藏|HARVEST]，不过也可以从[茂密森林|FOREST]采集[TIMBER]。最初几年你会使用[采集者|FORAGE][采集资源|HARVEST]，之后开始[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]；如果[商队|CARAVAN]来访，也可以通过购买来补充这种[产出|PRODUCE]。

Original: \n [Rivers|RIVER] are an important map barrier which you'll want to plan around carefully. [Units|UNIT] require a full extra turn to enter a Tile with a Small River, and Large Rivers are impossible to cross - except in the [Winter|COLD], when [Rivers|RIVER] can freeze and essentially become flat [Terrain|TERRAIN] with no additional [Move cost|MOVE-POINT].\n
Translation: [河流|RIVER]是重要的地图障碍，需要仔细规划。[单位|UNIT]进入带有小河的地块需要额外整整一回合，而大河无法穿越，除非在[冬季|COLD]，[河流|RIVER]结冰并基本变成没有额外[移动消耗|MOVE-POINT]的平坦[地形|TERRAIN]。

Original: \n [Structures|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] from [STONE-BLOCKS] do not [Deplete|DEPLETE] [Resources|RESOURCE], making them extremely valuable and essential to establishing a [permanent kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM]. Eventually, you'll want all of your [Resources|RESOURCE] to be [Harvested|HARVEST] by Stone [Structures|STRUCTURE], but you're still 50-100 [Turns|TURN] away from being able to do this right now.\n
Translation: 由[STONE-BLOCKS][建造|CONSTRUCT]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]不会[消耗|DEPLETE][资源|RESOURCE]，因此极其宝贵，也是建立[永久王国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]的关键。最终，你会希望所有[资源|RESOURCE]都由石制[建筑|STRUCTURE][采集|HARVEST]，但现在距离能做到这一点还有 50-100 [回合|TURN]。

Original:
[Structures|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] from [TIMBER] slowly [Degrade|DEGRADE] over time as they use up the [Resources|RESOURCE] on their [Tile|TILE].

 Above each [Structure|STRUCTURE] is a bar showing how long it will be until this occurs. The EMPHASISed ??? will suffer this fate in ??? [Turns|TURN].
Translation: 由[TIMBER][建造|CONSTRUCT]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]会随着消耗所在[地块|TILE]上的[资源|RESOURCE]而逐渐[损耗|DEGRADE]。每座[建筑|STRUCTURE]上方都有一条进度条，显示距离此事发生还剩多久。被强调的 ??? 将在 ??? [回合|TURN]后遭遇这种命运。

Original:
[Structures|STRUCTURE] can only be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [Clans|CLAN] in the appropriate [Profession|PROFESSION]: Farms by the [FARMER], Pastures by the [RANCHER], Mines by the [MINER], and so on.

 A [Clan|CLAN] which has finished [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] then leaves the map and becomes its resident. The [Clan|CLAN] can return to the map at any time, but the [Structure|STRUCTURE] will be destroyed in the process.
Translation: [建筑|STRUCTURE]只能由拥有合适[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN][建造|CONSTRUCT]：农场由[FARMER]建造，牧场由[RANCHER]建造，矿井由[MINER]建造，依此类推。完成[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]的[氏族|CLAN]随后会离开地图，成为该建筑的居民。[氏族|CLAN]可以随时返回地图，但[建筑|STRUCTURE]会在此过程中被摧毁。

Original:
[Structures|STRUCTURE] may be built by [Clans|CLAN] [Trained|TRAIN] in special [Professions|PROFESSION] that have the ability to do so (e.g. [FARMER], [MINER]).

 Enemy [Structures|STRUCTURE] can be [Pillaged|PILLAGE] by [Warrior Units|WARRIOR], and even seized permanently, although the output of [Occupied|OCCUPIED] Structures is greatly diminished.
Translation: [建筑|STRUCTURE]可以由被[训练|TRAIN]成特殊[职业|PROFESSION]、具备建造能力的[氏族|CLAN]建造（例如[FARMER]、[MINER]）。敌方[建筑|STRUCTURE]可以被[战士单位|WARRIOR][劫掠|PILLAGE]，甚至永久夺取，尽管[占领|OCCUPIED]建筑的产出会大幅降低。

Original:
[SURVEYOR:S] can [Construct|CONSTRUCT] Paths in order to negate the [Movement|MOVE-POINT] penalty associated with rough [Terrain|TERRAIN] like [HILL:S] and [Forests|FOREST].

 Note that for an [Army|ARMY] to receive this Movement bonus both the [Tile|TILE] it's moving from [COLOR:EMPHASIS]and[/COLOR] the one being entered must contain a Path - simply moving onto or off of one has no effect.
Translation: [SURVEYOR:S]可以[建造|CONSTRUCT]小径，以抵消[HILL:S]和[森林|FOREST]等崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]带来的[移动|MOVE-POINT]惩罚。注意，要让[军队|ARMY]获得这个移动加成，它出发的[地块|TILE][COLOR:EMPHASIS]和[/COLOR]进入的地块都必须有小径；单纯移动到小径上或从小径上离开都没有效果。

Original: \n [TIMBER] [Structures|STRUCTURE] are also useful, but it usually makes sense to [Train|TRAIN] one or two [Foragers|FORAGE] first, as this allows your economy to get off the ground without committing you too far in any direction. Investing heavily in [Structures|STRUCTURE] can make sense when you start in or near a large [Forest|FOREST].\n
Translation: [TIMBER][建筑|STRUCTURE]也很有用，但通常先[训练|TRAIN]一两个[采集者|FORAGE]更合理，因为这样能让经济启动，而不会过早把你锁定在某个方向。若你开局在大片[森林|FOREST]中或附近，大量投资[建筑|STRUCTURE]也可能合理。

Original: \n [Unmounted|INFANTRY] [Bandits|BANDIT] are are easily driven off due to their low [Morale|MORALE], but can still pose a threat to undefended [Structures|STRUCTURE] and [Civilians|CIVILIAN].\n
Translation: [徒步|INFANTRY][强盗|BANDIT]因为[士气|MORALE]低，很容易被赶走，但仍会威胁无人防守的[建筑|STRUCTURE]和[平民|CIVILIAN]。

Original:
[Warrior Units|WARRIOR] have a few important stats.

 First is [Power|POWER], which is a general metric of how strong a [Unit|UNIT] is in combat. In general, one Unit or [Stack of Units|STACK] with double the [Power|POWER] of another will beat up their foe but not quite kill them. Defenders can receive bonuses for the [Terrain|TERRAIN] they're on, or for having Dug In over multiple turns.
Translation: [战士单位|WARRIOR]有几项重要属性。首先是[战力|POWER]，它是衡量[单位|UNIT]战斗强度的总体指标。一般来说，一个[单位编队|STACK]或单个单位若拥有另一方两倍的[战力|POWER]，就能痛击敌人，但未必能杀死对方。防御者可以从所在[地形|TERRAIN]获得加成，或通过多回合掘壕固守获得加成。

Original:
A [Clan|CLAN]'s [Mood|MOOD] is determined by 2 things: its [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT], and whether its [Desire|DESIRE] has been satisfied (when it has one).

 Happy [Clans|CLAN] receive [Resource Production|PRODUCE] and combat bonuses, while unhappy Clans suffer the opposite. Most Clans will simply be content, and require no attention.
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]的[心情|MOOD]由两件事决定：其[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]，以及其[愿望|DESIRE]是否得到满足（如果有愿望的话）。快乐的[氏族|CLAN]会获得[资源产出|PRODUCE]和战斗加成，不快乐的氏族则相反。大多数氏族只会处于满足状态，不需要额外关注。

Original:
A [Unit|UNIT] is simply a [Clan|CLAN] which has been [Trained|TRAIN] in an [Active Profession|ACTIVE] and now capable of [Moving|MOVE-POINT] around on the map. Multiple [Units|UNIT] can be grouped together into [Stacks|STACK].

 [Warrior Units|WARRIOR] can fight and capture [Civilian Units|CIVILIAN], which are defenseless and focused on economic activities like [Harvesting Resources|HARVEST]. Warriors can also capture or [Pillage|PILLAGE] enemy [Structures|STRUCTURE].
Translation: [单位|UNIT]就是已经被[训练|TRAIN]成[主动职业|ACTIVE]、现在能够在地图上[移动|MOVE-POINT]的[氏族|CLAN]。多个[单位|UNIT]可以组合成[编队|STACK]。[战士单位|WARRIOR]可以战斗并俘获无防御、专注于[采集资源|HARVEST]等经济活动的[平民单位|CIVILIAN]。战士也可以占领或[劫掠|PILLAGE]敌方[建筑|STRUCTURE]。

Original: \n A big part of AtG is continually finding and [Harvesting|HARVEST] new [Deposits|DEPOSIT] - this isn't a game where you can just sit back, relax and expect a happy ending. Always be on the lookout for new opportunities!\n
Translation: AtG 的很大一部分内容，就是不断寻找并[采集|HARVEST]新的[矿藏|DEPOSIT]；这不是一款可以坐下来放松、期待幸福结局的游戏。永远留意新的机会！

Original: \n A few of the especially-fancy tooltips like those for [Professions|PROFESSION] can be customized - right from within the tooltip itself. Sections can be collapsed or even (almost) hidden completely, if say, you're already familiar with the basic descriptions for everything and just want to see the cold, hard numbers.\n
Translation: 一些特别精致的提示框，例如[职业|PROFESSION]提示框，可以直接在提示框内部自定义。各部分可以折叠，甚至（几乎）完全隐藏；比如当你已经熟悉所有基础说明，只想查看冷冰冰的数字时就很有用。

Original: \n A pleasure to meet you. I hope that our interactions will be mutually beneficial.\n
Translation: 很高兴见到你。我希望我们的往来能互惠互利。

Original: \n A pleasure to see you again. I've brought you a gift as a token of our friendship which I hope you'll accept.\n
Translation: 很高兴再次见到你。我带来一份礼物，作为我们友谊的象征，希望你能接受。

Original: \n A Tile contains one or more types of [Terrain|TERRAIN], and this combination determines how difficult it is to [Move|MOVE-POINT] into, how much [Supply|SUPPLY] it provides [Units|UNIT], and which types of [Resources|RESOURCE] and [Deposits|DEPOSIT] can appear there.\n
Translation: 一个地块包含一种或多种[地形|TERRAIN]，这些组合决定[移动|MOVE-POINT]进入该地块有多困难、它为[单位|UNIT]提供多少[补给|SUPPLY]，以及哪些类型的[资源|RESOURCE]和[矿藏|DEPOSIT]可能出现。

Original:
A Tile's [Terrain|TERRAIN] can change as the [Seasons|SEASON] come and go, and things can get pretty bad in the [Winter|COLD] depending on how far north you are. Very few sources of [FOOD] can continue being [Harvested|HARVEST] during the [Cold Months|COLD], so be prepared!

 It is also possible for bad [Weather|WEATHER] to randomly afflict Tiles, decreasing the [Supply|SUPPLY] they provide or even shutting down [Movement|MOVE-POINT] and the [Harvesting of Resources|HARVEST] (e.g. Flooding after Rain).
Translation: 随着[季节|SEASON]更替，地块的[地形|TERRAIN]会发生变化；根据你所在纬度，到了[冬季|COLD]情况可能会很糟。很少有[FOOD]来源能在[寒冷月份|COLD]继续被[采集|HARVEST]，所以务必做好准备！恶劣[天气|WEATHER]也可能随机影响地块，降低其提供的[补给|SUPPLY]，甚至阻止[移动|MOVE-POINT]和[资源采集|HARVEST]（例如降雨后的洪水）。

Original: \n A wise choice. I'll let you know what I have other matters for you to attend to.\n
Translation: 明智的选择。等我还有其他事要你处理时，会通知你的。

Original: \n After a few years you'll be able to start creating [STONE-BLOCKS] (or purchase them from [Caravans|CARAVAN]), which will allow you to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] permanent [Structures|STRUCTURE], which are extremely valuable because they not only [Produce|PRODUCE] a great deal of [Resources|RESOURCE], but they also never [Degrade|DEGRADE].\n
Translation: 几年后，你将能够开始制造[STONE-BLOCKS]（或从[商队|CARAVAN]购买），从而[建造|CONSTRUCT]永久性[建筑|STRUCTURE]。它们极其宝贵，因为不仅能[产出|PRODUCE]大量[资源|RESOURCE]，而且永远不会[损耗|DEGRADE]。

Original:
After you've developed your economy a bit and found a region with several [Deposits|DEPOSIT] you'd like to [Harvest|HARVEST] forever you can use the ['Found Kingdom'|DECLARE-KINGDOM] command in the [Clans|CLAN] Screen.

 This permanently glues your [SETTLEMENT] to whatever Tile it's currently on, but provides it a large increase in its [Control Level|CONTROL] ([Borders|BORDERS]) and you a large boost in [FAME] (helping you acquire new [Clans|CLAN] faster).
Translation: 当你稍微发展经济，并找到一个拥有多个[矿藏|DEPOSIT]、希望长期[采集|HARVEST]的地区后，可以在[氏族|CLAN]界面使用[“建立王国”|DECLARE-KINGDOM]命令。这会把你的[SETTLEMENT]永久固定在当前所在的地块上，但会大幅提高其[控制等级|CONTROL]（[边境|BORDERS]），并大幅提高你的[FAME]（帮助你更快获得新[氏族|CLAN]）。

Original: \n Agreeable Leaders are likely to see the good sides of people and opportunities, rather than the risks or dangers.
Translation: 随和的领袖更容易看到他人与机会的好处，而不是风险或危险。

Original: \n Ah, unexpected but appreciated. Thank you.\n
Translation: 啊，虽出乎意料，但我很感激。谢谢你。

Original:
Alcohol is [Produced|PRODUCE] from [GRAPES], [HONEY], [BARLEY], and [WHEAT]. It can be used in a few ways:

 [*]Traded to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] in exchange for other [Resources|RESOURCE].
 [*]Spent to temporarily increase the [Mood|MOOD] of a Clan (button appears on the Clan Card).
 [*]Spent to [Train|TRAIN] Clans in a couple [Professions|PROFESSION] (such as [FEAST-MASTER]).
Translation: 酒由[GRAPES]、[HONEY]、[BARLEY]和[WHEAT][产出|PRODUCE]。它有几种用途：[*]与[商队|CARAVAN]交易，换取其他[资源|RESOURCE]。[*]花费用于暂时提高一个氏族的[心情|MOOD]（按钮显示在氏族卡片上）。[*]花费用于[训练|TRAIN]氏族成为少数[职业|PROFESSION]（例如[FEAST-MASTER]）。

Original:
Along the way you'll want to do your best to keep the [Leaders|LEADER] of neighboring [Factions|FACTION] happy, as they can also be very strong and dangerous if annoyed. They all vary dramatically in strength and aren't competing with you for [Victory|WINNING], but their [Personalities|LEADER-TRAIT] are all very unique and you really don't want to accidentally make the wrong enemies!

 On the plus side, these [Leaders|LEADER] aren't trying to accomplish the same thing as you, but merely compete for dominance amongst themselves.
