Translation: 在此过程中，你最好尽力让邻近[派系|FACTION]的[领袖|LEADER]保持高兴，因为如果惹恼他们，他们也可能非常强大而危险。他们的实力差异巨大，也不会与你争夺[胜利|WINNING]，但他们的[个性|LEADER-TRAIT]都非常独特，你绝对不想意外树错敌人！好的一面是，这些[领袖|LEADER]并不试图达成和你相同的目标，只是在彼此之间争夺支配地位。

Original:
Also be mindful of positioning.

 Being on a [Forest|FOREST] or [HILL] helps the defender, while being on a [River|RIVER] or [MARSH] hurts them.

 The only exception is [Tiles|TILE] containing [CITY:S] or [SETTLEMENT:S], which always provide a large [Defense|DEFENSE] bonus.
Translation: 也要注意站位。位于[森林|FOREST]或[HILL]上有利于防御者，位于[河流|RIVER]或[MARSH]上则不利。唯一例外是含有[CITY:S]或[SETTLEMENT:S]的[地块|TILE]，它们总会提供大量[防御|DEFENSE]加成。

Original: \n Ambitious Leaders aim for the stars, and are inclined to take chances in order to achieve great success.
Translation: 野心勃勃的领袖志向远大，愿意冒险以取得巨大成功。

Original:
An [Army|ARMY] can be without [Supply|SUPPLY] for 1 [Turn|TURN] without consequences, but it will suffer [Damage|DAMAGE] and lose [Morale|MORALE] at the end of every subsequent [Turn|TURN].

 This is normally not an issue during the warm months of th eyear, but during winter make sure to keep a close eye on your Supply.
Translation: [军队|ARMY]可以在没有[补给|SUPPLY]的情况下维持 1 [回合|TURN]而不受惩罚，但之后每个[回合|TURN]结束时都会受到[伤害|DAMAGE]并失去[士气|MORALE]。这在温暖月份通常不是问题，但冬季一定要密切关注补给。

Original:
An enemy [Army|ARMY] is within attack range!

 When on offense, your goal is to reduce the defender's [Morale|MORALE] to 0. This causes them to [Retreat|RETREAT] to an adjacent [Tile|TILE], and inflicts a significant amount of [Damage|DAMAGE] on them.
Translation: 敌方[军队|ARMY]位于攻击范围内！进攻时，你的目标是把防御者的[士气|MORALE]降到 0。这会使其[撤退|RETREAT]到相邻[地块|TILE]，并对其造成大量[伤害|DAMAGE]。

Original: \n Another important factor to consider in warfare is [Supply|SUPPLY]. Each Tile provides a certain amount automatically which drops during the [Winter|COLD], and when without Supply for more than one turn a [Unit|UNIT] will lose [Morale|MORALE] and [Health|HEALTH]. [Encamping|ENCAMP] temporarily provides a Unit with [Supply|SUPPLY], but makes it extremely vulnerable to attack, so plan your campaigns carefully!\n
Translation: 战争中另一个需要考虑的重要因素是[补给|SUPPLY]。每个地块会自动提供一定补给，并在[冬季|COLD]下降；如果超过一回合没有补给，[单位|UNIT]会失去[士气|MORALE]和[生命值|HEALTH]。[扎营|ENCAMP]会暂时为单位提供[补给|SUPPLY]，但会使其极易受到攻击，所以要谨慎规划战役！

Original:
Another unique feature of your [SETTLEMENT] compared with cities in other games is that it can [Pack Up|PACKED] and move around the map - something that will become necessary as you eventually use up the [Resources|RESOURCE] near your starting location and need access to more.

 Relocating should be a careful, strategic decision though, as [Packing Up|PACKED] prevents your [SETTLEMENT] from being able to [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN].
Translation: 与其他游戏中的城市相比，你的[SETTLEMENT]另一个独特之处是它可以[打包|PACKED]并在地图上移动。当你最终用尽起始位置附近的[资源|RESOURCE]、需要接触更多资源时，这会变得必要。不过迁移应当是谨慎的战略决策，因为[打包|PACKED]会使你的[SETTLEMENT]无法[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]。

Original: \n Another way to increase [Resource Production|PRODUCE] is by [Training|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in 'synergy' [Professions|PROFESSION] which boost the output of other Clans (e.g. Bread Maker). You can also improve individual Clans by [Researching]|STUDY] and then [purchasing Profession-based Upgrades|UPGRADE] (using a button that appears on the [Clan|CLAN] Card).\n
Translation: 提高[资源产出|PRODUCE]的另一种方式，是将[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成能提升其他氏族产出的“协同”[职业|PROFESSION]（例如面包师）。你也可以通过[Researching]|STUDY]并[购买基于职业的升级|UPGRADE]来强化单个氏族（按钮会出现在[氏族|CLAN]卡片上）。

Original:
Anvil Makers triple your [Production|PRODUCE] of [TOOLS] and [WEAPONS].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS], and they consume [COAL] each turn.
Translation: 铁砧匠会使你的[TOOLS]和[WEAPONS][产出|PRODUCE]变为三倍。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]，并且每回合会消耗[COAL]。

Original:
Any hotkey which opens a screen may also be used to close it (e.g. pressing spacebar will both open and close the [Clans|CLAN] Screen).

 You can turn on or off the map grid or change the thickness of the gridlines by pressing 'G'.
Translation: 任何用于打开界面的快捷键，也可以用于关闭该界面（例如按空格键既能打开也能关闭[氏族|CLAN]界面）。你可以按“G”开启或关闭地图网格，或改变网格线粗细。

Original:
Any text which has a red drop shadow may be moused over to reveal additional information.

 Any user interface element that is gold-colored is clickable. Sometimes mousing over something in the UI will cause buttons to apepar.

 Some of the more advanced tooltips in the game (such as those for [Professions|PROFESSSION] can be customized. Clicking on the thin gold bars allows you to expand hidden sections, and the buttons in the upper-right corner of a section allow you to minimize or hide it.
Translation: 任何带有红色投影的文本都可以用鼠标悬停查看额外信息。任何金色用户界面元素都可以点击。有时鼠标悬停在界面元素上会使按钮出现。游戏中一些更高级的提示框（例如[职业|PROFESSSION]提示框）可以自定义。点击细金条可以展开隐藏部分，而某个部分右上角的按钮可以最小化或隐藏它。

Original:
Any time you click on something on the map its details and any associated actions will appear in the lower-left corner of the screen.

 Mousing over a [Tile|TILE] on the map will cause its details to appear both over the [Tile|TILE] itself and in the lower-right corner of the screen.
Translation: 每当你点击地图上的某个东西，它的详细信息以及相关行动都会显示在屏幕左下角。把鼠标移到地图上的[地块|TILE]上时，其详细信息会同时显示在[地块|TILE]本身上方和屏幕右下角。

Original: \n Architects increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of all advanced [Structures|STRUCTURE] built from [STONE-BLOCKS].\n
Translation: 建筑师会提高所有用[STONE-BLOCKS]建成的高级[建筑|STRUCTURE]的[产出|PRODUCE]。

Original:
Armor can be used to [Train|TRAIN] advanced [Infantry|INFANTRY] and [Cavalry|CAVALRY], and is required by some advanced [Upgrades|UPGRADE].

 Armor is forged from [IRON] by an [ARMORSMITH].
Translation: 盔甲可用于[训练|TRAIN]高级[步兵|INFANTRY]和[骑兵|CAVALRY]，也是部分高级[升级|UPGRADE]的需求。盔甲由[ARMORSMITH]使用[IRON]锻造。
盔甲匠会用[IRON][产出|PRODUCE][ARMOR]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
As your Fame grows new [Clans|CLAN] hear of your deeds and join your tribe.

 With each Clan that joins fewer remain who are interested in your leadership, and the rate new Clans arrive will slow down considerably.

 You start the game [Producing|PRODUCE] 4 Fame per [Turn|TURN], but this number can be increased dramatically by [Training|TRAIN] Clans in [Professions|PROFESSION] that [Produce|PRODUCE] Fame, like the [BARD], [FEAST-MASTER], and [WOODCARVER]. [Declaring a Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM] provides a massive boost to Fame, but fixes your [SETTLEMENT] in place, and is an option that should be avoided during the first few years of the game.
Translation: 随着你的名声增长，新的[氏族|CLAN]会听闻你的事迹并加入部族。每有一个氏族加入，愿意追随你领导的人就会减少，新氏族抵达的速度也会明显放缓。游戏开始时你每[回合|TURN][产出|PRODUCE] 4 点名声，但可以通过将氏族[训练|TRAIN]为[BARD]、[FEAST-MASTER]、[WOODCARVER]等能[产出|PRODUCE]名声的[职业|PROFESSION]来大幅提高。[宣布建国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]会大幅提高名声，但会让你的[SETTLEMENT]固定在原地，因此在游戏最初几年应避免这样做。

Original:
As your Prestige grows you will acquire diplomatic [Emissaries|EMISSARY].
 
 You automatically produce a small amount of Prestige each turn (unless you play as Drest of the Picts). You can acquire more by [Training|TRAIN] Clans in the [CONSUL] [Profession|PROFESSION].
Translation: 随着你的威望增长，你会获得外交[使者|EMISSARY]。你每回合会自动产出少量威望（除非你扮演皮克特人的 Drest）。你可以通过把氏族[训练|TRAIN]成[CONSUL][职业|PROFESSION]来获得更多威望。

Original: \n Ascetic Leaders care nothing for the material goods of this world, and have no need of gifts.
Translation: 禁欲的领袖不在意世俗物质，也不需要礼物。

Original:
At the Gates has the coolest tooltips of any game ever made, so be sure to make use of them!

 Move the mouse cursor over a highlighted word anywhere in the game and you can learn more - even from within other tooltips.
Translation: 《At the Gates》拥有有史以来最酷的提示框，所以一定要好好利用它们！把鼠标移到游戏中任何高亮词语上，就能了解更多，甚至可以在其他提示框内部继续这样做。

Original:
At the Gates is a [turn-based|TURN] strategy game similar to other 4X games (e.g. Civilization). The 3 biggest differences are:

 [*] You only ever own one 'city', your [SETTLEMENT].

 [*] You'll spend more time managing [Resources|RESOURCE] and characters ([Clans|CLAN]).

 [*] AtG is generally more unpredictable and 'roguelike' than other 4X games.
Translation: 《At the Gates》是一款类似其他 4X 游戏（例如《文明》）的[回合制|TURN]战略游戏。三大差异是：[*]你永远只拥有一座“城市”，也就是你的[SETTLEMENT]。[*]你会花更多时间管理[资源|RESOURCE]和角色（[氏族|CLAN]）。[*]AtG 通常比其他 4X 游戏更不可预测，也更“Roguelike”。

Original:
At the Gates is a hard, slow game. Accomplishing things will take time, and although the early game is often difficult you will eventually build a powerful kingdom.

 Click the button on the next screen to continue learning more about the basics of AtG.

 Want to go it alone? Feel free to skip these tips and read any of them later in the Help Screen (hotkey: [HOTKEY:?]).
Translation: 《At the Gates》是一款困难而慢节奏的游戏。完成事情需要时间，虽然早期游戏往往很艰难，但你最终会建立一个强大的王国。点击下一屏幕上的按钮，继续了解 AtG 的基础。想独自摸索？你可以跳过这些提示，之后随时在帮助界面中阅读它们（快捷键：[HOTKEY:?]）。

Original: \n AtG's tooltips are the game's most powerful tool for learning how to play. Simply move your mouse over any EMPHASISed word in the game and it will create a new tooltip explaining the concept - even from within other tooltips!\n
Translation: AtG 的提示框是学习玩法最强大的工具。只需把鼠标移到游戏中任何强调词语上，就会生成新的提示框解释该概念，甚至可以从其他提示框内部继续这样做！

Original: \n Back again, it seems. I see now that your words mean nothing.\n
Translation: 看来你又回来了。现在我明白了，你的话毫无分量。

Original:
Bakers greatly increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [WHEAT] and [BARLEY].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STONE-BLOCKS], and they consume [COAL] each turn.
Translation: 烘焙师会大幅提高你的[WHEAT]和[BARLEY][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STONE-BLOCKS]，并且他们每回合会消耗[COAL]。

Original: \n Bandit Raiders are weaker than the [LIGHT-CAVALRY:S] you can [Train|TRAINING], but still fast and dangerous. They are especially a threat to undefended [Structures|STRUCTURE], which they can [Pillage|PILLAGE] more quickly than [Infantry|INFANTRY].\n
Translation: 强盗骑手比你可以[训练|TRAINING]的[LIGHT-CAVALRY:S]更弱，但依然快速而危险。他们尤其会威胁无人防守的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，而且能比[步兵|INFANTRY]更快地[劫掠|PILLAGE]。

Original: \n Bandits aren't very smart, but they're reckless brutes who love killing and plundering. Make sure you protect your defenseless [Structures|STRUCTURE] and [Civilians|CIVILIAN] from them!\n
Translation: 强盗不太聪明，但他们是鲁莽的恶徒，热衷杀戮和掠夺。务必保护好无人防守的[建筑|STRUCTURE]和[平民|CIVILIAN]！

Original:
Barley is automatically converted into [FOOD] when your tribe has nothing else to eat.

 A better use though is converting Barley into [ALCOHOL] with an [ALE-MAKER].
Translation: 当你的部族没有其他东西可吃时，大麦会自动转化为[FOOD]。不过更好的用途是让[ALE-MAKER]把大麦转化为[ALCOHOL]。

Original:
Battles between two [Armies|ARMY] with equal [Power|POWER] are usually won by the defender, so always try to outnumber your enemy.

 Attacking [Armies|ARMY] take much more [Damage|DAMAGE] than defenders, which unlike [Morale|MORALE] does not automatically regenerate. Before striking, make sure you're strong enough to punch through and drive the enemy back!
Translation: 两个[军队|ARMY]若[战力|POWER]相等，战斗通常由防御者获胜，所以始终尽量在数量上压倒敌人。进攻[军队|ARMY]受到的[伤害|DAMAGE]远多于防御者，而伤害不同于[士气|MORALE]，不会自动恢复。攻击前，确保你足够强大，能够突破并击退敌人！

Original: \n Be aware that I'll have my eye on you going forward.\n
Translation: 记住，从今以后我会盯着你。

Original:
Be wary though, as an Occupied [CITY] or [SETTLEMENT] will revert to its original owner at the end of your [Turn|TURN] if left unguarded.

 Holding significant chunks of enemy territory for more than a few [Turns|TURN] is a major investment, and usually not worth the cost!
Translation: 但要小心，如果被占领的[CITY]或[SETTLEMENT]无人驻守，它会在你的[回合|TURN]结束时归还给原主人。占据大片敌方领土超过几个[回合|TURN]是重大投入，通常不值得！

Original:
Because AtG is still in development, full diplomacy has not yet been implemented. You can't make agreements with other kingdoms, and they won't yet declare war on you, though other Leaders will say hello from time to time.

 That said, this doesn't mean YOU can't declare war though! Feel free to do so in the Diplomacy Screen ([HOTKEY:Ctrl-D]) if you're itching for a fight.
Translation: 因为 AtG 仍在开发中，完整外交尚未实现。你不能与其他王国达成协议，他们也还不会向你宣战，不过其他领袖会不时来打招呼。话虽如此，这并不意味着你不能宣战！如果你渴望战斗，可以在外交界面（[HOTKEY:Ctrl-D]）随意这么做。

Original: \n Because of your primitive level of technology any time you [Harvest|HARVEST] a [Resource|RESOURCE] it will slowly [Degrade|DEGRADE] and eventually run out completely. Once the [Resources|RESOURCE] in an area (especially sources of [FOOD]) are sufficiently exhausted you'll need to migrate somewhere else.\n
Translation: 由于你的技术水平原始，每当你[采集|HARVEST]一种[资源|RESOURCE]时，它都会慢慢[损耗|DEGRADE]并最终彻底耗尽。一旦某个区域的[资源|RESOURCE]（尤其是[FOOD]来源）充分耗尽，你就需要迁移到别处。

Original:
Because one of your early priorities is exploring your immediate surroundings training a [Clan|CLAN] as an [EXPLORER] might be wise.

 Ideally you want to pick a [Clan|CLAN] already in the [DISCOVERY] [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], as this will reduce the number of [Turns|TURN] needed to [Train|TRAIN] it!
Translation: 由于早期优先事项之一是探索周边区域，把一个[氏族|CLAN]训练成[EXPLORER]可能很明智。理想情况下，你会选择一个已经属于[DISCOVERY][学科|DISCIPLINE]的[氏族|CLAN]，因为这会减少[训练|TRAIN]所需的[回合|TURN]数！

Original:
Becoming 'Magister Militum' is one way of winning the game (the other being to capture a Roman capital).

 Doing so requires you to send 5 [Clans|CLAN] to Rome to be [Trained|TRAIN] as [ROMAN-LEGION:S]. Once this force has been assembled in your Settlement you may send them forth, at which point they disappear from the map and one year (24 [Turns|TURN]) later they will arrive, seizing military and political control of Rome and making you the most powerful leader in Europe.
Translation: 成为“军事统帅”是赢得游戏的一种方式（另一种是占领罗马首都）。这要求你派遣 5 个[氏族|CLAN]前往罗马，接受[训练|TRAIN]成为[ROMAN-LEGION:S]。当这支力量在你的定居点集结完成后，你可以派他们出发；届时他们会从地图上消失，并在一年后（24 [回合|TURN]）抵达，夺取罗马的军事和政治控制权，使你成为欧洲最强大的领袖。

Original:
Beekeepers increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [HONEY].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TIMBER].
Translation: 养蜂人会提高你的[HONEY][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TIMBER]。

Original: \n Belligerent Leaders are more likely to make [Demands|DEMAND], and less likely to give gifts and generally be nice to deal with.
Translation: 好战的领袖更可能提出[要求|DEMAND]，较少赠送礼物，通常也不太好打交道。

Original: \n Benevolent Leaders generally go easy on defeated foes, and are more likely to shrug off betrayal.
Translation: 仁慈的领袖通常会宽待战败敌人，也更可能对背叛一笑置之。

Original:
Blacksmiths [Produce|PRODUCE] [TOOLS] from [IRON].

 [Harvesting|HARVEST] [IRON] with a [DIGGER] and then having a Blacksmith make Tools from it can be a good way to get your economy off the ground in the early game.
Translation: 铁匠会用[IRON][产出|PRODUCE][TOOLS]。先用[DIGGER][采集|HARVEST][IRON]，再让铁匠把铁制成工具，是游戏早期启动经济的好办法。

Original:
Bladesmiths [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [WEAPONS] from [IRON].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 刀匠会用[IRON][产出|PRODUCE]大量[WEAPONS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Blizzards are a temporary [Weather|WEATHER]-based [Terrain|TERRAIN] type which can be added to a [Tile|TILE].

 [*]Tiles with a Blizzard cannot be entered or left.
 [*]Provides NO [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].
 [*]Greatly increases the [Vision|VISION] cost to see into and out of.
Translation: 暴风雪是一种临时的、基于[天气|WEATHER]的[地形|TERRAIN]，可以添加到[地块|TILE]上。[*]带有暴风雪的地块无法进入或离开。[*]不会为[单位|UNIT]提供[补给|SUPPLY]。[*]大幅增加看入和看出该地块所需的[视野|VISION]消耗。
石块切割工会用[STONE][产出|PRODUCE][STONE-BLOCKS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Boards are created from [TIMBER] by [WOODSPLITTER:S], and can be used in a few ways:

 [*]Spent to add [Apprentice Slots|APPRENTICE] to advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based [Structures|STRUCTURE].
 [*]Spent to acquire some [Profession|PROFESSION] [Upgrades|UPGRADE].
 [*]Used to build [GALLEY:S] and [CATAPULT:S] in the late game.
Translation: 木板由[WOODSPLITTER:S]使用[TIMBER]制造，可用于几种用途：[*]花费它为高级[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR][建筑|STRUCTURE]添加[学徒槽位|APPRENTICE]。[*]花费用于获得部分[职业|PROFESSION][升级|UPGRADE]。[*]在游戏后期用于建造[GALLEY:S]和[CATAPULT:S]。

Original:
Bread Makers increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [WHEAT] and [BARLEY].

 [Training|TRAIN] them is free, but they consume [TIMBER] each turn.
Translation: 面包师会提高你的[WHEAT]和[BARLEY][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们免费，但他们每回合会消耗[TIMBER]。

Original:
Brewers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [ALCOHOL] from [BARLEY] or [WHEAT].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 啤酒酿造师会用[BARLEY]或[WHEAT][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[ALCOHOL]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。
制砖工会用[COAL][产出|PRODUCE][STONE-BLOCKS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Briners use [SALT] to turn [FOOD] into a much larger amount of [FOOD].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 腌制工会用[SALT]把[FOOD]转化为更多[FOOD]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Brush is a [Terrain|TERRAIN] obstacle which contains no useful [Resources|RESOURCE].

 [*]Costs 1 additional [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Reduces the [Supply|SUPPLY] available to [Units|UNIT] by 1.
 [*]Grants a 10% [Defense|DEFENSE] bonus.
 [*]Require 1 additional [Vision|VISION] to see through (unless standing on a nearby [HILL]).

 Brush should not be confused with [Forests|FOREST], which are much harder to move through but contain [Harvestable|HARVEST] [TIMBER].
Translation: 灌木丛是一种不含有用[资源|RESOURCE]的[地形|TERRAIN]障碍。[*]进入时额外消耗 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]使[单位|UNIT]可用[补给|SUPPLY]减少 1。[*]提供 10% [防御|DEFENSE]加成。[*]需要额外 1 点[视野|VISION]才能看穿（除非站在附近的[HILL]上）。不要把灌木丛与[森林|FOREST]混淆；森林更难穿越，但含有可[采集|HARVEST]的[TIMBER]。

Original:
Butchers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [MEAT] from [Animals|ANIMAL] added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Pasture|PASTURE] on them.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 屠夫会从通过在[动物|ANIMAL]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][牧场|PASTURE]而加入你[库存|STOCKPILE]的动物中[产出|PRODUCE]巨量[MEAT]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original: \n Calm Leaders can be firm, but generally oppose violence and argument.
Translation: 冷静的领袖可以很坚定，但通常反对暴力和争吵。

Original: \n Cataphracts are unmatched on the battlefield, but extremely expensive to [Train|TRAIN] and less effective in rough [Terrain|TERRAIN]. The bulky armor they wear makes them no faster than [Infantry|INFANTRY], but woe to any foe which stands and fights!\n
Translation: 具装骑兵在战场上无可匹敌，但[训练|TRAIN]极其昂贵，并且在崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]中效果较差。他们身穿厚重铠甲，速度并不比[步兵|INFANTRY]快；但任何胆敢正面迎战的敌人都要遭殃！

Original:
Catapulters are highly specialized [Units|UNIT] which excel in weakening [Dug In|DIG-IN] enemies [Armies|ARMY] by reducing their [Supply|SUPPLY]. However, they are slow, vulnerable and expensive.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [BOARDS] and [STEEL].
Translation: 投石机手是高度专门化的[单位|UNIT]，擅长通过降低[补给|SUPPLY]来削弱[掘壕固守|DIG-IN]的敌方[军队|ARMY]。不过，他们移动缓慢、脆弱且昂贵。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[BOARDS]和[STEEL]。

Original:
Cattle can be used in the same way as other [Animals|ANIMAL].

 1 [CATTLE:SINGULAR] from your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] is automatically turned into 5 [FOOD] if the Tribe is starving.
Translation: 牛可以像其他[动物|ANIMAL]一样使用。如果部族正在挨饿，你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的 1 头[CATTLE:SINGULAR]会自动转化为 5 [FOOD]。

Original: \n Cautious Leaders don't make rash decisions, and generally try not to rock the boat when it comes to diplomacy.
Translation: 谨慎的领袖不会轻率决策，在外交上通常会尽量避免惹事。

Original:
Cheesemakers [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [CHEESE], the quantity being based on the number of [CATTLE] and [SHEEP] added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Pasture|PASTURE] on them.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [BOARDS], and they consume [SALT] each turn.
Translation: 奶酪师会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[CHEESE]，数量取决于你通过在[CATTLE]和[SHEEP]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][牧场|PASTURE]而加入[库存|STOCKPILE]的数量。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[BOARDS]，并且每回合会消耗[SALT]。

Original:
Clan, tile, and game notes.

 Press [HOTKEY:Ctrl] to see the date and turn number.
Translation: 氏族、地块和游戏备注。按 [HOTKEY:Ctrl] 查看日期和回合数。

Original:
Clerics [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [KNOWLEDGE], helping you [Learn|LEARN] new [Professions|PROFESSION] faster.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [FINE-CLOTH], [OIL], and that a [Clan|CLAN] has been [Ennobled|NOBLE].
Translation: 教士会[产出|PRODUCE]巨量[KNOWLEDGE]，帮助你更快[学习|LEARN]新的[职业|PROFESSION]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[FINE-CLOTH]、[OIL]，并且需要一个[氏族|CLAN]已被[晋封贵族|NOBLE]。

Original:
Click on [Clan|CLAN] Relindis to the right, and then choose the [HUNTER] [Profession|PROFESSION] to start [Training|TRAIN] Relindis in it. Unlike other [Clans|CLAN] they start in the [HONOR] [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] so this will take much less time than ususal.

 Close the Clans Screen, then look at the map around your [SETTLEMENT].
Translation: 点击右侧的[氏族|CLAN] Relindis，然后选择[HUNTER][职业|PROFESSION]，开始将 Relindis [训练|TRAIN]成猎人。与其他[氏族|CLAN]不同，他们一开始就在[HONOR][学科|DISCIPLINE]中，因此所需时间会比平常短得多。关闭氏族界面，然后查看你[SETTLEMENT]周围的地图。

Original:
Click on [DISCOVERY] to start [Studying|STUDY] it. This will take one turn, and once finished you'll be able to start Studying new [Professions|PROFESSION] within the [DISCOVERY] [Discipline|DISCIPLINE].

 Starting with Discovery is often smart, as this also will allow you to [Train|TRAIN] an [EXPLORER] more quickly and get a head start on identifying nearby opportunities and threats.

 After you close the Research Screen press the button which says 'Finish Turn'.
Translation: 点击[DISCOVERY]开始[研究|STUDY]它。这会花费一回合，完成后你将能开始研究[DISCOVERY][学科|DISCIPLINE]中的新[职业|PROFESSION]。从发现开始通常很明智，因为这也能让你更快[训练|TRAIN][EXPLORER]，并更早识别附近的机会和威胁。关闭研究界面后，按下写着“结束回合”的按钮。

Original:
Click on the button in the lower-left to toggle how many [Professions|PROFESSION] are shown. By default, you only see those which you can [Study|STUDY] right now.

 Once there are more [Professions|PROFESSION] available than can fit on the screen you can scroll through them with the mouse wheel, the arrow keys, or [HOTKEY:W]/[HOTKEY:S].
Translation: 点击左下角按钮可以切换显示多少[职业|PROFESSION]。默认情况下，你只会看到当前可以[研究|STUDY]的职业。当可用[职业|PROFESSION]多到屏幕放不下时，你可以用鼠标滚轮、方向键或 [HOTKEY:W]/[HOTKEY:S] 滚动浏览。

Original:
Click on the button in the lower-left to toggle how many [Professions|PROFESSION] are shown. By default, you only see those which you can [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] in right now.

 Once there are more [Professions|PROFESSION] available than can fit on the screen you can scroll through them with the mouse wheel, the arrow keys, or [HOTKEY:W]/[HOTKEY:S].
Translation: 点击左下角按钮可以切换显示多少[职业|PROFESSION]。默认情况下，你只会看到当前可以把[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成的职业。当可用[职业|PROFESSION]多到屏幕放不下时，你可以用鼠标滚轮、方向键或 [HOTKEY:W]/[HOTKEY:S] 滚动浏览。

Original:
Cloth is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Animals|ANIMAL] by [TRAPPER:S] (as Leather) or [Produced|PRODUCE] from [WOOL] or [FLAX] by [WEAVER:S], and can be used in a variety of ways:

 [*]Spent in the Clans Screen to increase your [Clan Limit|POPCAP].
 [*]Spent to acquire some [Profession|PROFESSION] [Upgrades|UPGRADE] (e.g. for [FISHERMAN:S] or [GATHERER:S]).
 [*]Spent to [Train|TRAIN] Clans in some [Professions|PROFESSION] (e.g. [PRIEST], [GALLEY]).
 [*]Spent to [Heal|DAMAGE] wounded [Warriors|WARRIOR] (along with [OIL]).
Translation: 布料由[TRAPPER:S]从[动物|ANIMAL]中[采集|HARVEST]（作为皮革），或由[WEAVER:S]用[WOOL]或[FLAX][产出|PRODUCE]，用途很多：[*]在氏族界面花费以提高你的[氏族上限|POPCAP]。[*]花费用于获得部分[职业|PROFESSION][升级|UPGRADE]（例如[FISHERMAN:S]或[GATHERER:S]）。[*]花费用于[训练|TRAIN]氏族成为部分[职业|PROFESSION]（例如[PRIEST]、[GALLEY]）。[*]与[OIL]一起花费用于[治疗|DAMAGE]受伤的[战士|WARRIOR]。

Original:
Coal is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Mineral Deposits|MINERAL] by [DIGGER:S] or [IRON-MINE-1:S].

 [STEELMAKER:S] can combine Coal with [IRON] to make [STEEL], and Coal is required by a handful of advanced [FOOD]-boosting [Professions|PROFESSION] like the [BAKER].
Translation: 煤由[DIGGER:S]或[IRON-MINE-1:S]从[矿藏|MINERAL]中[采集|HARVEST]。[STEELMAKER:S]可以把煤和[IRON]结合制成[STEEL]；少数提高[FOOD]的高级[职业|PROFESSION]也需要煤，例如[BAKER]。

Original:
Coal Makers create [COAL] from [TIMBER].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STONE-BLOCKS].
Translation: 烧炭工会用[TIMBER]制造[COAL]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STONE-BLOCKS]。

Original:
Coinmakers produce a massive amount of [TREASURE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS], and they consume [COAL] each turn.
Translation: 铸币师会产出巨量[TREASURE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]，并且每回合会消耗[COAL]。

Original: \n Competitive Leaders want to be the best, and will see another strong Leader as a natural rival.\n
Translation: 好胜的领袖想成为最强者，并会把另一个强大领袖视为天然对手。

Original: \n Confident Leaders are generally optimistic and go into everything with a sense that things will work out, be it a war or an offer of friendship.
Translation: 自信的领袖通常乐观，无论是战争还是友好提议，都会带着事情能成的心态去面对。

Original:
Congratulations, you have identified an [Unidentified Deposit|UNIDENTIFIED] as ???!

 You can now have a [Clan|CLAN] [Trained|TRAIN] in the appropriate [Profession|PROFESSION] start [Harvesting|HARVEST] it by [Foraging|FORAGE] or [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] on it.
Translation: 恭喜，你已将一个[未识别矿藏|UNIDENTIFIED]识别为 ???！现在可以让一个被[训练|TRAIN]成合适[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]，通过[采集|FORAGE]或在其上[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]来开始[采集|HARVEST]它。

Original:
Conquering a Roman capital will require locating it on the map and significant military preparation. Although various setbacks will befall the Romans they start off quite strong and can put up quite a fight.

 Becoming Magister Militum is more of an economic victory, as to send a [Clan|CLAN] to [Rome|ROME] not only means sending it off for a year but also providing it with expensive, late-game equipment.
Translation: 征服罗马首都需要先在地图上找到它，并做好大量军事准备。虽然罗马会遭遇各种挫折，但他们开局仍相当强大，也能打出一场硬仗。成为军事统帅更像是一种经济胜利，因为派遣一个[氏族|CLAN]前往[罗马|ROME]不仅意味着让它离开一年，还要为它提供昂贵的后期装备。

Original:
Consuls [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [PRESTIGE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 执政官会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[PRESTIGE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original:
Coopers greatly increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [ALCOHOL] and non-[MEAT] types of [FOOD].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS], and they consume [BOARDS] each turn.
Translation: 箍桶匠会大幅提高你的[ALCOHOL]和非[MEAT]类[FOOD][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]，并且每回合会消耗[BOARDS]。

Original:
Couturiers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [FINE-CLOTH] from [CLOTH].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS] and that a [Clan|CLAN] has been [Ennobled|NOBLE].
Translation: 高级裁缝会用[CLOTH][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[FINE-CLOTH]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]，并且需要一个[氏族|CLAN]已被[晋封贵族|NOBLE]。

Original: \n Cruel Leaders relish opportunities to be vicious and abrasive.
Translation: 残酷的领袖乐于抓住机会表现得恶毒而刻薄。

Original:
Curers use [SALT] to turn [MEAT] into a larger amount of [FOOD].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 腌肉工会用[SALT]把[MEAT]转化为更多[FOOD]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original: \n Cynical Leaders don't believe in much in this world, and aren't inclined to offer anyone the benefit of the doubt.\n
Translation: 犬儒的领袖对世事几乎不抱信念，也不倾向于给任何人善意解释。
永恒的诅咒在等待你的灵魂。

Original: \n Daring Leaders are likely to explore, take a risk, and start a fight, though they don't generally care much about what the end goal is.
Translation: 大胆的领袖喜欢探索、冒险和挑起战斗，虽然他们通常并不太在意最终目标是什么。

Original: \n Decadent Leaders are greedy, especially for gifts and tribute.
Translation: 颓靡的领袖十分贪婪，尤其贪图礼物和贡品。

Original: \n Deceitful Leaders can't be trusted. They'll sometimes honor alliances - and sometimes not.
Translation: 欺诈的领袖不可信。他们有时会遵守同盟，有时则不会。

Original:
Declaring your tribe as a Kingdom permanently fixes your [SETTLEMENT] in place, but offers some significant bonuses in return.

 Because you'll no longer be able to [move|MOVE-POINT] your Settlement after Declaring a Kingdom make sure you're in a good place you can continue to expand from before doing so! As a general rule of thumb you won't want to perform this action during the first few years of the game.
Translation: 宣布你的部族成为王国会让[SETTLEMENT]永久固定在原地，但也会带来显著加成。由于建国后你将无法再[移动|MOVE-POINT]定居点，只有在当前位置适合作为长期首都时才应这样做。

Original: \n Deep Water is a type of [Terrain|TERRAIN] which essentially represents the open ocean, and was not traversable during this time period.\n
Translation: 深水是一种[地形|TERRAIN]，基本代表开阔海洋，在这个时代无法穿越。

Original:
Deer can be eaten as [FOOD] with the help of a [HUNTER], or turned into [PARCHMENT] or [CLOTH] (Leather) by a [TRAPPER].

 Unlike other [Animals|ANIMAL] Deer can only be [Foraged|FORAGE] and not added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] via a [Pasture|PASTURE], making them not quite as useful.
Translation: 鹿可以在[HUNTER]帮助下作为[FOOD]食用，也可以由[TRAPPER]转化为[PARCHMENT]或[CLOTH]（皮革）。与其他[动物|ANIMAL]不同，鹿只能被[采集|FORAGE]，不能通过[牧场|PASTURE]加入你的[库存|STOCKPILE]，因此用途略少。

Original:
Deserts are a flat, inhospitable type of [Terrain|TERRAIN].

 [*]Costs only 1 [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Provides NO [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].

 The Movement Cost of a Desert [Tile|TILE] is modified when it also contains rough Terrain like a [HILL].

 Deserts never contain [Harvestable|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] or any vegetation.
Translation: 沙漠是一种平坦、荒凉的[地形|TERRAIN]。[*]进入只需 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]不会为[单位|UNIT]提供[补给|SUPPLY]。如果沙漠[地块|TILE]还含有[HILL]等崎岖地形，移动消耗会改变。沙漠从不含可[采集|HARVEST]的[资源|RESOURCE]或任何植被。

Original: \n Did you destroy the bandit camp as I requested?\n
Translation: 你按我的要求摧毁强盗营地了吗？

Original:
Diggers can [Harvest|HARVEST] [Mineral|MINERAL] [Resources|RESOURCE] by [Moving|MOVE-POINT] to any [Tile|TILE] containing a Mineral Deposit and [Foraging|FORAGE]. They can also [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-MINERAL:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a Digger can be a good way to make use of nearby Minerals and get your economy off the ground at the start of the game.
Translation: 挖掘者可以通过[移动|MOVE-POINT]到含有矿藏的[地块|TILE]并进行[采集|FORAGE]来[采集|HARVEST][矿物|MINERAL][资源|RESOURCE]。他们还可以[识别|UNIDENTIFIED][DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-MINERAL:S]。游戏初期把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成挖掘者，是利用附近矿物、启动经济的好办法。

Original:
Dredgers increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of your [DIGGER:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 采矿督工会提高你的[DIGGER:S][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original: \n During the first few years of the game you'll be on the lookout for new places to move your [SETTLEMENT] after you've [Exhausted|EXHAUST] the [Resources|RESOURCE] in an area. This isn't necessary during the first year, but it's something to think about after your first [Winter|COLD].\n
Translation: 游戏最初几年，你会在某个区域的[资源|RESOURCE][耗尽|EXHAUST]后，寻找可以迁移[SETTLEMENT]的新地点。第一年这并非必要，但在第一个[冬季|COLD]之后就该开始考虑。

Original: \n During the first year or two most of your [FOOD] will come from [Foraging|FORAGE], with the help of basic [Professions|PROFESSION] like the [GATHERER], [HARVESTER], and [HUNTER].\n
Translation: 最初一两年，你的大部分[FOOD]都来自[采集|FORAGE]，依靠[GATHERER]、[HARVESTER]和[HUNTER]等基础[职业|PROFESSION]。
染匠会用[CLOTH][产出|PRODUCE][FINE-CLOTH]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]和[BOARDS]。

Original:
Each [Clan|CLAN] arrives with one Family and will slowly grow to include more. Families consume a small amount of [FOOD] per turn. Because their number continually increases throughout the game be mindful to always have a plan for how you'll feed hungry new mouths!

 You can right-click on a [Clan|CLAN]'s 'card' to attach a color-coded note to it (e.g. to keep track of what you want to [Train|TRAIN] it as later).
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]抵达时都有一个家庭，并会慢慢增长到更多。家庭每回合消耗少量[FOOD]。由于家庭数量会在整局游戏中持续增加，务必始终计划好如何喂饱新的饥饿人口！你可以右键点击[氏族|CLAN]“卡片”来给它附加颜色标记的备注（例如记录之后想把它[训练|TRAIN]成什么）。

Original:
Each [Clan|CLAN] can be [Trained|TRAIN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION], of which there are two basic types: [Active|ACTIVE] and [Settled|SETTLED].

 Being in an [Active Profession|ACTIVE] allows a [Clan|CLAN] to perform actions on the map, such as fighting or [Harvesting Resources|HARVEST]. Most [Professions|PROFESSION] are [Settled|SETTLED], which simply means the [Clan|CLAN] remains inside the [SETTLEMENT], and either refines [Resources|RESOURCE] or provides some other kind of economic effect.
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]都可以被[训练|TRAIN]成一个[职业|PROFESSION]，职业有两种基本类型：[主动|ACTIVE]和[定居|SETTLED]。处于[主动职业|ACTIVE]的[氏族|CLAN]可以在地图上行动，例如战斗或[采集资源|HARVEST]。大多数[职业|PROFESSION]都是[定居|SETTLED]职业，意思是[氏族|CLAN]留在[SETTLEMENT]内，精炼[资源|RESOURCE]或提供其他经济效果。

Original: \n Each [Clan|CLAN] is unique. Some start in a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] like [AGRICULTURE] or [METALWORKING], which makes it easier to [Train|TRAIN] them in [Professions|PROFESSION] of the same type.\n
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]都是独特的。有些一开始属于[AGRICULTURE]或[METALWORKING]等[学科|DISCIPLINE]，这会让他们更容易被[训练|TRAIN]成同类[职业|PROFESSION]。

Original:
Each [Unit|UNIT] has a certain amount of [Move Points|MOVE-POINT], which determines how far it can move in a Turn. Tiles with clear, flat [Terrain|TERRAIN] cost 1 [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter and most [Units|UNIT] have 3 to spend each Turn.

 [Units|UNIT] also require [Supply|SUPPLY] from their Tile, and will lose [Morale|MORALE] and [Health|HEALTH] if the [Supply|SUPPLY] provided by a Tile is less than what they need (this is usually caused by changes in [Season|SEASON] or [Weather|WEATHER]).
Translation: 每个[单位|UNIT]都有一定数量的[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]，决定它一回合能移动多远。清晰平坦的[地形|TERRAIN]进入时消耗 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]，大多数[单位|UNIT]每回合有 3 点可用。[单位|UNIT]也需要来自所在地块的[补给|SUPPLY]；如果地块提供的[补给|SUPPLY]低于需求，它们会失去[士气|MORALE]和[生命值|HEALTH]（通常由[季节|SEASON]或[天气|WEATHER]变化造成）。

Original: \n Each of the 10 major tribes like yourself possesses a single [SETTLEMENT], which functions similarly to cities in other 4X strategy games - the big difference is that you'll only ever have one.\n
Translation: 与你一样的 10 个主要部族各自拥有一个[SETTLEMENT]，其功能类似其他 4X 战略游戏中的城市，最大区别是你永远只会拥有一个。

Original: \n Each Turn represents half a month, and eventually it will become [Winter|COLD]. Most sources of [FOOD] cease [Production|PRODUCE] during [Cold Months|COLD], so make sure you have enough [Turns of Food|STORED-TURN] saved up before it starts getting chilly! [Winter|COLD] is usually around 10 turns long, so try to always have at least that amount.\n
Translation: 每个回合代表半个月，最终会进入[冬季|COLD]。大多数[FOOD]来源会在[寒冷月份|COLD]停止[产出|PRODUCE]，所以在天气变冷前务必储备足够的[食物回合数|STORED-TURN]！[冬季|COLD]通常持续约 10 回合，所以尽量始终至少保有这么多。

Original: \n Each type of [Terrain|TERRAIN] has a [Movement Cost|MOVE-POINT] for [Units|UNIT] passing through, as well as a [Supply|SUPPLY] rating which determines whether or not Units can safely remain on the Tile (avoid extended journeys through [SNOW] or [DESERT]!).\n
Translation: 每种[地形|TERRAIN]都有供[单位|UNIT]穿越的[移动消耗|MOVE-POINT]，也有[补给|SUPPLY]评级，用于决定单位能否安全停留在该地块上（避免长时间穿越[SNOW]或[DESERT]！）。
工程师会提高所有[矿井|MINE]的[产出|PRODUCE]。

Original: \n Equites are fast, but expensive to [Train|TRAIN] and less effective in rough [Terrain|TERRAIN]. They are ideal for recon, raiding, cutting off enemy [Supply|SUPPLY], and dealing with sudden emergencies.\n
Translation: 罗马骑兵速度很快，但[训练|TRAIN]昂贵，并且在崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]中效果较差。他们非常适合侦察、劫掠、切断敌方[补给|SUPPLY]，以及应对突发危机。

Original: \n Erratic Leaders are generally unpredictable. They might give you valuable gifts, or they might try to kill you. Watch out!
Translation: 反复无常的领袖通常难以预测。他们可能送你贵重礼物，也可能试图杀死你。小心！

Original: \n Every [Faction|FACTION] [Leader|LEADER] has a unique [Personality|LEADER-TRAIT] which greatly shapes their behavior, particularly their Approach towards you. Keeping the other [Leaders|LEADER] happy (especially those much stronger than you!) is an important element of the game. Giving everyone what they want can be difficult though, as Leaders will often want contradictory things.\n
Translation: 每个[派系|FACTION][领袖|LEADER]都有独特的[性格|LEADER-TRAIT]，会极大塑造其行为，尤其是对你的态度。让其他[领袖|LEADER]保持高兴（尤其是那些比你强得多的领袖）是游戏的重要部分。不过满足所有人的要求可能很难，因为领袖们常常想要相互矛盾的东西。

Original:
Explorers excel at discovering any opportunities or threats that are nearby. They can cross rough [Terrain|TERRAIN] like [HILL:S] and [Forests|FOREST] easily, and are the only [Profession|PROFESSION] which can explore [Deserted Locations|DESERTED-LOCATION].

 Explorers are also extremely fragile and can neither [Attack|ATTACK] enemies nor capture [Structures|STRUCTURE].

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as an Explorer on the first turn is often a good move, as this will give you more information with which to build strategies around.
Translation: 探索者擅长发现附近的机会和威胁。他们可以轻松穿越[HILL:S]和[森林|FOREST]等崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]，也是唯一能够探索[废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]的[职业|PROFESSION]。探索者也极其脆弱，既不能[攻击|ATTACK]敌人，也不能占领[建筑|STRUCTURE]。第一回合把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成探索者通常是好选择，因为这会给你更多情报来制定策略。

Original: \n Faithless Leaders place almost zero importance on [Religion|RELIGION], and don't care about what anyone else believes.
Translation: 不虔诚的领袖几乎不重视[宗教|RELIGION]，也不在乎其他人信什么。

Original:
Farmers can [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Farms|FARM] out of [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS] on [Plants|PLANT], and [APIARY-1:S] on [DEPOSIT-BEEHIVE:S]. These [Structures|STRUCTURE] [Produce|PRODUCE] more than [Foraging|FORAGE] with a [GATHERER] or [REAPER].

 Later in the game, Farmers can also be assigned to advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based Farms as [Apprentices|APPRENTICE], each one doubling the Structure's [Production|PRODUCE].
Translation: 农夫可以在[植物|PLANT]上用[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS][建造|CONSTRUCT][农场|FARM]，也可以在[DEPOSIT-BEEHIVE:S]上建造[APIARY-1:S]。这些[建筑|STRUCTURE]的[产出|PRODUCE]高于使用[GATHERER]或[REAPER][采集|FORAGE]。游戏后期，农夫还可以作为[学徒|APPRENTICE]分配到高级的[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]农场，每名学徒都会使该建筑的[产出|PRODUCE]翻倍。

Original:
Feast Masters [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [FAME].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [ALCOHOL].
Translation: 宴会主持人会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[ALCOHOL]。

Original:
Fine Cloth is an advanced [Resource|RESOURCE] mainly can be used to [Ennoble|NOBLE] [Clans|CLAN], but is also used to [Train|TRAIN] them in a couple late-game [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION] (e.g. [CLERIC]).

 Fine Cloth is created from normal [CLOTH] by a [COUTURIER].
Translation: 精布是一种高级[资源|RESOURCE]，主要用于[晋封|NOBLE][氏族|CLAN]，也用于[训练|TRAIN]他们成为少数后期[平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]（例如[CLERIC]）。精布由[COUTURIER]使用普通[CLOTH]制造。

Original:
Fishmongers dramatically increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [FISH].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [CLOTH].
Translation: 鱼贩会显著提高你的[FISH][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[CLOTH]。

Original:
Flax is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [DEPOSIT-FLAX:S] by [REAPER:S] or [FLAX-FARM-1:S], and can be used in a few ways:

 [*]Traded to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] in exchange for other [Resources|RESOURCE].
 [*]Converted into [CLOTH] by a [WEAVER].
 [*]Converted into [OIL] by an [OIL-PRESSER].
Translation: 亚麻由[REAPER:S]或[FLAX-FARM-1:S]从[DEPOSIT-FLAX:S]中[采集|HARVEST]，用途有几种：[*]与[商队|CARAVAN]交易，换取其他[资源|RESOURCE]。[*]由[WEAVER]转化为[CLOTH]。[*]由[OIL-PRESSER]转化为[OIL]。

Original:
Flooded is a temporary [Weather|WEATHER]-based [Terrain|TERRAIN] type which can be added to a [Tile|TILE] after a large amount of [RAIN].

 [*]Flooded Tiles cannot be entered or left.
 [*]Provides NO [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].
 [*]Greatly increases the [Vision|VISION] cost to see into and out of.
Translation: 洪水是一种临时的、基于[天气|WEATHER]的[地形|TERRAIN]，会在大量[RAIN]之后添加到[地块|TILE]上。[*]被洪水淹没的地块无法进入或离开。[*]不会为[单位|UNIT]提供[补给|SUPPLY]。[*]大幅增加看入和看出该地块所需的[视野|VISION]消耗。

Original:
Food is the game's most important [Resource|RESOURCE] as if you run out your Tribe will [Starve|STARVE]. Unlike all other Resources it is [stored as a number of Turns|STORED-TURN], rather than a specific quantity.

 Each of your [Clans'|CLAN] [Families|FAMILY] [Consumes|CONSUME] 0.2 Food per [Turn|TURN]. You start a game with 3 Clans of 1 Family Consuming a total of 0.6 Food per Turn.

 Much of your early Food will come from [Foraging|FORAGE], often with a [GATHERER]. Later, [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] [Farms|STRUCTURE] and [Pastures|PASTURE] provides a means to [Produce|PRODUCE] much more.
Translation: 食物是游戏中最重要的[资源|RESOURCE]，因为一旦耗尽，你的部族就会[挨饿|STARVE]。与所有其他资源不同，它以[可维持回合数|STORED-TURN]储存，而不是具体数量。你的每个[氏族|CLAN]的每个[家庭|FAMILY]每[回合|TURN][消耗|CONSUME] 0.2 食物。开局时你有 3 个氏族、每个 1 个家庭，总共每回合消耗 0.6 食物。你早期的大部分食物来自[采集|FORAGE]，通常由[GATHERER]完成。之后，[建造|CONSTRUCT][农场|STRUCTURE]和[牧场|PASTURE]能让你[产出|PRODUCE]更多食物。

Original:
For the most part you can use the map to guide your strategic decisions. Whatever [Resource Deposits|DEPOSIT] are available nearby should usually become the foundation of your economy, as even things you don't need can be traded for what you lack when a [Caravan|CARAVAN] is visiting.

 At the very least you'll want a [HUNTER], [GATHERER], or [REAPER] soon, before [winter's chill|SEASON] takes hold.
Translation: 在很大程度上，你可以用地图来引导战略决策。附近可用的任何[资源矿藏|DEPOSIT]通常都应成为经济基础，因为即便是你不需要的东西，也能在[商队|CARAVAN]到访时交易成你缺少的东西。至少，你很快会想要一个[HUNTER]、[GATHERER]或[REAPER]，赶在[冬寒|SEASON]降临之前。

Original:
Forests are a major [Terrain|TERRAIN] obstacle which can be [Harvested|HARVEST] for [TIMBER].

 [*]Lose [COLOR:EMPHASIS]all[/COLOR] remaining [Move Points|MOVE-POINT] after entering.
 [*]Reduces the [Supply|SUPPLY] available to [Units|UNIT] by 1.
 [*]Grants a 25% [Defense|DEFENSE] bonus.
 [*]Blocks [Vision|VISION] (unless standing on a nearby [HILL]).

 Forests are also the only source of [TIMBER], a [Resource|RESOURCE] needed to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE], and therefore vital for most of the game.

 Forests should not be confused with the more easily-traversed but Timber-less [BRUSH-LEAFY].
Translation: 森林是主要[地形|TERRAIN]障碍，可以被[采集|HARVEST]以获得[TIMBER]。[*]进入后失去[COLOR:EMPHASIS]全部[/COLOR]剩余[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]使[单位|UNIT]可用[补给|SUPPLY]减少 1。[*]提供 25% [防御|DEFENSE]加成。[*]会阻挡[视野|VISION]（除非站在附近的[HILL]上）。森林也是木材的唯一来源，而[TIMBER]是[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]所需的[资源|RESOURCE]，因此在大部分游戏阶段都很关键。不要把森林与更易穿越但没有木材的[BRUSH-LEAFY]混淆。

Original:
Galleys are both the battleships and transports of late antiquity. They can ferry 1 [Unit|UNIT] or your [SETTLEMENT] over the water at high speed, which can very useful when claiming [Deposits|DEPOSIT] on nearby islands, migrating, invading distant neighbors, or simply moving land-based [Clans|CLAN] back and forth.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [CLOTH] and [TIMBER].
Translation: 桨帆船既是古典晚期的战舰，也是运输船。它们可以高速运送 1 个[单位|UNIT]或你的[SETTLEMENT]穿越水域；在夺取附近岛屿上的[矿藏|DEPOSIT]、迁徙、入侵远方邻族，或单纯往返水域两岸移动陆地[氏族|CLAN]时都很有用。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[CLOTH]和[TIMBER]。

Original:
Gardeners increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [FRUIT], [HONEY], [GRAPES], and [OLIVES].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 园丁会提高你的[FRUIT]、[HONEY]、[GRAPES]和[OLIVES][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Gatherers can [Harvest|HARVEST] [FRUIT], [HONEY], [GRAPES], and [OLIVES] by [Moving|MOVE-POINT] to any [Tile|TILE] containing a [source|DEPOSIT] of one of them and [Foraging|FORAGE]. They can also [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S].

 During [Cold|COLD] months Gatherers are only able to [Forage|FORAGE] from [DEPOSIT-BEEHIVE:S] and [DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S] - this can be a good time to use them to [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] nearby [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a Gatherer can be a good way to keep your tribe fed at the start of the game.
Translation: 采集者可以通过[移动|MOVE-POINT]到含有[FRUIT]、[HONEY]、[GRAPES]或[OLIVES]等[来源|DEPOSIT]的[地块|TILE]并进行[采集|FORAGE]来[采集|HARVEST]这些资源。他们还可以[识别|UNIDENTIFIED][DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S]。[寒冷|COLD]月份里，采集者只能从[DEPOSIT-BEEHIVE:S]和[DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S][采集|FORAGE]，这时可以让他们去[识别|UNIDENTIFIED]附近的[DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S]。游戏初期把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成采集者，是维持部族口粮的好办法。

Original:
Glassblowers dramatically increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [ALCOHOL] and non-[MEAT] types of [FOOD].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS], and they consume [COAL] each turn.
Translation: 吹玻璃工会显著提高你的[ALCOHOL]和非[MEAT]类[FOOD][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]，并且每回合会消耗[COAL]。

Original:
Glassblowers increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [ALCOHOL] and non-[MEAT] types of [FOOD].

 They consume [COAL] each turn.
Translation: 玻璃工会提高你的[ALCOHOL]和非[MEAT]类[FOOD][产出|PRODUCE]。他们每回合会消耗[COAL]。

Original:
Go back into the Clans Screen by pressing [HOTKEY:Spacebar].

 Click on the 'Leave' button underneath Clan Wilmot. They arrived already in the [WOOD-COLLECTOR] [Profession|PROFESSION].

 Once they've left your [SETTLEMENT] and are able to move around the map right-click on the [Forest|FOREST] tile to the southwest of your [SETTLEMENT] to move them there. We'll start collecting [TIMBER] next turn.
Translation: 按 [HOTKEY:Spacebar] 回到氏族界面。点击氏族 Wilmot 下方的“离开”按钮。他们抵达时已经处于[WOOD-COLLECTOR][职业|PROFESSION]。当他们离开你的[SETTLEMENT]并能够在地图上移动后，右键点击你的[SETTLEMENT]西南方的[森林|FOREST]地块，把他们移动到那里。我们下回合开始收集[TIMBER]。

Original: \n Good. I think we'll get along rather well.\n
Translation: 很好。我想我们会相处得相当不错。

Original: \n Good. Let me know if you ever have a matter you'd like to discuss.\n
Translation: 很好。如果你有什么想讨论的事，请告诉我。

Original:
Grapes are automatically converted into [FOOD] when your tribe has nothing else to eat.

 A better use though is converting Grapes into [ALCOHOL] with a [WINEMAKER].
Translation: 当你的部族没有其他东西可吃时，葡萄会自动转化为[FOOD]。不过更好的用途是让[WINEMAKER]把葡萄转化为[ALCOHOL]。

Original:
Grassland is the most hospitable type of [Terrain|TERRAIN] in AtG.

 [*]Costs only 1 [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Provides 3 [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].

 These values are modified when a Grassland [Tile|TILE] also contains rough Terrain like a [Forest|FOREST] or [HILL], or is affected by [Cold|COLD] or [Weather|WEATHER].

 Grasslands are also home to a variety of [Harvestable|HARVEST] [Plants|PLANT] and [Animals|ANIMAL], such as [DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S] and [DEPOSIT-SHEEP:S].
Translation: 草原是 AtG 中最宜居的[地形|TERRAIN]。[*]进入只需 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]为[单位|UNIT]提供 3 点[补给|SUPPLY]。如果草原[地块|TILE]还含有[森林|FOREST]或[HILL]等崎岖地形，或受到[寒冷|COLD]或[天气|WEATHER]影响，这些数值会改变。草原也常有各种可[采集|HARVEST]的[植物|PLANT]和[动物|ANIMAL]，例如[DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S]和[DEPOSIT-SHEEP:S]。

Original: \n Greedy Leaders lust after material wealth, making them easily bribable.\n
Translation: 贪婪的领袖渴求物质财富，因此很容易被收买。

Original: \n Greetings my friend! I just wanted to stop by and offer you a small token of my appreciation for the strong bond we share.\n
Translation: 问候你，我的朋友！我只是想顺路来访，并献上一点心意，以感谢我们之间牢固的情谊。

Original: \n Greetings, great leader. I have heard of your great deeds and come with a gift.\n
Translation: 问候你，伟大的领袖。我听闻了你的伟业，特带礼物前来。

Original: \n Greetings, scum. You know your place, right? I'm generously offering you the chance to show you know your place.\n
Translation: 问候你，渣滓。你知道自己的位置，对吧？我很慷慨地给你一个机会，证明你知道自己的位置。

Original: \n Greetings, stranger. I seek a fair and friendly relationship with you. Are you of similar mind?\n
Translation: 问候你，陌生人。我希望与你建立公平而友好的关系。你也这么想吗？

Original: \n Guides increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of all [Foragers|FORAGE] (e.g. [HUNTER], [GATHERER], and [DIGGER]).\n
Translation: 向导会提高所有[采集者|FORAGE]（例如[HUNTER]、[GATHERER]和[DIGGER]）的[产出|PRODUCE]。

Original:
Guildmasters [Produce|PRODUCE] [TREASURE] based on how many [Levels|LEVEL] a [Clan|CLAN] has in [HONOR]. They can also be [Upgraded|UPGRADE] to Produce [FAME].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 行会长会根据一个[氏族|CLAN]在[HONOR]中的[等级|LEVEL]数量[产出|PRODUCE][TREASURE]。他们也可以被[升级|UPGRADE]为产出[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original:
Harvesters increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of [GATHERER:S] and [REAPER:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 收获者会提高[GATHERER:S]和[REAPER:S]的[产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original: \n Haughty Leaders believe they're the best, and everyone else is inferior.
Translation: 傲慢的领袖认为自己最优秀，其他人都低人一等。

Original:
Having a few [ARCHER:S] in the early-game can really save your bacon.

 [Turns|TURN] are pretty gosh-darn important in this game.

 Testing our [COLOR:GOOD-GREEN]fancy-ish
 new [ICON:FAMILY] family system.[/COLOR]

 The question now is whether EVERYTHING works, as it's not entirely likely. When you're programming stuff you KNOW that SOMETHING is gonna be broken. Just the way life goes. :(
Translation: 游戏早期有几个[ARCHER:S]真的能救你一命。[回合|TURN]在这个游戏里可真是该死地重要。测试我们的[COLOR:GOOD-GREEN]有点花哨的新[ICON:FAMILY]家庭系统。[/COLOR]现在的问题是所有东西是否都能正常工作，毕竟这并不太可能。写程序的时候你很清楚总会有东西坏掉。人生就是如此。:(

Original:
Having a Quartermaster allows you to [Upgrade|UPGRADE] [Warriors|WARRIOR] with 50 [WEAPONS], increasing their [Power|POWER] by 5.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT] and that a [Clan|CLAN] has been [Ennobled|NOBLE].
Translation: 拥有军需官后，你可以花费 50 [WEAPONS]为[战士|WARRIOR][升级|UPGRADE]，使其[战力|POWER]提高 5。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]，并且需要一个[氏族|CLAN]已被[晋封贵族|NOBLE]。

Original: \n Having thought about it I no longer feel your situation is a priority. Farewell for now.\n
Translation: 我想过之后觉得，你的处境已经不再是优先事项。暂且告辞。

Original: \n Hello friend, it's nice to meet the one so many rumors have been spreading about. I have something for you.\n
Translation: 你好，朋友。很高兴见到那个传闻四起的人。我有东西要给你。

Original:
Help tips will occasionally appear here to assist you with learning game concepts.

 You can open the Help Screen and see a full list of tips by clicking the [COLOR:EMPHASIS] ? [/COLOR] button in the upper-left corner of the screen, or by pressing the [HOTKEY:?] key.

 Mouse over any word in [yellow|TOOLTIPS] to learn more about it - even from [inside other tooltips|TOOLTIPS]!
Translation: 帮助提示会偶尔出现在这里，协助你学习游戏概念。你可以点击屏幕左上角的 [COLOR:EMPHASIS] ? [/COLOR] 按钮，或按下 [HOTKEY:?] 键打开帮助界面，查看完整提示列表。把鼠标移到任何[黄色|TOOLTIPS]词语上即可了解更多，甚至可以在[其他提示框内部|TOOLTIPS]继续这样做！

Original: \n Helpful Leaders seek out opportunities to do good in a cruel, mean world.
Translation: 乐于助人的领袖会在残酷而刻薄的世界中寻找行善机会。

Original:
Here is a full list of [Seasonal|SEASON] and [Weather|WEATHER] effects:

 [*] [Cold|COLD]
 [*] [BLIZZARD]
 [*] [RAIN]
 [*] [FLOODED]
 [*] [SCORCHED]
Translation: 以下是[季节性|SEASON]和[天气|WEATHER]效果的完整列表：[*][寒冷|COLD][*][BLIZZARD][*][RAIN][*][FLOODED][*][SCORCHED]

Original:
Hewers [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [BOARDS] from [TIMBER].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 锯木工会用[TIMBER][产出|PRODUCE]大量[BOARDS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Hills are a minor [Terrain|TERRAIN] obstacle.

 [*]Costs 1 additional [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Reduces the [Supply|SUPPLY] available to [Units|UNIT] by 1.
 [*]Grants a 25% [Defense|DEFENSE] bonus.
 [*]Blocks [Vision|VISION], unless...

 Standing [COLOR:EMPHASIS]on[/COLOR] a Hill makes it possible to see over [Forests|FOREST] and other Hills, making them ideal Tiles for [EXPLORER:S] to visit while exploring.

 Hills can also contain valuable [Minerals|MINERAL] like [DEPOSIT-IRON:S] and [DEPOSIT-STONE:S].
Translation: 丘陵是一种轻微[地形|TERRAIN]障碍。[*]进入时额外消耗 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]使[单位|UNIT]可用[补给|SUPPLY]减少 1。[*]提供 25% [防御|DEFENSE]加成。[*]会阻挡[视野|VISION]，除非……站在丘陵[COLOR:EMPHASIS]上[/COLOR]可以越过[森林|FOREST]和其他丘陵观察，因此探索时很适合让[EXPLORER:S]前往。丘陵也可能含有[DEPOSIT-IRON:S]、[DEPOSIT-STONE:S]等珍贵[矿物|MINERAL]。

Original: \n Hmmm, I'm not sure I heard you. Maybe I'll give you another chance later.\n
Translation: 嗯，我不确定自己听清了。也许以后我会再给你一次机会。

Original: \n Hmmm, very sorry to hear that.\n
\n Honest Leaders are reliable and can be trusted to follow through on their word.
Translation: 诚实的领袖可靠，值得信任，会兑现自己的承诺。

Original:
Honey is automatically converted into [FOOD] when your tribe has nothing else to eat.

 A better use though is converting Honey into [ALCOHOL] with a [WINEMAKER].
Translation: 当你的部族没有其他东西可吃时，蜂蜜会自动转化为[FOOD]。不过更好的用途是让[WINEMAKER]把蜂蜜转化为[ALCOHOL]。

Original:
Honor Guards [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [FAME].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [ARMOR] and [WEAPONS].
Translation: 荣誉卫队会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[ARMOR]和[WEAPONS]。

Original:
Horse Archers are elusive and deadly. They are much faster than Heavy Cavalry, and tougher to pin down than other types of Light Cavalry. The Horse Archer's only weakness is poor performance in rough [Terrain|TERRAIN]. Only the nomadic Huns and Avars can [Train|TRAIN] them.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [WARHORSES] and [WEAPONS].
Translation: 骑射手机动灵活且致命。他们比重骑兵快得多，也比其他轻骑兵更难被缠住。骑射手唯一的弱点是在崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]中表现不佳。只有游牧的匈人与阿瓦尔人能够[训练|TRAIN]他们。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[WARHORSES]和[WEAPONS]。

Original: \n Horse Trainers [Produce|PRODUCE] [WARHORSES] from [HORSES] added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Pasture|PASTURE] on them.\n
Translation: 驯马师会用通过在[HORSES]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][牧场|PASTURE]而加入你[库存|STOCKPILE]的马匹[产出|PRODUCE][WARHORSES]。

Original:
Horses can be used in the same way as other [Animals|ANIMAL], and also turned into [WARHORSES] by a [HORSE-TRAINER].

 1 [HORSES:SINGULAR] from your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] is automatically turned into 5 [FOOD] if the Tribe is starving.
Translation: 马可以像其他[动物|ANIMAL]一样使用，也可以由[HORSE-TRAINER]转化为[WARHORSES]。如果部族正在挨饿，你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的 1 匹[HORSES:SINGULAR]会自动转化为 5 [FOOD]。

Original: \n How dare you. You'll regret this, I promise you.\n
Translation: 你好大的胆子。我保证，你会后悔的。

Original: \n How dare you. You'll regret this.\n
Translation: 你好大的胆子。你会后悔的。

Original:
Hunters can [Harvest|HARVEST] [MEAT] by [Moving|MOVE-POINT] to any [Tile|TILE] containing an [Animal Herd|ANIMAL] and [Foraging|FORAGE]. They can also [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-ANIMAL:S].

 Hunters are also the first [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Profession|PROFESSION] available to you, though this isn't their primary job and so they'll have trouble in most serious battles.

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a Hunter can be a good way to keep your tribe fed at the start of the game.
Translation: 猎人可以通过[移动|MOVE-POINT]到含有[动物群|ANIMAL]的[地块|TILE]并进行[采集|FORAGE]来[采集|HARVEST][MEAT]。他们还可以[识别|UNIDENTIFIED][DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-ANIMAL:S]。猎人也是你最早可用的[战士|WARRIOR][职业|PROFESSION]，不过战斗不是他们的本职，因此在多数严肃战斗中会吃亏。游戏初期把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成猎人，是维持部族口粮的好办法。

Original:
Huntsmen increase the amount of [MEAT] [Produced|PRODUCE] by your [HUNTER:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [WEAPONS].
Translation: 猎户会提高你的[HUNTER:S][产出|PRODUCE][MEAT]的数量。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[WEAPONS]。

Original: \n I believe it's time for us to walk together in the spiritual journey laid before us. Do you agree?\n
Translation: 我相信，是时候让我们一起踏上摆在面前的精神旅途了。你同意吗？

Original: \n I can no longer ignore your crimes. I vow to crush you some day, one way or another.\n
Translation: 我不能再无视你的罪行。我发誓，总有一天会用某种方式粉碎你。

Original: \n I don't like you. So watch yourself.\n
Translation: 我不喜欢你。所以小心点。

Original: \n I have a good feeling about the two of us working together.\n
Translation: 我觉得我们两人合作会很顺利。

Original: \n I have some things I need to attend do, but I trust I can rely on you behaving yourself for a little while - right?\n
Translation: 我有些事情需要处理，但我相信你能暂时规矩一点，对吧？

Original: \n I need some bandits cleared out. Please take care of it before my next visit a year from now.\n
Translation: 我需要清理掉一些强盗。请在我一年后下次来访前处理好。

Original: \n I recommend you listen to my advice from now on. It's - for your own good.\n
Translation: 我建议你从现在起听我的忠告。这是为了你好。

Original: \n I see. May your soul one day be guided to the light.\n
Translation: 我明白了。愿你的灵魂终有一日被引向光明。

Original: \n I shall pray for you then.\n
\n I think it's time you offered me a token of your appreciation for the fact that I'm so nice to you.\n
Translation: 我觉得你该给我一点谢意了，毕竟我一直对你这么好。

Original: \n I want to let you know that I truly appreciate your support, and I promise to prioritize our relationship.\n
Translation: 我想告诉你，我真心感谢你的支持，并承诺会优先重视我们的关系。

Original:
Ice is a temporary [Season|SEASON]-based water [Terrain|TERRAIN] type which can be added to a [Tile|TILE].

 [*]Tiles with Ice cannot be entered or left.
Translation: 冰面是一种临时的、基于[季节|SEASON]的水域[地形|TERRAIN]，可以添加到[地块|TILE]上。[*]带有冰面的地块无法进入或离开。

Original: \n I'd like to hold a feast - I can trust you'll be able to assist me with this, right? I think I'll need 20 Food. There's no hurry though. A year should be enough time, right?\n
Translation: 我想举办一场宴会，我可以相信你会帮我办妥，对吧？我想我需要 20 食物。不过不急。一年应该够了吧？

Original:
If a [Unit|UNIT] ends its Turn on a Tile which provides less [Supply|SUPPLY] than it requires (usually 1) then it has a one-turn 'grace period' before it starts losing [Morale|MORALE] and [Health|HEALTH].

 When it's not [Winter|COLD] the only Tiles which you need to pay attention to in this regard are [DESERT:S]. This changes completely once it starts getting [Cold|COLD] though - wintertime means thinking about the map in a completely new way.
Translation: 如果[单位|UNIT]在回合结束时位于提供[补给|SUPPLY]少于其需求（通常为 1）的地块上，它会有一回合“宽限期”，之后才开始失去[士气|MORALE]和[生命值|HEALTH]。非[冬季|COLD]时，你只需要特别注意[DESERT:S]。但一旦开始变得[寒冷|COLD]，情况就会完全不同；冬季意味着要用全新的方式思考地图。

Original: \n If you can't afford this you will stop accumulating [FAME] and [KNOWLEDGE], and eventually [Clans|CLAN] will suffer [Damage|DAMAGE] and be generally less effective.\n
Translation: 如果你负担不起，就会停止积累[FAME]和[KNOWLEDGE]，最终[氏族|CLAN]会受到[伤害|DAMAGE]，整体效率也会降低。

Original:
If you do notice any issues, have any questions, or want to provide feedback please let us know at contact@conifergames.com so that we can help improve the game!

 Because AtG is still an active development an autosave is created every turn, and at roughly 3MB each these files can add up if you play a lot. Your settings, save games, and log files can be found in your installation folder.

 Thanks again for helping us out, and I hope you enjoy playing At the Gates!

 - Jon
Translation: 如果你发现任何问题、有任何疑问，或想提供反馈，请通过 contact@conifergames.com 告诉我们，以便我们改进游戏！因为 AtG 仍在积极开发中，每回合都会创建自动存档，每个大约 3MB；如果你玩得很多，这些文件会不断累积。你的设置、存档和日志文件都可以在安装文件夹中找到。再次感谢你的帮助，希望你喜欢《At the Gates》！- Jon

Original: \n If you ever need assistance don't be afraid to ask. I'm happy to help.\n
Translation: 如果你需要帮助，不要害怕开口。我很乐意帮忙。

Original: \n If you know what's good for you you'll offer me a token of your appreciation.\n
Translation: 如果你识相，就该献上一点谢意。

Original: \n If you were to offer a nice gift it would help make sure we won't have any trouble. Understand?\n
Translation: 如果你献上一份像样的礼物，就能确保我们之间不会有麻烦。明白吗？

Original: \n I'll be back in a year.\n
\n I'll send word should anything important come up.\n
Translation: 若有重要事情发生，我会派人传话。

Original: \n I'm looking forward to receiving your gift.\n
Translation: 我很期待收到你的礼物。

Original:
In addition to its [Profession|PROFESSION] a [Clan|CLAN] can have a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], and can gain [Experience|XP] and [Levels|LEVEL] in it. This mostly determines how long it takes to [Train|TRAIN] the [Clan|CLAN] in a new [Profession|PROFESSION] (those in the same [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] are much faster), but a [Clan|CLAN]'s [Mood|MOOD] might be affected as well based on its [Personality Traits|CLAN-TRAIT].

 Each [Clan|CLAN] has 2 [Personality Traits|CLAN-TRAIT], which can be good, bad, or simply something to plan around.
Translation: 除了[职业|PROFESSION]外，[氏族|CLAN]还可以拥有一项[学科|DISCIPLINE]，并在其中获得[经验|XP]和[等级|LEVEL]。这主要决定将该[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成新[职业|PROFESSION]需要多久（同一[学科|DISCIPLINE]内会快得多），但[氏族|CLAN]的[心情|MOOD]也可能根据其[性格特质|CLAN-TRAIT]受到影响。每个[氏族|CLAN]有 2 个[性格特质|CLAN-TRAIT]，它们可能是好事、坏事，或只是需要围绕它规划的因素。

Original: \n In general, when a Tile becomes [Cold|COLD] it stops [Producing|PRODUCE] [FOOD] (Berries and Meat are exceptions). When it gets even colder all available [Supply|SUPPLY] disappears (except inside your [Borders|BORDERS]). When a Tile turns into [SNOW] it becomes harder to [Move|MOVE-POINT] through, but once [Rivers|RIVER] have frozen they become much easier to cross.\n
Translation: 一般来说，当地块变为[寒冷|COLD]时，它会停止[产出|PRODUCE][FOOD]（浆果和肉类例外）。当它变得更冷时，所有可用[补给|SUPPLY]都会消失（你的[边境|BORDERS]内除外）。当地块变为[SNOW]时，[移动|MOVE-POINT]穿越会更困难；但一旦[河流|RIVER]结冰，它们就会更容易通过。

Original: \n In the first few turns it's important to pick a [Deposit|DEPOSIT] (usually a [Plant|PLANT]) you'll use to feed your growing tribe, and [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a [Forager|FORAGE] to [Harvest|HARVEST] it. This should last you a year or two before running out, when you'll need to find a new, larger source (and maybe something you can refine into even more).\n
Translation: 在最初几个回合中，选择一个用于供养成长中部族的[矿藏|DEPOSIT]（通常是[植物|PLANT]）很重要，然后把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成[采集者|FORAGE]去[采集|HARVEST]它。它应该能维持一两年，之后会耗尽，你需要寻找新的、更大的来源（也许还能精炼成更高级的东西）。

Original:
In the upper-left corner of the screen is a list of your [Resources|RESOURCE], which may be spent on various economic activities.

 There are also a few other miscellaneous buttons here, which will take you to the system menu, bring up the game's 'notepad', and more. The '?' button will take you to the Game Help Screen, where you can read any Game Tip again if you'd like.
Translation: 屏幕左上角是你的[资源|RESOURCE]列表，可用于各种经济活动。这里还有一些其他杂项按钮，可以打开系统菜单、调出游戏“记事本”等。“?”按钮会打开游戏帮助界面，你可以在那里重新阅读任何游戏提示。

Original:
Inventors [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [KNOWLEDGE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 发明家会[产出|PRODUCE]巨量[KNOWLEDGE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Iron is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Mineral Deposits|MINERAL] by [DIGGER:S] or [IRON-MINE-1:S].

 Iron can be forged into [TOOLS] by a [BLACKSMITH], into [WEAPONS] by a [WEAPONSMITH], or into [STEEL] by a [STEELMAKER].
Translation: 铁由[DIGGER:S]或[IRON-MINE-1:S]从[矿藏|MINERAL]中[采集|HARVEST]。铁可以由[BLACKSMITH]锻造成[TOOLS]，由[WEAPONSMITH]锻造成[WEAPONS]，或由[STEELMAKER]锻造成[STEEL]。

Original: \n Is that so? You might regret that.\n
Translation: 是这样吗？你可能会后悔。

Original: \n Is the food I asked for ready?\n
Translation: 我要的食物准备好了吗？

Original: \n It pleases me to hear you'll now be walking the righteous path.\n
Translation: 听说你将走上正道，我很欣慰。

Original: \n It seems some bandits have intercepted our food shipments out to the frontier. You can help make up this shortfall though, right? 20 Food, I think it was. I'll give you a year to prepare things.\n
Translation: 似乎有些强盗拦截了我们运往边境的粮食。你能帮忙弥补这个缺口，对吧？我记得是 20 食物。我给你一年时间准备。

Original: \n It's possible to eliminate the [Supply|SUPPLY] available on a Tile and thus grind a powerful enemy army down by Besieging them. This requires having at least 1 more [Warrior Unit|WARRIOR] than your foe, but can be an excellent way of taking down [Bandit Camps|BANDIT] and other strongholds and taking almost no damage in the process.\n
Translation: 你可以通过围困消除地块上的可用[补给|SUPPLY]，从而慢慢削弱强大的敌军。这要求你至少比敌人多 1 个[战士单位|WARRIOR]，但这是攻下[强盗营地|BANDIT]和其他据点、同时几乎不受伤的绝佳方式。

Original: \n It's probably about time to start thinking about settling down and [Declaring a Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM].\n
Translation: 大概是时候开始考虑定居并[宣布建国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]了。

Original: \n It's time for me to take care of some business, so be a good boy and don't misbehave while I'm occupied.\n
Translation: 我该去处理一些事务了，所以乖一点，趁我忙着的时候别惹事。

Original: \n Jealous Leaders become upset when you act friendly with their enemies.\n
Translation: 嫉妒的领袖会因你与他们的敌人友好往来而不悦。

Original: \n Just so you know, I no longer particularly care about your situation.\n
Translation: 先告诉你，我已经不太关心你的处境了。

Original:
Kiln Masters [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [STONE-BLOCKS] from [COAL].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 窑炉大师会用[COAL][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[STONE-BLOCKS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Lancers are fast, but expensive to [Train|TRAIN] and less effective in rough [Terrain|TERRAIN] due to their [Supply|SUPPLY] cost. They are ideal for recon, raiding, cutting off enemy [Supply|SUPPLY], and dealing with sudden emergencies.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [WARHORSES] and [WEAPONS].
Translation: 枪骑兵速度很快，但[训练|TRAIN]昂贵，并且因为[补给|SUPPLY]消耗较高，在崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]中效果较差。他们非常适合侦察、劫掠、切断敌方[补给|SUPPLY]，以及应对突发危机。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[WARHORSES]和[WEAPONS]。

Original:
Legions are still formidable foes, but no longer the invincible force of centuries past. They are stronger than basic [Infantry|INFANTRY], but cost much more to [Train|TRAIN].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-WEAPONS] and [STEEL-ARMOR].
Translation: 军团仍是可怕的敌人，但已不再是几个世纪前那支无敌之师。他们强于普通[步兵|INFANTRY]，但[训练|TRAIN]成本高得多。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-WEAPONS]和[STEEL-ARMOR]。

Original: \n Let's settle this on the battlefield.\n
Translation: 让我们在战场上解决此事。

Original:
Loggers can [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [LOGGING-CAMP-1:S], which [Produce|PRODUCE] [TIMBER] from [Tiles|TILE] containing a [Forest|FOREST] both under AND adjacent to the Structure.

 Loggers can also be assigned as [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to the advanced [LOGGING-CAMP-2] Constructed from [STONE-BLOCKS], each one increasing [TIMBER] Production by 4.
Translation: 伐木工可以[建造|CONSTRUCT][LOGGING-CAMP-1:S]，从建筑所在以及相邻的含[森林|FOREST][地块|TILE][产出|PRODUCE][TIMBER]。伐木工也可以作为[学徒|APPRENTICE]分配到用[STONE-BLOCKS]建成的高级[LOGGING-CAMP-2]，每名学徒都会使[TIMBER]产量增加 4。

Original: \n Logical Leaders are consistent and predictable in their behavior, nearly always playing the odds.
Translation: 理性的领袖行为一致且可预测，几乎总会按胜算行事。

Original:
Luthiers [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [FAME] from [BOARDS].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 乐器匠会用[BOARDS][产出|PRODUCE]大量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original: \n Major [Factions|FACTION] can become the owner of a Tile by having their [SETTLEMENT] or other [Structures|STRUCTURE] nearby. A Tile must already be owned and inside your [Borders|BORDERS] in order to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] there. Tiles within your Borders also always provide full [Supply|SUPPLY] regardless of the [Season|SEASON] or [Weather|WEATHER], making them an important strategic asset, especially on defense.\n
Translation: 主要[派系|FACTION]可以通过附近的[SETTLEMENT]或其他[建筑|STRUCTURE]成为某个地块的拥有者。要在某地[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]，该地块必须已经被你拥有并位于你的[边境|BORDERS]内。无论[季节|SEASON]或[天气|WEATHER]如何，你边境内的地块也始终提供完整[补给|SUPPLY]，因此是重要的战略资产，尤其在防御时。

Original: \n Many [Deposits|DEPOSIT] start off as [Unidentified|UNIDENTIFIED], and you'll need a [Forager|FORAGE] of the right type (e.g. a [DIGGER] for a [Mineral Deposit|MINERAL]) or a more advanced [SURVEYOR] figure out what they are before you can [Harvest any Resources|HARVEST] from them.\n
Translation: 许多[矿藏|DEPOSIT]一开始是[未识别|UNIDENTIFIED]的，你需要正确类型的[采集者|FORAGE]（例如用[DIGGER]识别[矿藏|MINERAL]）或更高级的[SURVEYOR]查明它们是什么，然后才能从中[采集任何资源|HARVEST]。

Original: \n Maps in AtG are a randomly generated set of Tiles containing various types of [Terrain|TERRAIN]. Tiles can also contain [Resource Deposits|DEPOSIT] you can [Harvest|HARVEST] with [Foragers|FORAGE] and [Structures|STRUCTURE].\n
Translation: AtG 的地图是一组随机生成的地块，包含各种[地形|TERRAIN]。地块也可能含有可由[采集者|FORAGE]和[建筑|STRUCTURE][采集|HARVEST]的[资源矿藏|DEPOSIT]。

Original:
Marshes are a type of [Terrain|TERRAIN] that's incredibly difficult to enter but sometimes contains [Harvestable|HARVEST] [Mineral Deposits|MINERAL].

 [*]Costs all remaining [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] PLUS those of the following [Turn|TURN] to enter.
 [*]Provides 1 [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].

 Because of their harsh movement penalty Marshes are usually best avoided, except to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Minerals|MINERAL] like [IRON] or [COAL].
Translation: 沼泽是一种极难进入的[地形|TERRAIN]，但有时含有可[采集|HARVEST]的[矿藏|MINERAL]。[*]进入时会消耗所有剩余[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]，并额外消耗下一[回合|TURN]的移动点。[*]为[单位|UNIT]提供 1 点[补给|SUPPLY]。由于移动惩罚严厉，沼泽通常最好避开，除非是为了[采集|HARVEST][IRON]或[COAL]等[矿物|MINERAL]。

Original:
Master Block Cutters [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [STONE-BLOCKS] from [STONE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 石块切割大师会用[STONE][产出|PRODUCE]大量[STONE-BLOCKS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Master Hewers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [BOARDS] from [TIMBER].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 锯木大师会用[TIMBER][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[BOARDS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Masters of Ceremony [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [FAME].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [FINE-CLOTH], [OIL], and that a [Clan|CLAN] has been [Ennobled|NOBLE].
Translation: 礼仪大师会[产出|PRODUCE]巨量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[FINE-CLOTH]、[OIL]，并且需要一个[氏族|CLAN]已被[晋封贵族|NOBLE]。

Original: \n Meat Cutters [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [MEAT] from [Animals|ANIMAL] added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Pasture|PASTURE] on them.\n
Translation: 屠宰工会从通过在[动物|ANIMAL]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][牧场|PASTURE]而加入你[库存|STOCKPILE]的动物中[产出|PRODUCE]大量[MEAT]。

Original:
Meat Smokers dramatically increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [MEAT].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STONE-BLOCKS], and they consume [TIMBER] each turn.
Translation: 熏肉师会显著提高你的[MEAT][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STONE-BLOCKS]，并且每回合会消耗[TIMBER]。

Original: \n Meek Leaders are inclined to think things won't work out, and back down instead.
Translation: 温顺的领袖倾向于认为事情不会顺利，因此会选择退让。

Original:
Men-At-Arms are late antiquity's most powerful front-line combatants. Feared by all other types of [Infantry|INFANTRY], they are outclassed only by [HEAVY-CAVALRY:S] and [ROMAN-HEAVY-CAVALRY:S] in open [Terrain|TERRAIN].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-WEAPONS] and [ARMOR].
Translation: 重装步兵是古典晚期最强大的前线战士。所有其他类型的[步兵|INFANTRY]都会畏惧他们，在开阔[地形|TERRAIN]中只有[HEAVY-CAVALRY:S]和[ROMAN-HEAVY-CAVALRY:S]能压过他们。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-WEAPONS]和[ARMOR]。

Original:
Merchants greatly increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [CLOTH], [ALCOHOL], and [OIL].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 商贾会大幅提高你的[CLOTH]、[ALCOHOL]和[OIL][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original:
Miners can [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Mines|MINE] out of [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS] on [Minerals|MINERAL]. Mines [Produce|PRODUCE] more than [Foraging|FORAGE] with a [DIGGER].

 Later in the game, Miners can also be assigned to advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based Mines as [Apprentices|APPRENTICE], each one doubling the Structure's [Production|PRODUCE].
Translation: 矿工可以在[矿物|MINERAL]上用[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS][建造|CONSTRUCT][矿井|MINE]。矿井的[产出|PRODUCE]高于使用[DIGGER][采集|FORAGE]。游戏后期，矿工还可以作为[学徒|APPRENTICE]分配到高级的[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]矿井，每名学徒都会使该建筑的[产出|PRODUCE]翻倍。

Original:
Minstrels [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [FAME].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [BOARDS] and [ALCOHOL].
Translation: 游吟艺人会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[BOARDS]和[ALCOHOL]。

Original:
Most [Deserted Locations|DESERTED-LOCATION] are safe, but don't let your guard down as some types can contain hidden danger.

 Don't ignore any [Deserted Location|DESERTED-LOCATION] completely though - with great risk comes the possibility of great reward!
Translation: 大多数[废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]是安全的，但不要放松警惕，因为某些类型可能隐藏危险。不过也不要完全忽视任何[废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]，高风险也意味着高回报的可能！

Original: \n Most things do have explanatory tooltips so if you're ever confused look for text with a red drop-shadow, as mousing over it will provide a basic explanation. Note that this works even [COLOR:EMPHASIS]inside[/COLOR] other tooltips!\n
Translation: 大多数内容都有解释性提示框，所以如果你感到困惑，就寻找带红色投影的文本；鼠标移上去会提供基础说明。注意，这甚至在其他提示框[COLOR:EMPHASIS]内部[/COLOR]也有效！

Original: \n Mountains are impassable [Terrain|TERRAIN] too rugged to be of any economic or military use.\n
Translation: 山脉是不可通行的[地形|TERRAIN]，过于崎岖，无法用于经济或军事目的。

Original:
Move the mouse cursor over any word [in yellow|TOOLTIPS] to learn more about it.

 Your first order of business is [Training|TRAIN] one of your 3 [Clans|CLAN] so they can start [Harvesting|HARVEST] [FOOD] for your growing tribe.

 Press [HOTKEY:Esc] to close this message box, then press [HOTKEY:Spacebar] to open the Clans Screen.
Translation: 把鼠标移到任何[黄色词语|TOOLTIPS]上即可了解更多。你的第一项事务是[训练|TRAIN] 3 个[氏族|CLAN]中的一个，让它开始为成长中的部族[采集|HARVEST][FOOD]。按 [HOTKEY:Esc] 关闭此消息框，然后按 [HOTKEY:Spacebar] 打开氏族界面。

Original: \n My friend! I just want you to know how appreciative I am of our bond, and hope it grows even stronger in the future.\n
Translation: 我的朋友！我只是想让你知道，我多么感激我们之间的情谊，也希望它将来更加牢固。

Original: \n My ministers are saying we have a bit of a tax shortfall this year. This is something you can help me fix, correct? Let's say, 100 Treasure. I'll give you a year to prepare things.\n
Translation: 我的大臣们说，今年我们的税收有点短缺。你能帮我解决这个问题，对吧？就定为 100 财富。我给你一年时间准备。

Original: \n Nervous Leaders rarely make bold moves, and are usually easily bullied.
Translation: 紧张的领袖很少采取大胆行动，通常也很容易被欺压。

Original: \n Oh, hey, I'm here if you need me. Just so you know.\n
Translation: 哦，嘿，如果你需要我，我就在这里。只是让你知道。

Original:
Oil Cultivars [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [OIL] from [OLIVES] or [FLAX].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 油料栽培师会用[OLIVES]或[FLAX][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[OIL]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Oil is [Produced|PRODUCE] from [OLIVES] or [FLAX], and can be used in a few ways:

 [*]Traded to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] in exchange for other [Resources|RESOURCE].
 [*]Spent to [Train|TRAIN] Clans in some advanced [Professions|PROFESSION], especially in [HONOR].
 [*]Spent to [Heal|DAMAGE] wounded [Warriors|WARRIOR] (along with [CLOTH]).
Translation: 油由[OLIVES]或[FLAX][产出|PRODUCE]，用途有几种：[*]与[商队|CARAVAN]交易，换取其他[资源|RESOURCE]。[*]花费用于[训练|TRAIN]氏族成为部分高级[职业|PROFESSION]，尤其是[HONOR]类职业。[*]与[CLOTH]一起花费用于[治疗|DAMAGE]受伤的[战士|WARRIOR]。

Original:
Oil Pressers [Produce|PRODUCE] [OIL] from [OLIVES] or [FLAX].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 榨油工会用[OLIVES]或[FLAX][产出|PRODUCE][OIL]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Olives are automatically converted into [FOOD] when your tribe has nothing else to eat.

 A better use though is converting Olives into [OIL] with an [OIL-PRESSER].
Translation: 当你的部族没有其他东西可吃时，橄榄会自动转化为[FOOD]。不过更好的用途是让[OIL-PRESSER]把橄榄转化为[OIL]。

Original:
Once trained in a [Profession|PROFESSION] a [Clan|CLAN] gains [XP|XP] in its [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] each [Turn|TURN].

 Clans can switch Disciplines, but doing so resets their [Level|LEVEL] to 0. This is an especially serious penalty for very experienced Clans!
Translation: 一旦被训练成某个[职业|PROFESSION]，[氏族|CLAN]每[回合|TURN]都会在其[学科|DISCIPLINE]中获得[经验|XP]。氏族可以切换学科，但这样会把他们的[等级|LEVEL]重置为 0。对经验丰富的氏族来说，这是尤其严重的惩罚！

Original:
Once you have sufficient [Resources|RESOURCE] you may send [Clans|CLAN] to Rome to be [Trained|TRAIN] as [ROMAN-LEGION:S].

 Performing this action results in the Clan you choose disappearing from the map for 24 [Turns|TURN], after which it reappears in your Settlement in its new role. Once you have 5 Legions you may use them to claim the title of 'Magister Militum', which is one way of winning the game.
Translation: 拥有足够[资源|RESOURCE]后，你可以派遣[氏族|CLAN]前往罗马，接受[训练|TRAIN]成为[ROMAN-LEGION:S]。执行此行动后，你选择的氏族会从地图上消失 24 [回合|TURN]，随后以新身份重新出现在你的定居点中。当你拥有 5 个军团后，就可以用他们宣称“军事统帅”头衔，这是赢得游戏的一种方式。

Original:
Once you start [Harvesting|HARVEST] [TIMBER] you'll be able to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE], which are superior to the economic output of [Foragers|FORAGE] because they both [Produce|PRODUCE] more [Resources|RESOURCE] and also provide [Control|CONTROL] (which can be further expanded by spending [WEAPONS].

 However, [Structures|STRUCTURE] can only be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] on [Tiles|TILE] which you already [Control|CONTROL], so make sure to plan the placement of your [SETTLEMENT] accordingly.
Translation: 一旦你开始[采集|HARVEST][TIMBER]，就能[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]。建筑的经济产出优于[采集者|FORAGE]，因为它们既能[产出|PRODUCE]更多[资源|RESOURCE]，也能提供[控制|CONTROL]（还可以通过花费[WEAPONS]进一步扩展）。不过，[建筑|STRUCTURE]只能[建造|CONSTRUCT]在你已经[控制|CONTROL]的[地块|TILE]上，所以务必相应规划[SETTLEMENT]的位置。

Original:
Once you've [Learned|LEARN] a [Profession|PROFESSION] in one 'tier' of the research tree you can then [Study|STUDY] any [Profession|PROFESSION] in the next tier, allowing you to skip the others in the same tier if you'd like and move on to more advanced [Professions|PROFESSION].

 Some [Professions|PROFESSION] also allow you to [Study|STUDY] others related to it.
Translation: 一旦你[学习|LEARN]了研究树某一“层级”中的一个[职业|PROFESSION]，就可以[研究|STUDY]下一层级中的任意[职业|PROFESSION]，这样如果你愿意，就能跳过同层级的其他职业，转向更高级的[职业|PROFESSION]。有些[职业|PROFESSION]也允许你[研究|STUDY]与其相关的其他职业。

Original: \n Once you've [Learned|LEARN] a new [Profession|PROFESSION] you can start [Training|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in it. Make sure you can afford the [Resources|RESOURCE] it costs to do so though!\n
Translation: 一旦你[学习|LEARN]了新[职业|PROFESSION]，就可以开始把[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成该职业。不过要确保你负担得起所需[资源|RESOURCE]！

Original: \n One last thing to keep in mind is that although advanced [Cavalry Units|CAVALRY] are both fast and strong they also require 2 [Supply|SUPPLY] instead of 1, so keep this in mind when building and commanding your armies.\n
Translation: 最后要记住，虽然高级[骑兵单位|CAVALRY]又快又强，但它们需要 2 点[补给|SUPPLY]而不是 1 点，因此组建和指挥军队时务必考虑这一点。

Original: \n One of the most significant differences between AtG and other strategy games is that [SETTLEMENT:S] are capable of [Packing Up|PACKED] and [Moving|MOVE-POINT] between [Tiles|TILE] - however, a Packed Settlement can do nothing BUT move, so make sure to plan your moves carefully, as wasting turns will set back your economic development.\n
Translation: AtG 与其他战略游戏最显著的差异之一，是[SETTLEMENT:S]可以[打包|PACKED]并在[地块|TILE]之间[移动|MOVE-POINT]。然而，打包后的定居点除了移动什么也做不了，所以务必谨慎规划迁移；浪费回合会拖慢经济发展。

Original: \n One of your most important jobs is preventing your tribe from [Starving|STARVE]. You start with some [FOOD] in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE], but not enough to survive the [Winter|COLD], so make sure you start collecting more within a few months with a [Forager|FORAGE] like a [GATHERER] or [HUNTER].\n
Translation: 你最重要的职责之一，是防止部族[挨饿|STARVE]。你开局在[库存|STOCKPILE]中有一些[FOOD]，但不足以熬过[冬季|COLD]，所以务必在几个月内用[GATHERER]或[HUNTER]等[采集者|FORAGE]开始收集更多食物。

Original: \n One way to protect an [Army|ARMY] is by [Encamping|ENCAMP] it. Doing so consumes a full [Turn|TURN] and greatly reduces its [Defense Power|DEFENSE], but it's a vital tool when exploring or campaigning during the winter!\n
Translation: 保护[军队|ARMY]的一种方式是让其[扎营|ENCAMP]。这样会消耗完整一个[回合|TURN]，并大幅降低其[防御力|DEFENSE]，但在冬季探索或征战时，这是重要工具！

Original:
Only one [Clan|CLAN] can be [Trained|TRAIN] at a time across your entire tribe so think carefully about what you really want, and in what order.

 The number of Turns it takes to [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] is based on the Clan's [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], its [Level|LEVEL] in that Discipline, and how high the Level is of the [Profession|PROFESSION] in question. Being efficient is important, so try not to have [Clans|CLAN] switch [Disciplines|DISCIPLINE] too often, as this resets their [Level|LEVEL] back to 0.
Translation: 整个部族同一时间只能[训练|TRAIN]一个[氏族|CLAN]，所以要仔细考虑你真正想要什么，以及训练顺序。将[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成新职业所需的回合数取决于该氏族的[学科|DISCIPLINE]、它在该学科中的[等级|LEVEL]，以及目标[职业|PROFESSION]等级有多高。效率很重要，因此尽量不要让[氏族|CLAN]频繁切换[学科|DISCIPLINE]，因为这会把他们的[等级|LEVEL]重置为 0。

Original:
'Orange Crates' means a [Tile|TILE] will not provide the selected [Army|ARMY] with sufficient [Supply|SUPPLY]. 'Red Crates' indicates that the grace period has passed.

 There is no penalty for passing [COLOR:EMPHASIS]through[/COLOR] such [Tiles|TILE], but try to avoid ending your [Turn|TURN] on any of them!
Translation: “橙色箱子”表示某个[地块|TILE]不会为选中的[军队|ARMY]提供足够[补给|SUPPLY]。“红色箱子”表示宽限期已经过去。[COLOR:EMPHASIS]穿过[/COLOR]这些[地块|TILE]没有惩罚，但尽量避免在其上结束你的[回合|TURN]！

Original: \n Other important early-game [Resources|RESOURCE] include [KNOWLEDGE], which is what allows you to [Research|STUDY] new [Professions|PROFESSION], and [FAME], which helps you acquire new [Clans|CLAN] faster. You can also use [TREASURE] to buy [Resources|RESOURCE] or sell ones you have too much of when the [Caravan|CARAVAN] is visiting. [CLOTH] is necessary to expand your tribe's [Popcap|POPCAP] so that it can continue growing and adding new [Clans|CLAN].\n
Translation: 其他重要的早期[资源|RESOURCE]包括[KNOWLEDGE]，它让你能够[研究|STUDY]新的[职业|PROFESSION]；以及[FAME]，它帮助你更快获得新[氏族|CLAN]。[商队|CARAVAN]到访时，你也可以用[TREASURE]购买[资源|RESOURCE]，或出售自己过多的资源。[CLOTH]是扩大部族[人口上限|POPCAP]所必需的，这样部族才能继续成长并增加新[氏族|CLAN]。

Original: \n Out on the map you'll also encounter [Units|UNIT] belonging to other [Factions|FACTION]. If you have a [Warrior Unit|WARRIOR] you can engage in combat or capture someone else's undefended [Civilians|CIVILIAN], but be mindful of who the Unit actually belongs to, as some [Leaders|LEADER] can be quite strong!\n
Translation: 在地图上，你还会遇到属于其他[派系|FACTION]的[单位|UNIT]。如果你拥有[战士单位|WARRIOR]，可以投入战斗，或俘获他人无人防守的[平民|CIVILIAN]，但要注意该单位实际属于谁，因为有些[领袖|LEADER]相当强大！

Original:
Parchment is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Animals|ANIMAL] by [TRAPPER:S] or [Produced|PRODUCE] from [Stockpiled|STOCKPILE] Animals by [PARCHMENT-MAKER:S], and can be used in a variety of ways:

 [*][Training|TRAIN] Clans in some [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION] (especially those in [DISCOVERY]).
 [*]Spent to acquire some [Profession|PROFESSION] [Upgrades|UPGRADE].
 [*]Used to [Declare Your Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM].
 [*]Spent to remove [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT] or [Crimes|CRIME] from a Clan (via the [INSTRUCTOR]).
Translation: 羊皮纸由[TRAPPER:S]从[动物|ANIMAL]中[采集|HARVEST]，或由[PARCHMENT-MAKER:S]从[库存中的|STOCKPILE]动物中[产出|PRODUCE]，用途很多：[*][训练|TRAIN]氏族成为部分[平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，尤其是[DISCOVERY]类职业。[*]花费用于获得部分[职业|PROFESSION][升级|UPGRADE]。[*]用于[宣布你的王国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]。[*]花费用于从氏族身上移除[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]或[罪行|CRIME]（通过[INSTRUCTOR]）。

Original:
Parchment Makers [Produce|PRODUCE] [PARCHMENT] from [Animals|ANIMAL] added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] a [Pasture|PASTURE] on them. They are much more efficient in doing so than [TRAPPER:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 羊皮纸匠会从通过在[动物|ANIMAL]上[建造|CONSTRUCT][牧场|PASTURE]而加入你[库存|STOCKPILE]的动物中[产出|PRODUCE][PARCHMENT]。他们的效率远高于[TRAPPER:S]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Patrons [Produce|PRODUCE] an enormous amount of [FAME].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TREASURE].
Translation: 赞助人会[产出|PRODUCE]极大量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TREASURE]。

Original: \n Performing this action will cost [###:COST] [???:RESOURCE|###:COST] and increase this Clan's Mood from [???:CURRENT-MOOD] to [???:NEW-MOOD] for [###:NUM-TURNS] [Turn|Turns|###:NUM-TURNS].\n
Translation: 执行此行动将花费 [###:COST] [???:RESOURCE|###:COST]，并使该氏族的心情从[???:CURRENT-MOOD]提升到[???:NEW-MOOD]，持续 [###:NUM-TURNS] [回合|回合|###:NUM-TURNS]。

Original:
Pigs can be used in the same way as other [Animals|ANIMAL].

 1 [PIGS:SINGULAR] from your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] is automatically turned into 4 [FOOD] if the Tribe is starving.
Translation: 猪可以像其他[动物|ANIMAL]一样使用。如果部族正在挨饿，你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的 1 头[PIGS:SINGULAR]会自动转化为 4 [FOOD]。
