Original: \n Pious Leaders care a great deal about [Religion|RELIGION], both internally and what other Leaders believe.
Translation: 虔诚的领袖非常重视[宗教|RELIGION]，既重视本族信仰，也重视其他领袖信什么。

Original:
Ploughers increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of your [Farms|FARM].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires a small number of [HORSES].
Translation: 犁田工会提高你的[农场|FARM][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要少量[HORSES]。

Original: \n Popups and screens (including this one!) can be closed by pressing [HOTKEY:Esc]. If no screen is active [HOTKEY:Esc] will open the System Menu where you can save or load a game, quit, and so on.\n
Translation: 弹窗和界面（包括这个！）可以按 [HOTKEY:Esc] 关闭。如果没有活动界面，[HOTKEY:Esc] 会打开系统菜单，你可以在那里保存或读取游戏、退出等。

Original:
Potters increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of your [HUNTER:S], [GATHERER:S], and [REAPER:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TIMBER].
Translation: 陶工会提高你的[HUNTER:S]、[GATHERER:S]和[REAPER:S]的[产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TIMBER]。

Original: \n Pragmatic Leaders take a matter-of-fact approach to life, pursuing opportunities and avoiding dangers based on the situation.
Translation: 务实的领袖以实事求是的态度生活，会根据局势追求机会、避开危险。

Original:
Preservers use [SALT] to turn [FOOD] into a massive amount of [FOOD].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS] and [BOARDS].
Translation: 保藏师会用[SALT]把[FOOD]转化为巨量[FOOD]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]和[BOARDS]。

Original:
Priests [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [KNOWLEDGE], helping you [Learn|LEARN] new [Professions|PROFESSION] faster.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [OIL] and [CLOTH].
Translation: 祭司会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[KNOWLEDGE]，帮助你更快[学习|LEARN]新的[职业|PROFESSION]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[OIL]和[CLOTH]。

Original: \n Protective Leaders are concerned about losing what they have, and have a rather guarded approach to the world.\n
Translation: 保护欲强的领袖担心失去已有之物，因此对世界采取相当戒备的态度。

Original:
Rain is a temporary [Weather|WEATHER]-based [Terrain|TERRAIN] type which can be added to a [Tile|TILE].

 [*]Costs 1 additional [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Greatly increases the [Vision|VISION] cost to see into and out of.
Translation: 降雨是一种临时的、基于[天气|WEATHER]的[地形|TERRAIN]，可以添加到[地块|TILE]上。[*]进入时额外消耗 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]大幅增加看入和看出该地块所需的[视野|VISION]消耗。

Original:
Ranchers can [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Pastures|PASTURE] out of [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS] on [Animal Herds|ANIMAL], adding them to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] and allowing other [Clans|CLAN] to [Produce|PRODUCE] more advanced [Resources|RESOURCE] from them (e.g. [MEAT-CUTTER:S]).

 Later in the game, Ranchers can also be assigned to advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based Pastures as [Apprentices|APPRENTICE], each one doubling the number of Animals added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].
Translation: 牧场主可以在[动物群|ANIMAL]上用[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS][建造|CONSTRUCT][牧场|PASTURE]，把它们加入你的[库存|STOCKPILE]，并允许其他[氏族|CLAN]从中[产出|PRODUCE]更高级的[资源|RESOURCE]（例如[MEAT-CUTTER:S]）。游戏后期，牧场主还可以作为[学徒|APPRENTICE]分配到高级的[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]牧场，每名学徒都会使加入[库存|STOCKPILE]的动物数量翻倍。

Original:
Reapers can [Harvest|HARVEST] [WHEAT], [BARLEY] and [FLAX] by [Moving|MOVE-POINT] to any [Tile|TILE] containing a [source|DEPOSIT] of one of these [Plants|PLANT] and [Foraging|FORAGE]. They can also [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S].

 During [Cold|COLD] months Reapers are unable to Harvest anything - this can be a good time to use them to [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] nearby [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a Reaper can be a good way to keep your tribe fed at the start of the game.
Translation: 收割者可以通过[移动|MOVE-POINT]到含有[WHEAT]、[BARLEY]或[FLAX]等[植物|PLANT][来源|DEPOSIT]的[地块|TILE]并进行[采集|FORAGE]来[采集|HARVEST]这些资源。他们还可以[识别|UNIDENTIFIED][DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S]。[寒冷|COLD]月份里，收割者无法采集任何东西，这时可以让他们去[识别|UNIDENTIFIED]附近的[DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S]。游戏初期把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成收割者，是维持部族口粮的好办法。

Original: \n Remember that you can read these tips again at any time by pressing [HOTKEY:?] from the World Screen.\n
Translation: 记住，你随时可以在世界界面按 [HOTKEY:?] 重新阅读这些提示。

Original: \n Reserved Leaders don't like to talk, and will seldom contact you.
Translation: 寡言的领袖不喜欢交谈，很少主动联系你。

Original:
Rivers are a supreme [Terrain|TERRAIN] obstacle which cannot be crossed (unless frozen in the winter).

 Rivers should not be confused with the smaller, crossable [RIVER-SMALL:S].
Translation: 大河是极强的[地形|TERRAIN]障碍，无法穿越（除非在冬季结冰）。不要把大河与更小、可穿越的[RIVER-SMALL:S]混淆。

Original:
Salt is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [DEPOSIT-SALT:S] by [DIGGER:S] or [SALT-MINE-1:S], and can be used in a couple ways:

 [*]Traded to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] in exchange for other [Resources|RESOURCE].
 [*]Used by [Professions|PROFESSION] like the [BRINER] and [CHEESEMAKER] to greatly increase your [FOOD] [Production|PRODUCE].
Translation: 盐由[DIGGER:S]或[SALT-MINE-1:S]从[DEPOSIT-SALT:S]中[采集|HARVEST]，用途有几种：[*]与[商队|CARAVAN]交易，换取其他[资源|RESOURCE]。[*]供[BRINER]和[CHEESEMAKER]等[职业|PROFESSION]使用，大幅提高你的[FOOD][产出|PRODUCE]。

Original:
Scholars [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [KNOWLEDGE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 学者会[产出|PRODUCE]巨量[KNOWLEDGE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original:
Scorched is a temporary [Weather|WEATHER]-based [Terrain|TERRAIN] type which replaces whatever was previously on a [Tile|TILE].

 [*][Structures|STRUCTURE] on a Scorched Tile will shut down and go [Offline|OFFLINE].
 [*]Provides NO [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].
Translation: 焦土地是一种临时的、基于[天气|WEATHER]的[地形|TERRAIN]，会替换[地块|TILE]上原本的内容。[*]焦土地块上的[建筑|STRUCTURE]会停摆并[离线|OFFLINE]。[*]不会为[单位|UNIT]提供[补给|SUPPLY]。

Original:
Score is a general indicator of how well your game is going.

 [*]-2 for every [Turn|TURN] your tribe is [Starving|STARVE]

 [*]+3 per [Clan|CLAN]
 [*]+2 per [Structure|STRUCTURE] built, captured, or [Pillaged|PILLAGE]

 [*]+2 per [Roman|ROME] Clan killed
 [*]+2 per ship sunk
 [*]+1 per non-Roman Clan killed

 [*]+2 per [Bandit|BANDIT] Camp destroyed
 [*]+3 per Bandit Fort/Slave Camp destroyed
Translation: 分数是衡量你本局进展如何的总体指标。[*]你的部族每[回合|TURN][饥荒|STARVE]：-2[*]每个[氏族|CLAN]：+3[*]每座建造、占领或[劫掠|PILLAGE]过的[建筑|STRUCTURE]：+2[*]每杀死一个[罗马|ROME]氏族：+2[*]每击沉一艘船：+2[*]每杀死一个非罗马氏族：+1[*]每摧毁一个[强盗|BANDIT]营地：+2[*]每摧毁一个强盗堡垒/奴隶营：+3

Original:
Scribes [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [KNOWLEDGE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 书记官会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[KNOWLEDGE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original:
Sculptors [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [FAME] from [STONE-BLOCKS].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS] and that a [Clan|CLAN] has been [Ennobled|NOBLE].
Translation: 雕塑家会用[STONE-BLOCKS][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]，并且需要一个[氏族|CLAN]已被[晋封贵族|NOBLE]。

Original: \n Sensitive Leaders take everything very seriously and personally, good and bad.
Translation: 敏感的领袖会把一切都看得很严重、很个人化，无论好坏皆然。

Original: \n Shallow Water is a type of [Terrain|TERRAIN] that can be passed through by [GALLEY:S], and may contain valuable [sources|DEPOSIT] of [FISH] that can be harvested by a [FISHERMAN].\n
Translation: 浅水是一种[地形|TERRAIN]，[GALLEY:S]可以穿过，且可能含有可由[FISHERMAN]采集的珍贵[FISH][来源|DEPOSIT]。

Original:
Shearers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [WOOL], the amount being based on the number of [SHEEP] in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE]. Your Sheep are not harmed in the process!

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 剪毛工会[产出|PRODUCE]巨量[WOOL]，数量取决于你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的[SHEEP]数量。你的羊在这个过程中不会受伤！[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Sheep can be used in the same way as other [Animals|ANIMAL], and also used to create [CLOTH] with the help of a [WOOL-COLLECTOR] and [WEAVER].

 1 [SHEEP:SINGULAR] from your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] is automatically turned into 4 [FOOD] if the Tribe is starving.
Translation: 羊可以像其他[动物|ANIMAL]一样使用，也可以在[WOOL-COLLECTOR]和[WEAVER]帮助下用于制造[CLOTH]。如果部族正在挨饿，你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的 1 只[SHEEP:SINGULAR]会自动转化为 4 [FOOD]。

Original:
Shepherds allow your [Animal|ANIMAL] [Pastures|PASTURE] to [Produce|PRODUCE] new Livestock.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 牧羊人会让你的[动物|ANIMAL][牧场|PASTURE][产出|PRODUCE]新的牲畜。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original: \n Should there be anything you need my assistance with please don't hesitate to ask!\n
Translation: 如果你需要我协助任何事情，请尽管开口！

Original: \n Show your master how appreciative you are that he allows you to live.\n
Translation: 向你的主人证明，你很感激他允许你活着。

Original: \n Slaves are weaker than any other type of [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Unit|UNIT], but still pose a threat to undefended [Civilians|CIVILIAN]. They have high [Morale|MORALE] but very little [Power|POWER].\n
Translation: 奴隶比任何其他类型的[战士|WARRIOR][单位|UNIT]都弱，但仍会威胁无人防守的[平民|CIVILIAN]。他们[士气|MORALE]很高，但[战力|POWER]极低。

Original:
Sledge Drivers increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [TIMBER].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires a small number of [HORSES].
Translation: 雪橇车夫会提高你的[TIMBER][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要少量[HORSES]。

Original:
Smelters massively increase your [Production|PRODUCE] of [IRON].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STONE-BLOCKS], and they consume [COAL] each turn.
Translation: 熔炼工会极大提高你的[IRON][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STONE-BLOCKS]，并且每回合会消耗[COAL]。

Original:
Snow is a temporary [Season|SEASON]-based [Terrain|TERRAIN] type which replaces whatever was previously on a [Tile|TILE].

 [*]Costs 2 [Move PointS|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Provides NO [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].
Translation: 雪地是一种临时的、基于[季节|SEASON]的[地形|TERRAIN]，会替换[地块|TILE]上原本的内容。[*]进入需要 2 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]不会为[单位|UNIT]提供[补给|SUPPLY]。

Original: \n So then, is the food I requested last year ready to be picked up?\n
Translation: 那么，我去年要的食物准备好可以取了吗？

Original: \n So, do you have something for me?\n
Translation: 那么，你给我准备了什么吗？

Original: \n Sociable Leaders like to talk, and will contact you frequently.
Translation: 健谈的领袖喜欢交谈，会频繁联系你。

Original:
Soldiers will freely collect the [Supply|SUPPLY] they need when inside your [Control|CONTROL] or on favorable [Terrain|TERRAIN] (such as [FERTILE] [Tiles|TILE] in the summer).

 However, [Forests|FOREST], [HILL:S], [MARSH:S] and other rough [Terrain|TERRAIN] often do not provide this benefit. Certain [Professions|PROFESSION] require different amounts of [Supply|SUPPLY], so be sure to pay attention!
Translation: 士兵在你的[控制|CONTROL]内，或处于有利[地形|TERRAIN]（例如夏季的[FERTILE][地块|TILE]）上时，会自由获取所需[补给|SUPPLY]。然而，[森林|FOREST]、[HILL:S]、[MARSH:S]和其他崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]通常不会提供这种好处。某些[职业|PROFESSION]需要不同数量的[补给|SUPPLY]，所以务必注意！

Original:
Spearmen are the front-line [Warriors|WARRIOR] of At the Gates. Although feared by [Bandits|BANDIT] they are outclassed by [Cavalry|CAVALRY] on flat ground, though more capable in rough [Terrain|TERRAIN] and much cheaper.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [WEAPONS].
Translation: 长矛兵是《At the Gates》的前线[战士|WARRIOR]。他们令[强盗|BANDIT]畏惧，但在平坦地形上不如[骑兵|CAVALRY]；不过他们在崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]中更能发挥，而且便宜得多。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[WEAPONS]。

Original:
Steel Armor can be used to [Train|TRAIN] advanced [Infantry|INFANTRY] and [Cavalry|CAVALRY], and are required by some advanced [Upgrades|UPGRADE].

 Steel Armor is forged from [STEEL] by a [STEEL-ARMORSMITH].
Translation: 钢甲可用于[训练|TRAIN]高级[步兵|INFANTRY]和[骑兵|CAVALRY]，也是部分高级[升级|UPGRADE]的需求。钢甲由[STEEL-ARMORSMITH]使用[STEEL]锻造。
钢甲匠会用[STEEL][产出|PRODUCE][STEEL-ARMOR]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Steel can be forged into [STEEL-TOOLS], [STEEL-WEAPONS], and [STEEL-ARMOR] by advanced [METALWORKING] [Professions|PROFESSION].

 Steel is created from [IRON] and [COAL] by a [STEELMAKER].
Translation: 钢可以由高级[METALWORKING][职业|PROFESSION]锻造成[STEEL-TOOLS]、[STEEL-WEAPONS]和[STEEL-ARMOR]。钢由[STEELMAKER]使用[IRON]和[COAL]制造。

Original:
Steel Tools are needed to [Train|TRAIN] many advanced [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION], and are required by many advanced [Upgrades|UPGRADE].

 Steel Tools are forged from [STEEL] by a [STEELMAKER].
Translation: 钢制工具用于[训练|TRAIN]许多高级[平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，也是许多高级[升级|UPGRADE]的需求。钢制工具由[STEELMAKER]使用[STEEL]锻造。
钢制工具匠会用[STEEL][产出|PRODUCE][STEEL-TOOLS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Steel Weapons are needed to [Train|TRAIN] all advanced [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Professions|PROFESSION], and are required by some advanced [Upgrades|UPGRADE].

 Steel Weapons are forged from [STEEL] by a [STEEL-WEAPONSMITH].
Translation: 钢制武器用于[训练|TRAIN]所有高级[战士|WARRIOR][职业|PROFESSION]，也是部分高级[升级|UPGRADE]的需求。钢制武器由[STEEL-WEAPONSMITH]使用[STEEL]锻造。
钢制武器匠会用[STEEL][产出|PRODUCE][STEEL-WEAPONS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。
炼钢工会用[IRON]和[COAL][产出|PRODUCE][STEEL]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Steppes are a flat, dry type of [Terrain|TERRAIN].

 [*]Costs only 1 [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Provides 2 [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].

 These values are modified when a Steppe [Tile|TILE] also contains rough Terrain like a [Forest|FOREST] or [HILL], or is affected by [Cold|COLD] or [Weather|WEATHER].

 Steppes are home to a variety of [Harvestable|HARVEST] [Plants|PLANT] and [Animals|ANIMAL], such as [DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S] and [DEPOSIT-CATTLE:S].
Translation: 干草原是一种平坦、干燥的[地形|TERRAIN]。[*]进入只需 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]为[单位|UNIT]提供 2 点[补给|SUPPLY]。如果干草原[地块|TILE]还含有[森林|FOREST]或[HILL]等崎岖地形，或受到[寒冷|COLD]或[天气|WEATHER]影响，这些数值会改变。干草原也常有各种可[采集|HARVEST]的[植物|PLANT]和[动物|ANIMAL]，例如[DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S]和[DEPOSIT-CATTLE:S]。

Original: \n Stoic Leaders take life as it comes, and don't get too impressed or upset by much of anything.
Translation: 坚忍的领袖顺其自然，不太会因任何事情过分欣喜或沮丧。

Original:
Stone Blocks are created from [STONE] by a [BLOCK-CUTTER].

 Stock Blocks are a very important [Resource|RESOURCE], as they can be used to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] permanent [Structures|STRUCTURE] which never [Degrade|DEGRADE]. They're also required by some [Profession|PROFESSION] [Upgrades|UPGRADE].
Translation: 石块由[BLOCK-CUTTER]使用[STONE]制造。石块是非常重要的[资源|RESOURCE]，可用于[建造|CONSTRUCT]永不[损耗|DEGRADE]的永久性[建筑|STRUCTURE]。部分[职业|PROFESSION][升级|UPGRADE]也需要石块。

Original:
Stone is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Mineral Deposits|MINERAL] by [DIGGER:S] or [STONE-QUARRY-1:S].

 The main use of Stone is converting it into [STONE-BLOCKS] with a [BLOCK-CUTTER] and using those to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE] which never [Degrade|DEGRADE]. It can also be used in other miscellaneous ways, such as having a [STONECARVER] turn it into [FAME].
Translation: 石料由[DIGGER:S]或[STONE-QUARRY-1:S]从[矿藏|MINERAL]中[采集|HARVEST]。石料的主要用途是由[BLOCK-CUTTER]转化为[STONE-BLOCKS]，再用来[建造|CONSTRUCT]永不[损耗|DEGRADE]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]。它也能用于其他杂项用途，例如让[STONECARVER]把它转化为[FAME]。
石雕师会用[STONE][产出|PRODUCE][FAME]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original: \n Stopped by for a visit, it seems? You did not have permission to do that.\n
Translation: 看来你是来拜访的？你没有这样做的许可。

Original:
Streams are a major [Terrain|TERRAIN] obstacle.

 [*]Lose [COLOR:EMPHASIS]all[/COLOR] remaining [Move Points|MOVE-POINT] after entering.

 Streams should not be confused with larger, uncrossable [RIVER-LARGE:S].
Translation: 溪流是一种主要[地形|TERRAIN]障碍。[*]进入后失去[COLOR:EMPHASIS]全部[/COLOR]剩余[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。不要把溪流与更大、不可穿越的[RIVER-LARGE:S]混淆。

Original: \n Stubborn Leaders stick with a decision no matter what, regardless of consequences.
Translation: 固执的领袖一旦做出决定就会坚持到底，不顾后果。

Original: \n Such an insult. So be it then.\n

\n Supply Ships provide [Supply|SUPPLY] to adjacent land [Tiles|TILE], making them a vital element of any major naval operation. Unlike the Supply Camp, Supply Ships do not need to be within range of an existing [Supply|SUPPLY] source. It is impossible to [Besiege|SIEGE] Armies adjacent to a friendly Supply Ship.\n
Translation: 补给船会为相邻的陆地[地块|TILE]提供[补给|SUPPLY]，是任何大型海上行动的重要组成部分。与补给营地不同，补给船不需要位于现有[补给|SUPPLY]来源范围内。友方补给船旁边的军队无法被[围困|SIEGE]。

Original:
Surveyors can [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] ANY kind of [source of Resources|DEPOSIT] ([DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S].

 Like [EXPLORER:S] they ignore the [Movement|MOVE-POINT] penalty associated with rough [Terrain|TERRAIN].

 Surveyors can can also create [PATH:S] on [Map Tiles|TILE] to greatly speed [Movement|MOVE-POINT] through it, which can be especially helpful in [heavily-Forested|FOREST] areas.
Translation: 勘测员可以[识别|UNIDENTIFIED]任何种类的[资源来源|DEPOSIT]（[DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-PLANT:S]）。和[EXPLORER:S]一样，他们会无视崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]带来的[移动|MOVE-POINT]惩罚。勘测员还可以在[地图地块|TILE]上修建[PATH:S]，大幅加快[移动|MOVE-POINT]速度，在[森林茂密|FOREST]的区域尤其有用。

Original: \n Suspicious Leaders are unlikely to agree to much, and have a hard time fully trusting anyone or anything.
Translation: 多疑的领袖很少同意提议，也很难完全信任任何人或任何事。

Original:
Tailors [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [CLOTH] from [WOOL] or [FLAX].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 裁缝会用[WOOL]或[FLAX][产出|PRODUCE]大量[CLOTH]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Taking up most of the screen is the map, which is made up of [Tiles|TILE] and where most of the fun stuff happens.

 The most important thing on the map is your [SETTLEMENT], as it contains all of your [Clans|CLAN].

 The map also contains other [Structures|STRUCTURE], [Resource Deposits|DEPOSIT], friendly and enemy [Armies|ARMY], and more (e.g. [Deserted Locations|DESERTED-LOCATION]).
Translation: 占据屏幕大部分的是地图，它由[地块|TILE]组成，大多数有趣的事情都会在这里发生。地图上最重要的是你的[SETTLEMENT]，因为其中包含你所有的[氏族|CLAN]。地图还包含其他[建筑|STRUCTURE]、[资源矿藏|DEPOSIT]、友方和敌方[军队|ARMY]等等（例如[废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]）。

Original:
Tariff Collectors significantly increase the amount of [TREASURE] [Produced|PRODUCE] by your [TRADING-POST-1:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 关税官会显著提高你的[TRADING-POST-1:S][产出|PRODUCE][TREASURE]的数量。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original:
Thank you for being part of our alpha testing program!

 At the Gates is still missing a couple small features (e.g. [Faction Traits|FACTION-TRAIT], game setup options) and a lot of icons, text, and interface elements but is otherwise feature-complete. Even so, the balance and pacing of the game certainly still needs work, and you're very likely to run into crashes or other bugs as you play.
Translation: 感谢你参与我们的 Alpha 测试计划！《At the Gates》仍缺少少量小功能（例如[派系特质|FACTION-TRAIT]、游戏设置选项）以及许多图标、文本和界面元素，但除此之外功能已经完整。即便如此，游戏的平衡和节奏当然仍需要打磨，你在游玩时也很可能遇到崩溃或其他错误。
谢谢，我很欢迎这份礼物。

Original:
That last point is important - in one game you might have a huge source of [TREASURE] nearby, while in another you'll be battling the endless [winter|COLD] of the far north.

 For your first couple games we've made sure the map is somewhere in-between.
Translation: 最后一点很重要：在一局游戏中，你附近可能有巨大的[TREASURE]来源；而在另一局中，你可能要与遥远北方无尽的[寒冬|COLD]搏斗。为了你的前几局游戏，我们确保地图处在两者之间。

Original: \n The [Caravan|CARAVAN] is very important, as it allows you to exchange [Resources|RESOURCE] you have too much of for those you need. This means you can build up your economy to [Harvest|HARVEST] [WOOL] from [SHEEP], turn that into [CLOTH], and then trade it away for [WEAPONS] if you so desire. Don't be afraid to go all-in on a [Resource|RESOURCE]!\n
Translation: [商队|CARAVAN]非常重要，因为它允许你把过多的[资源|RESOURCE]换成你需要的资源。这意味着你可以发展经济，从[SHEEP][采集|HARVEST][WOOL]，把它转化为[CLOTH]，然后如果愿意，再交易成[WEAPONS]。不要害怕全力发展某种[资源|RESOURCE]！

Original:
The [Control Level|CONTROL] of a [Structure|STRUCTURE] or [SETTLEMENT] is equal to the [Border|BORDERS] distance, and this can be upgraded by spending [WEAPONS] to [Fortify|FORTIFY] it. The cost of doing so increases each time though, so only do so strategically.

 Note that [Foragers|FORAGE] may [Harvest Resources|HARVEST] from any Tile on the map, regardless of whether or not it's inside your [Borders|BORDERS] - don't forget that they still need [Supply|SUPPLY] though!
Translation: [建筑|STRUCTURE]或[SETTLEMENT]的[控制等级|CONTROL]等于[边境|BORDERS]距离，并且可以花费[WEAPONS][加固|FORTIFY]来升级。不过每次这样做费用都会提高，所以要有战略地使用。注意，[采集者|FORAGE]可以从地图上任何地块[采集资源|HARVEST]，无论它是否在你的[边境|BORDERS]内；但别忘了他们仍然需要[补给|SUPPLY]！

Original: \n The [SETTLEMENT] contains all of your tribe's [Clans|CLAN] (except for those you [Train|TRAIN] in [Active Professions|ACTIVE]). It can also Train one [Clan|CLAN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION] at a time, and because you'll only have a single [SETTLEMENT] how you choose to use this pipeline is very important.\n
Translation: [SETTLEMENT]包含你部族的所有[氏族|CLAN]（除了那些被[训练|TRAIN]为[主动职业|ACTIVE]的氏族）。它也可以一次训练一个[氏族|CLAN]成为一个[职业|PROFESSION]；由于你只有一个[SETTLEMENT]，如何使用这条训练管线非常重要。

Original: \n The [Tech Tree|TECH] is broken up into six branches, each based on a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE]. [Researching|STUDY] any [Tech|TECH] in a "row" will allow you to proceed onto ANY Tech in the next row up, so don't feel the need to Research everything - just prioritize what you need right now.\n
Translation: [科技树|TECH]分为六个分支，每个分支基于一种[学科|DISCIPLINE]。在某一“行”中[研究|STUDY]任意[科技|TECH]后，你就可以进入上一行的任意科技，因此不必觉得需要研究所有内容，优先研究你当前需要的即可。

Original: \n The [Victory|WINNING] Screen (F6) shows you how to win the game and how close you are to doing so. The Diplomacy Screen (F3) allows you to speak with other [Leaders|LEADER]. The [Clan|CLAN] Info Screen (F8) gives you a single place where you can keep track of your [Clans|CLAN], both inside and outside the [SETTLEMENT].\n
Translation: [胜利|WINNING]界面（F6）会显示如何赢得游戏，以及你离胜利还有多远。外交界面（F3）允许你与其他[领袖|LEADER]交谈。[氏族|CLAN]信息界面（F8）提供一个统一位置，用来追踪你的[氏族|CLAN]，无论他们在[SETTLEMENT]内还是在外。

Original: \n The 3 most important buttons are in the upper-right corner. The largest one is the "Task Button", which automatically points you toward the next important decision for the turn, or ends the turn if everything is addressed. This is also where important notifications will appear. The other two big buttons allow you to easily choose a [Clan|CLAN] to [Train|TRAIN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION] and choose a new [Tech|TECH] to [Research|STUDY].\n
Translation: 最重要的 3 个按钮位于右上角。最大的按钮是“任务按钮”，会自动指向本回合下一个重要决策；如果所有事项都已处理，它会结束回合。重要通知也会显示在这里。另外两个大按钮让你可以轻松选择一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成一个[职业|PROFESSION]，以及选择一项新[科技|TECH][研究|STUDY]。

Original:
The 3 most important screens in the game are the [Clans|CLAN] Screen, the [Training|TRAIN] Screen, and the [Research|STUDY] Screen. The latter two both show the "tree" of the [Professions|PROFESSION] that [Clans|CLAN] can be [Trained|TRAIN] in (once [Researched|LEARN]).

 Most other less-important game screens can be opened via one of the small buttons at the top of the World Screen (or via their associated hotkey).
Translation: 游戏中最重要的 3 个界面是[氏族|CLAN]界面、[训练|TRAIN]界面和[研究|STUDY]界面。后两个都会显示[氏族|CLAN]可以被[训练|TRAIN]成的[职业|PROFESSION]“树”（前提是已经[研究|LEARN]）。其他较不重要的游戏界面大多可以通过世界界面顶部的小按钮打开（或通过对应快捷键）。

Original:
The Archer is the first 'full-time' [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Profession|PROFESSION] available in At the Gates. They are useful in the early game but should be replaced with [SPEARMAN:S] if you expect heavy fighting.

 You can increase an Archer's [Power|POWER] by [Upgrading|UPGRADE] them with [WEAPONS] and [ARMOR].
Translation: 弓箭手是《At the Gates》中第一个“全职”[战士|WARRIOR][职业|PROFESSION]。他们在早期很有用，但如果你预期会有激烈战斗，应尽快用[SPEARMAN:S]替换。你可以用[WEAPONS]和[ARMOR]为弓箭手[升级|UPGRADE]，提高他们的[战力|POWER]。

Original: \n The changing of the [Seasons|SEASON] affects a Tile in 3 ways: whether or not [FOOD] can be [Harvested|HARVEST], the amount of [Supply|SUPPLY] available to [Units|UNIT], and how difficult it is to [Move|MOVE-POINT] into. [Weather|WEATHER], such as Rain and Blizzards can also randomly strike Tiles and dramatically affect their [Terrain|TERRAIN].\n
Translation: [季节|SEASON]变化会从 3 个方面影响地块：能否[采集|HARVEST][FOOD]、可供[单位|UNIT]使用的[补给|SUPPLY]数量，以及[移动|MOVE-POINT]进入地块有多困难。[天气|WEATHER]，例如降雨和暴风雪，也可能随机袭击地块并显著影响其[地形|TERRAIN]。

Original: \n The core of the game is your [SETTLEMENT] and the [Clans|CLAN] it contains. Click on the large 'house' button in the upper-right to see your [Clans|CLAN].\n
Translation: 游戏的核心是你的[SETTLEMENT]及其中的[氏族|CLAN]。点击右上角的大“房屋”按钮查看你的[氏族|CLAN]。

Original:
The effectiveness of individual [Clans|CLAN] can be improved by [Researching|STUDY] and then [purchasing Profession-based Upgrades|UPGRADE].

 In general, you'll want to focus on [Training|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in [Professions|PROFESSION] which relate directly to your on-map situation (e.g. [ARCHER:S] for fighting [Bandits|BANDIT], or a [DIGGER] to [Harvest|HARVEST] a [Mineral Deposit|MINERAL]).
Translation: 单个[氏族|CLAN]的效能可以通过[研究|STUDY]并[购买基于职业的升级|UPGRADE]来提高。一般来说，你应优先[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]成为与地图局势直接相关的[职业|PROFESSION]，例如用[ARCHER:S]对付[强盗|BANDIT]，或用[DIGGER][采集|HARVEST][矿藏|MINERAL]。

Original:
The first [Tech|TECH] in each [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] (colored branch) is special in that it doesn't unlock a new [Profession|PROFESSION] but instead allows you to choose one of your [Clans|CLAN] to [Level Up|LEVEL] in that [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] (making it faster to [Train|TRAIN] them in [Professions|PROFESSION] in the same [Discipline|DISCIPLINE]).

 You can press F1 from the World Screen or use the big button in the far upper-right corner to open up the [Research|STUDY] Screen.
Translation: 每个[学科|DISCIPLINE]（彩色分支）的第一项[科技|TECH]很特殊，它不会解锁新[职业|PROFESSION]，而是允许你选择一个[氏族|CLAN]在该[学科|DISCIPLINE]中[升级|LEVEL]（使他们在同一[学科|DISCIPLINE]中被[训练|TRAIN]成[职业|PROFESSION]更快）。你可以在世界界面按 F1，或使用最右上角的大按钮打开[研究|STUDY]界面。

Original:
The Fisherman is a water-based [Profession|PROFESSION] which can [Harvest|HARVEST] large amounts of [FISH] from [DEPOSIT-FISH:S] by [Foraging|FORAGE].

 They can only be [Trained|TRAIN] when your [SETTLEMENT] is next to a large body of water.

 If you spot one or two [sources|DEPOSIT] of [FISH] nearby consider training a Fisherman, as this can be a great way to feed your tribe in the early game.
Translation: 渔夫是水域相关的[职业|PROFESSION]，可以通过[采集|FORAGE][DEPOSIT-FISH:S]来[采集|HARVEST]大量[FISH]。只有当你的[SETTLEMENT]毗邻大片水域时才能[训练|TRAIN]他们。如果你看到附近有一两个[FISH][来源|DEPOSIT]，可以考虑训练渔夫；这在游戏初期是供养部族的好办法。

Original:
The game also has several hotkeys to assist in navigating the interface, which will appear when mousing over a button that has a corresponding key.

 The most important keys are the spacebar, which opens the [Clans|CLAN] Screen, and ENTER, which ends the turn or activates the next unresolved high-priority notification.
Translation: 游戏也有若干快捷键帮助你浏览界面；当鼠标悬停在有对应按键的按钮上时，会显示这些快捷键。最重要的按键是空格键，它会打开[氏族|CLAN]界面；以及 ENTER，它会结束回合，或激活下一个尚未处理的高优先级通知。

Original: \n The initial stock of [Resources|RESOURCE] available at the [Caravan|CARAVAN] is quite limited, but by spending [TREASURE] to upgrade it you can dramatically increase both the quantity and quality of what it sells. If you need more of something or something that's not yet available spending [TREASURE] to upgrade the [Caravan|CARAVAN] can be a wise investment.\n
Translation: [商队|CARAVAN]最初可用的[资源|RESOURCE]库存相当有限，但通过花费[TREASURE]升级商队，你可以显著提高其出售货物的数量和质量。如果你需要更多某种东西，或需要目前尚未供应的东西，花费[TREASURE]升级[商队|CARAVAN]可能是明智投资。

Original:
The large button in the upper-right which currently says 'Choose Profession' is the 'Turn Agenda' button. It either tells you what needs immediate attention this turn or allows you to proceed to the next turn if all pressing matters have been addressed.

 When in doubt, let this button be your guide for what you should do next!
Translation: 右上角当前写着“选择职业”的大按钮是“回合议程”按钮。它要么告诉你本回合需要立刻关注的事情，要么在所有紧急事项都已处理后允许你进入下一回合。拿不准时，就让这个按钮指引你下一步该做什么！

Original:
The large rectangular button in the upper-right is the 'Turn Agenda Button', which will always direct you towards what's important to pay attention to right now.

 Notifications slide in on the right side of the screen, and inform you of important events. Some Notifications are 'blocking', which means they must be addressed before you can end the [Turn|TURN].
Translation: 右上角的大矩形按钮是“回合议程按钮”，它会始终指引你关注当前最重要的事情。通知会从屏幕右侧滑入，告知你重要事件。有些通知是“阻塞式”的，意味着你必须先处理它们才能结束[回合|TURN]。

Original: \n The Lord wishes to help guide you. Will you heed his call?\n
Translation: 主愿意帮助指引你。你会回应祂的召唤吗？

Original:
The more advanced the [Profession|PROFESSION] the higher the [Level|LEVEL] it requires.

 You can still [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] in a Profession of a higher Level, but doing so will require more [Turns|TURN] - sometimes significantly more. It is a good idea to plan out ahead of time which Professions you want which Clans to serve in.
Translation: [职业|PROFESSION]越高级，需要的[等级|LEVEL]就越高。你仍然可以把[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成更高等级的职业，但这会需要更多[回合|TURN]，有时多得多。提前规划哪些氏族要担任哪些职业是个好主意。

Original:
The more Knowledge you [Produce|PRODUCE] the faster you can [Learn|LEARN] new [Professions|PROFESSION] to [Train|TRAIN] your [Clans|CLAN] in and [Upgrades|UPGRADE] to make them even more powerful.

 You start the game [Producing|PRODUCE] 4 Knowledge per [Turn|TURN], but this number can be increased dramatically by Training Clans in Knowledge-Producing Professions like [LOREKEEPER], [PRIEST], and [TINKERER].
Translation: 你[产出|PRODUCE]的知识越多，就能越快[学习|LEARN]新的[职业|PROFESSION]来[训练|TRAIN]你的[氏族|CLAN]，也能更快学习[升级|UPGRADE]使他们更强。游戏开始时你每[回合|TURN][产出|PRODUCE] 4 点知识，但可以通过把氏族训练成[LOREKEEPER]、[PRIEST]、[TINKERER]等产出知识的职业来大幅提高。

Original:
The most important buttons in the interface are in the upper-right corner of the screen.

 The button which looks like a big house takes you to the 'Clan Management Screen'. This is the hub of your tribe, and the most important screen in the game.

 Other buttons in this area allow you to expand your tribe's [Clan Limit (popcap)|POPCAP], and modify which [Profession|PROFESSION] you're currently [Studying|STUDY] and [Training|TRAIN] a Clan in.
Translation: 界面中最重要的按钮位于屏幕右上角。看起来像大房子的按钮会带你前往“氏族管理界面”。这是你部族的中枢，也是游戏中最重要的界面。该区域的其他按钮可以扩展部族的[氏族上限（人口上限）|POPCAP]，并修改你当前正在[研究|STUDY]和[训练|TRAIN]某个氏族的[职业|PROFESSION]。

Original: \n The most important screen in the game besides the World Screen is the [Clans|CLAN] Screen. You can press the spacebar to open or close it. This screen shows you all of the [Clans|CLAN] in your [SETTLEMENT], which you can [Train|TRAIN] in various [Professions|PROFESSION]. It also includes a few important but rare tribe-level actions, such as [Founding a Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM]. You'll spend a lot of time in this screen!\n
Translation: 除世界界面外，游戏中最重要的界面是[氏族|CLAN]界面。你可以按空格键打开或关闭它。此界面会显示你[SETTLEMENT]中的所有[氏族|CLAN]，你可以把他们[训练|TRAIN]成各种[职业|PROFESSION]。它还包含少数重要但不常用的部族级行动，例如[建立王国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]。你会花很多时间在这个界面里！

Original: \n The number on the right side of each button shows how many [Turns|TURN] of [Study|STUDY] are needed to [Learn|LEARN] that [Profession|PROFESSION], and make it possible to [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in it. The amount of time it takes is based on how much [KNOWLEDGE] it requires and how much you're producing each [Turn|TURN].\n
Translation: 每个按钮右侧的数字显示[学习|LEARN]该[职业|PROFESSION]、并使其可用于[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]需要多少[研究|STUDY][回合|TURN]。所需时间取决于它需要多少[KNOWLEDGE]，以及你每[回合|TURN]产出多少。

Original: \n The only downsides are that the [Caravan|CARAVAN] isn't always available, and its stock of [Resources|RESOURCE] starts off small. You can only exchange Resources with the Caravan 3 times per year (spring, summer, and autumn), so make those visits count.\n
Translation: 唯一的缺点是[商队|CARAVAN]并不总是可用，而且其[资源|RESOURCE]库存一开始很少。你每年只能与商队交易 3 次资源（春、夏、秋），所以要让每次来访都有价值。

Original:
The only other thing you need to do this turn is decide which [Tech|TECH] to start [Studying|STUDY].

 Close this message box, then press the button that says 'Not Studying Profession' in the upper-right corner of the screen.
Translation: 本回合你唯一还需要做的事，是决定开始[研究|STUDY]哪项[科技|TECH]。关闭此消息框，然后点击屏幕右上角写着“未研究职业”的按钮。

Original:
The only way to Identify an [Unidentified Deposit|UNIDENTIFIED] is by having a [Forager|FORAGE], [Builder|CONSTRUCT], or [SURVEYOR] inspect it.

 You should generally start doing so as soon as possible, as all successful empires are built on a steady flow of [Resources|RESOURCE]!
Translation: 识别[未识别矿藏|UNIDENTIFIED]的唯一办法，是让[采集者|FORAGE]、[建造者|CONSTRUCT]或[SURVEYOR]检查它。通常你应该尽早这样做，因为所有成功帝国都建立在稳定的[资源|RESOURCE]流动之上！

Original: \n The time for talk is over.\n

\n The two other important screens are the [Training|TRAIN] Screen (accessed from the [Clans|CLAN] Screen) and the [Research|STUDY] Screen (hotkey: F1). Both show you the [Professions|PROFESSION] you can choose to [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] in or Research. The Research Screen also includes a number of other bonuses you can acquire besides unlocking new [Professions|PROFESSION].\n
Translation: 另外两个重要界面是[训练|TRAIN]界面（从[氏族|CLAN]界面进入）和[研究|STUDY]界面（快捷键：F1）。两者都会显示你可以选择[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]或研究的[职业|PROFESSION]。研究界面还包含除解锁新[职业|PROFESSION]之外的其他多种可获得加成。

Original: \n The two other special [Factions|FACTION] are the [Bandits|BANDIT] and the [Neutrals|NEUTRAL]. Neither one has a [Leader|LEADER] or conducts diplomacy, and you're permanently at war with both. Bandits will actively come after you, while the Neutrals keep to themselves and possess various useful [Structures|STRUCTURE] around the map that you can freely "incorporate" into your tribe (should you defeat any defenders present).\n
Translation: 另外两个特殊[派系|FACTION]是[强盗|BANDIT]和[中立者|NEUTRAL]。两者都没有[领袖|LEADER]，也不进行外交，你与它们永久交战。强盗会主动追杀你，而中立者各自为政，在地图上拥有各种有用[建筑|STRUCTURE]，你可以自由将其“并入”部族（前提是击败在场防御者）。

Original: \n The world out there is a cruel one, so know that I'll lend a hand if I can.\n
Translation: 外面的世界很残酷，所以请记住，如果可以，我会伸出援手。

Original: \n The World Screen is where you'll spend most of your time, and is mostly taken up by the map. The 3 most important buttons are located in the upper-right, and involve making high-level decisions which affect your tribe. The Selection Panel appears in the lower-left corner when you click on a map object, and provides you with information and commands related to it.\n
Translation: 世界界面是你花费最多时间的地方，主要由地图组成。最重要的 3 个按钮位于右上角，涉及影响部族的高层决策。当你点击地图对象时，选择面板会出现在左下角，提供相关信息和命令。

Original:
There are 2 [ways to win|WINNING] in AtG:

 [*] Conquering the [Capital City|CAPITAL] of one of the two [Roman Empire Factions|ROME].

 [*] Becoming 'Magister Militum' and taking over [Rome|ROME] from within by sending five [Clans|CLAN] to become Roman Legions.

 Note that there are two Roman [Factions|FACTION]: the Eastern and Western halves of the previously-whole-in-better-days Roman Empire, and either one can satisfy your [Victory Conditions|WINNING].
Translation: AtG 有 2 种[获胜方式|WINNING]：[*]征服两个[罗马帝国派系|ROME]之一的[首都|CAPITAL]。[*]成为“军事统帅”，派出五个[氏族|CLAN]成为罗马军团，从内部接管[罗马|ROME]。注意，罗马[派系|FACTION]有两个：曾经完整而辉煌的罗马帝国的东西两半，任意一方都能满足你的[胜利条件|WINNING]。

Original:
There are 3 types of [Resources|RESOURCE]: [Plants|PLANT], [Animals|ANIMAL], and [Minerals|MINERAL]. Each is useful in different ways.

 [Harvesting Resources|HARVEST] is important, but you'll eventually want to also Refine them into more advanced [Resources|RESOURCE] (such as [IRON] into [WEAPONS], or [WOOL] into [CLOTH]). Many [Professions|PROFESSION] you can unlock though [Research|STUDY] relate to [Resource|RESOURCE] refinement, so refer to the tree for ideas on what strategies you can pursue.
Translation: [资源|RESOURCE]有 3 类：[植物|PLANT]、[动物|ANIMAL]和[矿物|MINERAL]。每一类都有不同用途。[采集资源|HARVEST]很重要，但你最终也会想把它们精炼成更高级的[资源|RESOURCE]（例如把[IRON]变成[WEAPONS]，或把[WOOL]变成[CLOTH]）。许多可通过[研究|STUDY]解锁的[职业|PROFESSION]都与[资源|RESOURCE]精炼有关，因此可以查看科技树来构思可行策略。

Original: \n There are a variety of other [Seasonal|SEASON] and unpredictable [Weather|WEATHER] effects which can affect a Tile, including Blizzards, Floods, and Droughts. AtG's map is very dynamic, and you need account for this in your plans. A particularly harsh [Winter|COLD] can unravel even well-prepared rulers both economically and on the battlefield.\n
Translation: 还有各种[季节性|SEASON]和不可预测的[天气|WEATHER]效果会影响地块，包括暴风雪、洪水和干旱。AtG 的地图非常动态，你需要把这一点纳入计划。特别严酷的[冬季|COLD]甚至会在经济和战场上摧毁准备充分的统治者。

Original:
There are also other [Factions|FACTION] in the world who have already been on the map for a while - some are immensely strong right at the start of the game.

 You're not directly competing with anyone in AtG, but that doesn't mean you can ignore your neighbors. [The other Leaders|LEADER] can have strong [Personalities|LEADER-TRAIT] (and militaries) and if you upset someone you might come to regret it.
Translation: 世界上还有其他已经在地图上存在一段时间的[派系|FACTION]，其中一些从游戏一开始就极其强大。在 AtG 中，你并不直接与任何人竞争，但这并不意味着你可以无视邻居。[其他领袖|LEADER]可能拥有强烈的[个性|LEADER-TRAIT]（以及军队），如果你激怒了某人，可能会后悔。

Original:
There are five types of [Deserted Locations|DESERTED-LOCATION], each offering a different set of possible rewards.

 Some (like 'Deserted Farms') are common and provide useful but small rewards like a small stockpile of [FOOD].

 Others (like 'Deserted Cities') are quite rare and valuable, so when you see one make sure to grab it before someone else does!
Translation: [废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]有五种类型，每种提供不同的可能奖励。有些（如“废弃农场”）很常见，提供小量[FOOD]库存等有用但不大的奖励。另一些（如“废弃城市”）相当稀有而宝贵，所以看到时一定要在别人之前拿下！

Original: \n There are several [other tribes|FACTION] spread across the map, and you'll usually encounter a few within the first year or two of a game. Tribes are each unique in both their strength and behavior, the latter of which is determined by its [Leader|LEADER]'s [Personality|LEADER-TRAIT]. You're not competing directly with any of the other [Factions|FACTION] for [Victory|WINNING], though they can pose a serious obstacle to acquiring [Resources|RESOURCE] - and on the battlefield.\n
Translation: 地图上分布着几个[其他部族|FACTION]，通常你会在游戏最初一两年内遇到其中几个。每个部族在实力和行为上都独一无二，后者由其[领袖|LEADER]的[性格|LEADER-TRAIT]决定。你不会与其他[派系|FACTION]直接争夺[胜利|WINNING]，但它们可能成为你获取[资源|RESOURCE]的严重障碍，也可能在战场上成为阻碍。

Original:
There are several [Unidentified Deposits|UNIDENTIFIED] near your starting location. They appear dark and 'shrouded' when first discovered.

 You can narrow down what an [Unidentified Deposit|UNIDENTIFIED] is based on its appearance ([Plant|PLANT], [Mineral|MINERAL], or [Animal|ANIMAL]), but it can't be used until Identified.
Translation: 你的起始位置附近有几个[未识别矿藏|UNIDENTIFIED]。它们刚被发现时显得阴暗而“遮蔽”。你可以根据外观缩小[未识别矿藏|UNIDENTIFIED]的类型范围（[植物|PLANT]、[矿物|MINERAL]或[动物|ANIMAL]），但在识别前不能使用。

Original: \n There are several places in the game where you can write small notes to yourself to keep track of things. Right-clicking on either a [Clan|CLAN] Card or a map Tile (when nothing is selected) will allow you to attach a note to that [Clan|CLAN] or Tile. The Clan Card notes are especially useful, as this adds a colored label right to the card itself. You can use the button in the upper left corner of the World Screen or press F5 to write game-wide notes for yourself.\n
Translation: 游戏中有几处可以给自己写小备注，用来追踪事务。右键点击[氏族|CLAN]卡片或地图地块（未选中任何对象时），可以给该[氏族|CLAN]或地块附加备注。氏族卡片备注特别有用，因为它会直接在卡片上添加彩色标签。你也可以使用世界界面左上角的按钮，或按 F5，为自己写全局游戏备注。

Original: \n There are two [Turns|TURN] per month, and 24 each year. Which season it is greatly affects how the game plays ([Farms|FARM] stop producing [FOOD] during the winter, for example).\n
Translation: 每个月有两个[回合|TURN]，每年 24 回合。当前季节会极大影响玩法（例如[农场|FARM]在冬季停止产出[FOOD]）。

Original:
There are two types of [Professions|PROFESSION] you can [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in: [Active|ACTIVE] and [Settled|SETTLED].

 Being in an Active Profession allows a Clan to move around the map, either to explore, fight, or [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] on the map.

 Clans in Settled Professions remain in the [SETTLEMENT], and typically provide economic bonuses, such as converting [IRON] into [WEAPONS] or increasing the rate at which you [Learn|LEARN] new Professions.
Translation: 你可以把[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成两类[职业|PROFESSION]：[主动|ACTIVE]和[定居|SETTLED]。处于主动职业的氏族可以在地图上移动，用于探索、战斗，或从地图上的[矿藏|DEPOSIT][采集|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。处于定居职业的氏族留在[SETTLEMENT]内，通常提供经济加成，例如把[IRON]转化为[WEAPONS]，或提高你[学习|LEARN]新职业的速度。

Original:
There are various small buttons on the World Screen which will open screens which provide more info or provide other useful tools, such as a notepad to keep track of your thoughts.

 There are also several other cool interface features you can learn more about by selecting "Advanced Interface Concepts" below.
Translation: 世界界面上有各种小按钮，可打开提供更多信息的界面或其他有用工具，例如用于记录想法的记事本。还有其他一些很实用的高级界面功能，你可以在下方选择“高级界面概念”了解更多。

Original: \n There are vermin which need killing. I'll verify you've completed this task durin my next visit a year from now.\n
Translation: 有些害虫该被除掉。我会在一年后下次来访时确认你是否完成了这项任务。

Original: \n There's something expensive I'd like to decorate my great hall with - you'll cover this expense for me, right? It will cost 100 Treasure. There's no hurry though. A year should be enough time, right?\n
Translation: 我想用一件昂贵的东西装饰我的大厅，这笔开销你会替我支付，对吧？需要 100 财富。不过不急。一年应该够了吧？

Original: \n There's something I'd like to decorate my great hall with - you'll cover this expense for me, right?\n
Translation: 我想用一件东西装饰我的大厅，这笔开销你会替我支付，对吧？

Original: \n This [Clan|CLAN] is made up of unemployed peasants who eat [FOOD] but don't [Produce|PRODUCE] anything. [Train|TRAIN] them in a [Profession|PROFESSION] as soon as you can!\n
Translation: 这个[氏族|CLAN]由无业农民组成，会消耗[FOOD]，但不会[产出|PRODUCE]任何东西。尽快把他们[训练|TRAIN]成一个[职业|PROFESSION]！

Original:
This early form of Knights began to see use as the Roman Empire still clung to life. They are unmatched on the battlefield, but extremely expensive to [Train|TRAIN] and less effective in rough [Terrain|TERRAIN] due to their [Supply|SUPPLY] cost. The bulky armor they wear makes them not much faster than [Infantry|INFANTRY] but woe to any foe which dares stand and fights!

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-WEAPONS], [STEEL-ARMOR], [WARHORSES], and that a [Clan|CLAN] has been [Ennobled|NOBLE].
Translation: 这种早期形态的骑士在罗马帝国仍苟延残喘时开始出现。他们在战场上无可匹敌，但[训练|TRAIN]极其昂贵，并且因为[补给|SUPPLY]消耗较高，在崎岖[地形|TERRAIN]中效果较差。他们身穿厚重铠甲，速度并不比[步兵|INFANTRY]快多少；但任何胆敢正面迎战的敌人都要遭殃！[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-WEAPONS]、[STEEL-ARMOR]、[WARHORSES]，并且需要一个[氏族|CLAN]已被[晋封贵族|NOBLE]。

Original:
This is all you need to do on the first turn, though next turn you'll have a a shiny new [Unit|UNIT] ready to begin exploring or [Harvesting Resources|HARVEST] from the map.

 The most important task you need to address will always be displayed in the glowing button in the upper-right corner of the World Screen.
Translation: 第一回合你只需要做这些；不过下一回合，你会有一个崭新的[单位|UNIT]准备开始探索，或从地图上[采集资源|HARVEST]。你当前最重要的任务会始终显示在世界界面右上角发光的按钮中。

Original:
This is the '[Study|STUDY] Screen'. It looks very similar to the '[Training|TRAIN] Screen', but instead shows the [Professions|PROFESSION] you can unlock over the course of the game.

 Your tribe can [Study|STUDY] one new [Profession|PROFESSION] at a time.
Translation: 这是“[研究|STUDY]界面”。它看起来很像“[训练|TRAIN]界面”，但显示的是你在游戏过程中可以解锁的[职业|PROFESSION]。你的部族一次可以[研究|STUDY]一个新[职业|PROFESSION]。

Original:
This is your [SETTLEMENT], the economic and social hub of your Tribe - as nomads at heart you'll only ever have one, so make sure to take good care of it!

 Living inside are your [Clans|CLAN], who can help explore, develop, and conquer the world after each is [Trained|TRAIN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION].

 You can click the big 'house' button in the upper-right or press [HOTKEY:Spacebar] to view new Clans and manage the ones you already have.
Translation: 这是你的[SETTLEMENT]，部族的经济和社会中枢；由于你们本质上是游牧者，你永远只会拥有一个，所以务必照顾好它！生活在其中的是你的[氏族|CLAN]，每个氏族被[训练|TRAIN]成一个[职业|PROFESSION]后，都能帮助探索、发展和征服世界。你可以点击右上角的大“房屋”按钮，或按 [HOTKEY:Spacebar] 查看新氏族并管理已有氏族。

Original: \n This screen is also where you can tell a [Settled|SETTLED] [Clan|CLAN] to stop working (usually only when in a [Profession|PROFESSION] that [Consumes|CONSUME] [Resources|RESOURCE] you want to preserve), or an [Active|ACTIVE] Clan which has temporarily rejoined the [SETTLEMENT] to return to the map.\n
Translation: 此界面也可以命令一个[定居|SETTLED][氏族|CLAN]停止工作（通常只在其[职业|PROFESSION]会[消耗|CONSUME]你想保留的[资源|RESOURCE]时使用），或命令暂时返回[SETTLEMENT]的[主动|ACTIVE]氏族回到地图上。

Original:
This screen shows the [Professions|PROFESSION] you can [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] in. Your Tribe can Train one Clan at a time.

 It looks very similar to the '[Study|STUDY] Screen', and like it, the number on the right side of each button shows how many turns it takes to [Train|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] in that [Profession|PROFESSION] (if you opened this screen by clicking on a specific Clan).
Translation: 此界面显示你可以把[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成的[职业|PROFESSION]。你的部族一次可以训练一个氏族。它看起来很像“[研究|STUDY]界面”；与研究界面一样，每个按钮右侧的数字显示将[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成该[职业|PROFESSION]需要多少回合（如果你是通过点击某个特定氏族打开此界面）。

Original:
This screen shows your [Settled|SETTLED] [Clans|CLAN], which are those in your [SETTLEMENT] able to be [Trained|TRAIN] in a new [Profession|PROFESSION].

 Your Settlement can only [Train|TRAIN] one [Clan|CLAN] at a time, and you almost always want to be doing so!
Translation: 此界面显示你的[定居|SETTLED][氏族|CLAN]，也就是位于[SETTLEMENT]内、可以被[训练|TRAIN]成新[职业|PROFESSION]的氏族。你的定居点一次只能[训练|TRAIN]一个[氏族|CLAN]，而你几乎总是应该在训练！

Original: \n Tiles within your [Borders|BORDERS] always provide as much [Supply|SUPPLY] as needed. To avoid taking damage when Supply is lacking a [Unit|UNIT] may [Encamp|ENCAMP]. This also provides the Unit with enough [Supply|SUPPLY] for an additional turn, allowing it to continue with whatever task it was occupied with. This slows [Units|UNIT] down a bit, but the real risk is that it makes them extremely vulnerable to attack, so avoid [Encamping|ENCAMP] when enemies might be nearby.\n
Translation: 你[边境|BORDERS]内的地块始终提供所需的全部[补给|SUPPLY]。缺少补给时，为避免受伤，[单位|UNIT]可以[扎营|ENCAMP]。这也会为该单位额外提供一回合所需的[补给|SUPPLY]，使其能继续当前任务。这会让[单位|UNIT]稍微变慢，但真正的风险是会使它们极易受到攻击，所以当附近可能有敌人时，避免[扎营|ENCAMP]。

Original:
Tillers increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of all [Farms|FARM].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 耕作者会提高所有[农场|FARM]的[产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Timber is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Forests|FOREST] by [WOOD-COLLECTOR:S] or [LOGGING-CAMP-1:S], and can be used in a variety of ways:

 [*]Traded to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] in exchange for other [Resources|RESOURCE].
 [*]Used for economically-useful purposes (such as having a [WOODCARVER] turn it into [FAME].
 [*]Converted into [BOARDS] by a [WOODSPLITTER].
Translation: 木材由[WOOD-COLLECTOR:S]或[LOGGING-CAMP-1:S]从[森林|FOREST]中[采集|HARVEST]，用途很多：[*]与[商队|CARAVAN]交易，换取其他[资源|RESOURCE]。[*]用于有经济价值的用途，例如让[WOODCARVER]把它转化为[FAME]。[*]由[WOODSPLITTER]转化为[BOARDS]。

Original:
Tinkerers [Produce|PRODUCE] a large amount of [KNOWLEDGE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 修补匠会[产出|PRODUCE]大量[KNOWLEDGE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
To learn more about any [EMPHASISed concept|TILE] simply hover your mouse over it. You can then hover over other EMPHASISed words, and go as deep (or not) as you want!

 You can also revisit any of these tutorial messages, including optional ones you chose not to view by clicking on the '?' button in the upper left.
Translation: 要了解任何[强调概念|TILE]，只需把鼠标悬停在其上。之后你还可以继续悬停在其他强调词语上，想深入到哪里都可以！你也可以点击左上角的“?”按钮，重新查看任何教程消息，包括你选择不看的可选消息。

Original: \n To move you'll need to first [Pack Up|PACKED] your [SETTLEMENT], which takes a [Turn|TURN]. While Packed your Settlement won't be able to [Train|TRAIN] any [Clans|CLAN], so plan your moves carefully.\n
Translation: 要迁移，首先需要[打包|PACKED]你的[SETTLEMENT]，这会花费一个[回合|TURN]。打包期间，定居点无法[训练|TRAIN]任何[氏族|CLAN]，所以要谨慎规划迁移。

Original:
Tools are needed to [Train|TRAIN] many [Settled|SETTLED] [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION], and are required by many early game [Upgrades|UPGRADE].

 Tools are forged from [IRON] by a [BLACKSMITH].
Translation: 工具用于[训练|TRAIN]许多[定居|SETTLED][平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，也是许多游戏早期[升级|UPGRADE]的需求。工具由[BLACKSMITH]使用[IRON]锻造。

Original:
Toolsmiths [Produce|PRODUCE] a large number of [TOOLS] from [IRON].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL].
Translation: 工具匠会用[IRON][产出|PRODUCE]大量[TOOLS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL]。

Original:
Traders can [Produce|PRODUCE] a huge amount of [TREASURE] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] [TRADING-POST-1:S] out of [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS] on junctions where [Small Rivers|RIVER] meet one another or a body of water.

 Additional Traders can also be assigned to [TRADING-POST-2:S] as [Apprentices|APPRENTICE], each one greatly increasing the amount of Treasure Produced.

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TIMBER].
Translation: 商人可以在[小河|RIVER]彼此交汇或汇入水体的地点，用[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS][建造|CONSTRUCT][TRADING-POST-1:S]，从而[产出|PRODUCE]大量[TREASURE]。额外的商人也可以作为[学徒|APPRENTICE]分配到[TRADING-POST-2:S]，每名学徒都会大幅提高财富产出。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TIMBER]。

Original:
Trappers can [Harvest|HARVEST] [PARCHMENT] or [CLOTH] (as leather) from [Animal Herds|ANIMAL] by [Foraging|FORAGE]. However, doing so depletes the herd much faster than [Producing|PRODUCE] them with the help of a [Pasture|PASTURE] and a refining [Profession|PROFESSION] like the [PARCHMENT-MAKER].

 Trappers can also [Identify|UNIDENTIFIED] [DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-ANIMAL:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a Trapper can be a good way to make use of nearby Animal Herds and get your economy off the ground at the start of the game.
Translation: 捕兽人可以通过[采集|FORAGE][动物群|ANIMAL]来[采集|HARVEST][PARCHMENT]或[CLOTH]（作为皮革）。不过，这样做会比借助[牧场|PASTURE]和[PARCHMENT-MAKER]等加工[职业|PROFESSION][产出|PRODUCE]资源更快耗尽兽群。捕兽人还可以[识别|UNIDENTIFIED][DEPOSIT-UNKNOWN-ANIMAL:S]。游戏初期把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成捕兽人，是利用附近动物群、启动经济的好办法。

Original:
Trawlers double the amount of [FISH] [Produced|PRODUCE] by your [FISHERMAN:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [CLOTH].
Translation: 拖网渔民会使你的[FISHERMAN:S][产出|PRODUCE][FISH]的数量翻倍。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[CLOTH]。

Original:
Treasure allows you to purchase other [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Caravans|CARAVAN].

 The three primary ways to acquire Treasure are selling Resources you don't need to Caravans, [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] [TRADING-POST-1:S], and Constructing [Mines|MINE] on rare [Mineral Deposits|MINERAL] like Gold or Gems. You also receive a small amount of Treasure for [Pillaging|PILLAGE] enemy [Structures|STRUCTURE].
Translation: 财富可以让你从[商队|CARAVAN]购买其他[资源|RESOURCE]。获得财富的三种主要方式是：把不需要的资源卖给商队，[建造|CONSTRUCT][TRADING-POST-1:S]，以及在黄金或宝石等稀有[矿藏|MINERAL]上建造[矿井|MINE]。你也会因[劫掠|PILLAGE]敌方[建筑|STRUCTURE]而获得少量财富。

Original:
Troy Goodfellow

 Scott Lewis

 Tomislav Uzelac

 Mike Duncan and 'The History of Rome' Podcast



 Our incredibly supportive friends and family.



 And of course... you! Without your support this game would not exist at all.

 Thank you.
Translation: Troy Goodfellow Scott Lewis Tomislav Uzelac Mike Duncan 与《The History of Rome》播客 我们无比支持我们的朋友和家人。 当然还有……你！没有你的支持，这款游戏根本不会存在。 谢谢。

Original:
Trudging through deep snow is not easy, and [Armies|ARMY] which try will quickly bog down.

 On the bright side, the [Rivers|RIVER] and [MARSH:S] that normally act as significant barriers become easy to cross once frozen, so don't be afraid to take advantage of new opportunities.

 That said, winters can be harsh - don't be caught unprepared!
Translation: 在深雪中跋涉并不容易，尝试这样做的[军队|ARMY]很快会陷入困境。好的一面是，一旦结冰，通常构成重大障碍的[河流|RIVER]和[MARSH:S]会变得容易穿越，所以不要害怕利用新机会。话虽如此，冬季可能很残酷，别毫无准备地被它抓住！

Original:
Tundra is a flat, inhospitable type of [Terrain|TERRAIN].

 [*]Costs only 1 [Move Point|MOVE-POINT] to enter.
 [*]Provides 1 [Supply|SUPPLY] to [Units|UNIT].

 These values are modified when a Tundra [Tile|TILE] also contains rough Terrain like a [Forest|FOREST] or [HILL], or is affected by [Cold|COLD] or [Weather|WEATHER].

 Tundra parts of the map often contain a great deal of [Harvestable|HARVEST] [Minerals|MINERAL] and sometimes even [Animals|ANIMAL].
Translation: 冻原是一种平坦、荒凉的[地形|TERRAIN]。[*]进入只需 1 点[移动点数|MOVE-POINT]。[*]为[单位|UNIT]提供 1 点[补给|SUPPLY]。如果冻原[地块|TILE]还含有[森林|FOREST]或[HILL]等崎岖地形，或受到[寒冷|COLD]或[天气|WEATHER]影响，这些数值会改变。地图上的冻原区域通常含有大量可[采集|HARVEST]的[矿物|MINERAL]，有时甚至还有[动物|ANIMAL]。

Original: \n Two special [Factions|FACTION] you'll run into are the Western and the Eastern halves of the [Roman Empire|ROME]. Recent times have not been kind to the Empire, and although still strong at the start of the game they'll grow steadily weaker as the years pass. Your ultimate goal is to either (1) conquer one of their capitals, or (2) take over the Empire indirectly by sending enough [Clans|CLAN] to join it that they seize control of it.\n
Translation: 你会遇到两个特殊[派系|FACTION]：西罗马帝国和东罗马帝国，也就是[罗马帝国|ROME]的两半。近来帝国并不顺遂，虽然游戏开始时仍很强大，但会随着岁月推移逐渐衰弱。你的最终目标是：(1) 征服其中一个首都；或 (2) 派出足够多的[氏族|CLAN]加入帝国，从内部接管它。

Original:
Vellum Makers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [PARCHMENT] from [Animals|ANIMAL] in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 精制皮纸匠会从你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的[动物|ANIMAL][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[PARCHMENT]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original: \n Very well, if you're willing to pay the price later.\n
Translation: 很好，如果你愿意日后付出代价的话。

Original: \n Vindictive Leaders never forgive, and never forget. So much as annoying them and you've made an enemy for life.
Translation: 记仇的领袖从不宽恕，也从不忘记。哪怕只是惹恼他们，你也会成为他们一生的敌人。

Original:
Warhorses are needed to [Train|TRAIN] fast and powerful [Cavalry|CAVALRY].

 1 [WARHORSES:SINGULAR] is automatically turned into 5 [FOOD] if the Tribe is starving.
Translation: 战马用于[训练|TRAIN]快速而强大的[骑兵|CAVALRY]。如果部族正在挨饿，1 匹[WARHORSES:SINGULAR]会自动转化为 5 [FOOD]。

Original: \n Watchmen can greatly extend your [Borders|BORDERS] and allow you to [Harvest|HARVEST] distant [Resource Deposits|DEPOSIT] by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] [WATCHTOWER:S] from [TIMBER]. This can be done even outside your existing Borders.\n
Translation: 守望者可以大幅扩展你的[边境|BORDERS]，并允许你用[TIMBER][建造|CONSTRUCT][WATCHTOWER:S]，从而[采集|HARVEST]远处的[资源矿藏|DEPOSIT]。即使在你现有边境之外也可以这样做。

Original: \n We have some business to take care of together, do we not? I'm looking forward to our partnership!\n
Translation: 我们有些事情要一起处理，不是吗？我期待我们的合作！

Original:
Weapons are needed to [Train|TRAIN] nearly all [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Professions|PROFESSION], and can be used to [Upgrade|UPGRADE] their [Power|POWER] even further.

 Weapons are forged from [IRON] by a [WEAPONSMITH].
Translation: 武器用于[训练|TRAIN]几乎所有[战士|WARRIOR][职业|PROFESSION]，也可以用于[升级|UPGRADE]他们的[战力|POWER]。武器由[WEAPONSMITH]使用[IRON]锻造。

Original:
Weaponsmiths [Produce|PRODUCE] [WEAPONS] from [IRON].

 [Harvesting|HARVEST] [IRON] with a [DIGGER] and then having a Weaponsmith make Weapons from it can be a good way to get your economy off the ground in the early game.
Translation: 武器匠会用[IRON][产出|PRODUCE][WEAPONS]。先用[DIGGER][采集|HARVEST][IRON]，再让武器匠把铁制成武器，是游戏早期启动经济的好办法。

Original:
Welcome to At the Gates!

 AtG is a survival strategy game in which you play as a barbarian tribe trying to...

 [*] Stay alive in the early game by keeping your [Clans|CLAN] from [Starving|STARVE] while [Migrating|PACKED] in pursuit of [Resources|RESOURCE].

 [*] [Settle Down|DECLARE-KINGDOM] and build a proper kingdom in the midgame.

 [*] Train a strong army and eventually defeat the decadent [Romans|ROME] in the endgame.
Translation: 欢迎来到《At the Gates》！AtG 是一款生存战略游戏，你将扮演一个蛮族部族，试图……[*]在早期游戏中保持存活：让你的[氏族|CLAN]在追寻[资源|RESOURCE]的[迁徙|PACKED]过程中免于[挨饿|STARVE]。[*][定居|DECLARE-KINGDOM]并在中期建立真正的王国。[*]训练强大的军队，并最终在后期击败颓靡的[罗马人|ROME]。

Original: \n Were you able to eliminate the bandits?\n
\n What a shame, I expected better of you.\n
Translation: 真可惜，我原本对你期望更高。

Original: \n What? Are you really so useless?\n

Wheat is a type of [FOOD] that can be [Harvested|HARVEST] from special [sources|DEPOSIT] by [REAPER:S] and [WHEAT-FARM-1:S].

 Wheat can also be converted into [ALCOHOL] by an [ALE-MAKER].
Translation: 小麦是一种[FOOD]，可以由[REAPER:S]和[WHEAT-FARM-1:S]从特殊[来源|DEPOSIT]中[采集|HARVEST]。小麦也可以由[ALE-MAKER]转化为[ALCOHOL]。

Original: \n When you capture a [CITY] or [SETTLEMENT] it becomes 'Occupied', which basically means it's of no economic value to you. However, controlling such locations will at least prevent them from training new [Armies|ARMY] to fight you!\n
Translation: 当你占领[CITY]或[SETTLEMENT]时，它会变为“被占领”，基本意味着它对你没有经济价值。不过，控制这些地点至少能阻止它们训练新的[军队|ARMY]来与你作战！

Original:
When you have an Instructor you can remove [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT] or [Crimes|CRIME] from [Clans|CLAN] in the [SETTLEMENT] by spending 50 [PARCHMENT] (right-click on the Clan Card icon to perform this action).

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [PARCHMENT].
Translation: 拥有教官后，你可以花费 50 [PARCHMENT]移除[SETTLEMENT]中[氏族|CLAN]的[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]或[罪行|CRIME]（右键点击氏族卡片图标执行此操作）。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[PARCHMENT]。

Original: \n When you initially make contact with a [Leader|LEADER] a 'First Meeting' event occurs. The Leader chooses how they will greet you (with a gift, a demand, or simply saying hello) based on their [Personality|LEADER-TRAIT], and you have a choice of how to respond. This gives you an early opportunity to shape a relationship in your favor with a gift of your own - or perhaps earning some Reputation points with a well-timed insult!\n
Translation: 当你最初与一位[领袖|LEADER]接触时，会发生“首次会面”事件。领袖会根据其[性格|LEADER-TRAIT]选择如何问候你（送礼、提出要求，或只是打招呼），而你可以选择如何回应。这给了你一个早期机会，用自己的礼物把关系导向对你有利，或者也许用一次时机恰当的侮辱赚取一些声望！

Original:
Winemakers [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [ALCOHOL] from [GRAPES] or [HONEY].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [STEEL-TOOLS].
Translation: 葡萄酒大师会用[GRAPES]或[HONEY][产出|PRODUCE]巨量[ALCOHOL]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[STEEL-TOOLS]。

Original:
Winter is coming.

 [Foragers|FORAGE] and [Farms|FARM] stop producing [FOOD] once their [Tile|TILE] becomes [Cold|COLD]. Your [Clans|CLAN] will starve if you run out of Food during the frigid months to come.

 Winter also eliminates the free [Supply|SUPPLY] [Armies|ARMY] rely on when moving through [Terrain|TERRAIN] you don't [Control|CONTROL] (such as on [FERTILE] [Tiles|TILE]).
Translation: 冬天来了。一旦[采集者|FORAGE]和[农场|FARM]所在[地块|TILE]变为[寒冷|COLD]，它们就会停止产出[FOOD]。如果在即将到来的严寒月份耗尽食物，你的[氏族|CLAN]就会挨饿。冬季还会消除[军队|ARMY]穿越你不[控制|CONTROL]的[地形|TERRAIN]（例如[FERTILE][地块|TILE]）时依赖的免费[补给|SUPPLY]。

Original:
Wood Bundlers increase the [Production|PRODUCE] of your [WOOD-COLLECTOR:S].

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 捆木工会提高你的[WOOD-COLLECTOR:S][产出|PRODUCE]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Wood Collectors can [Harvest|HARVEST] [TIMBER] by [Moving|MOVE-POINT] to any [Tile|TILE] containing a [Forest|FOREST] (but not [BRUSH-LEAFY], which is similar) and [Foraging|FORAGE].

 [Training|TRAIN] a [Clan|CLAN] as a Wood Collector can be a good way to make use of nearby Forests and get your economy off the ground at the start of the game.
Translation: 伐木采集者可以通过[移动|MOVE-POINT]到含有[森林|FOREST]的[地块|TILE]（但不能是外观相似的[BRUSH-LEAFY]）并进行[采集|FORAGE]来[采集|HARVEST][TIMBER]。游戏初期把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成伐木采集者，是利用附近森林、启动经济的好办法。
劈木工会用[TIMBER][产出|PRODUCE][BOARDS]。[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Wool Collectors [Produce|PRODUCE] [WOOL], the amount being based on the number of [SHEEP] in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE]. Your Sheep are not harmed in the process!

 [Training|TRAIN] them requires [TOOLS].
Translation: 采毛工会[产出|PRODUCE][WOOL]，数量取决于你[库存|STOCKPILE]中的[SHEEP]数量。你的羊在这个过程中不会受伤！[训练|TRAIN]他们需要[TOOLS]。

Original:
Wool is [Produced|PRODUCE] by [WOOL-COLLECTOR:S], the amount being based on how many [SHEEP] you have in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE]. Your Sheep are not harmed in the process!

 [WEAVER:S] can turn [WOOL] into [CLOTH].
Translation: 羊毛由[WOOL-COLLECTOR:S][产出|PRODUCE]，数量取决于你[库存|STOCKPILE]中有多少[SHEEP]。你的羊在这个过程中不会受伤！[WEAVER:S]可以把[WOOL]转化为[CLOTH]。

Original: \n You are a strong, wise leader and should be regarded as such!\n
Translation: 你是一位强大而智慧的领袖，世人都该如此看待你！

Original: \n You are a vile person who will burn in the fires of hell one day. Get out of my sight.\n
Translation: 你是个卑劣之人，终有一天会在地狱烈火中燃烧。滚出我的视线。

Original: \n You are a villain and should be recognized as such!\n
Translation: 你是恶徒，世人都该认清这一点！

Original: \n You can [Produce Resources|PRODUCE] from map-based [Deposits|DEPOSIT] and [dense Forests|FOREST] with a [Clan|CLAN] [Trained|TRAIN] in a [Foraging|FORAGE] [Profession|PROFESSION]. Once your economy is more advanced you can [Produce|PRODUCE] even more by having a Clan in an appropriate [Profession|PROFESSION] (e.g. [FARMER], [MINER]) [Construct|CONSTURCT] a [Structure|STRUCTURE] there.\n
Translation: 你可以让一个被[训练|TRAIN]为[采集|FORAGE][职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]，从地图上的[矿藏|DEPOSIT]和[茂密森林|FOREST][产出资源|PRODUCE]。当经济更先进后，你可以让具备合适[职业|PROFESSION]的氏族（例如[FARMER]、[MINER]）在那里[建造|CONSTURCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]，从而[产出|PRODUCE]更多。

Original: \n You can [Research|STUDY] one thing at a time, and at a rate determined by how much [KNOWLEDGE] you're [Producing|PRODUCE] each Turn and the cost of the project you're undertaking.\n
Translation: 你一次只能[研究|STUDY]一项内容，研究速度取决于你每回合[产出|PRODUCE]多少[KNOWLEDGE]，以及正在进行项目的成本。

Original: \n You can also find at-a-glance info about a [Tile|TILE]'s [Terrain|TERRAIN], available [Supply|SUPPLY], [Move Cost|MOVE-POINT], etc. in the quick reference panel in the bottom-right corner of the screen.\n
Translation: 你也可以在屏幕右下角的快速参考面板中，一眼查看[地块|TILE]的[地形|TERRAIN]、可用[补给|SUPPLY]、[移动消耗|MOVE-POINT]等信息。

Original:
You can capture [Neutral|NEUTRAL] [Structures|STRUCTURES] without a fight or any negative consequences, so don't be afraid to fuel your early growth at their expense (unless you simply feel bad for them!).

 After you capture a [Structure|STRUCTURE] you are given the choice of keeping it or [Pillaging|PILLAGE] it.
Translation: 你可以不经战斗、也没有任何负面后果地占领[中立|NEUTRAL][建筑|STRUCTURES]，所以不要害怕牺牲它们来推动早期成长（除非你实在同情它们！）。占领一个[建筑|STRUCTURE]后，你可以选择保留它或[劫掠|PILLAGE]它。

Original:
You can learn more about anything on the map by mousing over its [Tile|TILE].

 If a [Tile|TILE] contains several items clicking again will cycle through them.
Translation: 你可以把鼠标移到地图上的[地块|TILE]上，了解其上任何内容的更多信息。如果一个[地块|TILE]包含多个项目，继续点击会在它们之间循环切换。

Original:
You can move the camera using [HOTKEY:W][HOTKEY:A][HOTKEY:S][HOTKEY:D], the arrow keys, or by putting your cursor near the edge of the screen (though this method is a bit tricky in windowed mode).

 Pressing [HOTKEY:G] will toggle the visibility of the grid, and pressing [HOTKEY:1] will cycle its opacity, making it lighter or darker.
Translation: 你可以使用 [HOTKEY:W][HOTKEY:A][HOTKEY:S][HOTKEY:D]、方向键，或把光标移到屏幕边缘来移动镜头（不过窗口模式下这种方法有点麻烦）。按 [HOTKEY:G] 可切换网格显示，按 [HOTKEY:1] 可循环调整其透明度，使其更浅或更深。

Original: \n You can reset your tooltip settings in the Options Screen (Ctrl-O), or even customize them individually by modifying the Settings.xml file in your AtG installation folder.\n
Translation: 你可以在选项界面（Ctrl-O）重置提示框设置，甚至可以通过修改 AtG 安装文件夹中的 Settings.xml 文件逐项自定义。

Original:
You can spend [ALCOHOL] to temporarily improve the [Mood|MOOD] of a [Clan|CLAN].

 The price of doing so doubles each time a Clan's Mood is improved, which may be done up to a maximum of 5 times.
Translation: 你可以花费[ALCOHOL]来暂时改善一个[氏族|CLAN]的[心情|MOOD]。每次改善同一氏族的心情，价格都会翻倍，所以只有关键时刻才值得这么做。

Original: \n You can view and manage your pursuit of [Victory|WINNING] in the Victory Progress Screen (F7).\n
Translation: 你可以在胜利进度界面（F7）查看并管理自己的[胜利|WINNING]进展。

Original: \n You can't stay away, can you? It seems you are not true to your word. \n
Translation: 你就是离不开，是吗？看来你并不守信。

Original: \n You dare response to my gesture this way?\n
Translation: 你竟敢这样回应我的善意？

Original: \n You dare speak to me in such a way?!\n
\n You fool. You have no idea how big of a mistake you've made.\n
Translation: 蠢货。你根本不知道自己犯了多大的错误。

Original: \n You fool. You will pay for this.\n
Translation: 蠢货。你会为此付出代价。

Original: \n You have [HORSES] next to your [SETTLEMENT] which Relindis can start [Foraging|FORAGE] [MEAT] from next turn.\n
Translation: 你的[SETTLEMENT]旁边有[HORSES]，Relindis 可以从下回合开始从中[采集|FORAGE][MEAT]。

Original: \n You have entered my sovereign territory without my permission. I will not forget this.\n
Translation: 你未经允许进入了我的主权领土。我不会忘记此事。

Original:
You have one [SETTLEMENT] which can [Train|TRAIN] one [Clan|CLAN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION] at a time, so try to plan ahead as much as possible.

 [Training|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] as [Foragers|FORAGE] is important early on, as you want to start [Harvesting Resources|HARVEST] from the map as soon as possible. Later in the game you'll be able to [Produce Resources|PRODUCE] much more efficiently by having [Clans|CLAN] [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE] instead.
Translation: 你有一个[SETTLEMENT]，一次可以把一个[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成一个[职业|PROFESSION]，所以尽量提前规划。早期把[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成[采集者|FORAGE]很重要，因为你希望尽快从地图上开始[采集资源|HARVEST]。游戏后期，你可以让[氏族|CLAN][建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]，更高效地[产出资源|PRODUCE]。

Original: \n You need to keep your distance.\n

You start off producing only 1 [KNOWLEDGE] per [Turn|TURN], but by [Training|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in certain [Professions|PROFESSION] (like the [LOREKEEPER]) you can dramatically increase this and [Learn|LEARN] things more quickly.

 Note that to [Learn|LEARN] a [Profession|PROFESSION] you must [Study|STUDY] it for a minimum of 4 [Turns|TURN], regardless of how much [KNOWLEDGE] you're [Producing|PRODUCE].
Translation: 开局时你每[回合|TURN]只产出 1 [KNOWLEDGE]，但通过将[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成某些[职业|PROFESSION]（例如[LOREKEEPER]），你可以显著提高这一数值并更快[学习|LEARN]内容。注意，要[学习|LEARN]一个[职业|PROFESSION]，无论你[产出|PRODUCE]多少[KNOWLEDGE]，都必须至少[研究|STUDY] 4 [回合|TURN]。

Original:
You start the game only able to [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in a few [Professions|PROFESSION] - to increase your options you need to unlock more through [Research|STUDY].

 Most of the ['Techs'|TECH] you'll be [Researching|STUDY] will be [Professions|PROFESSION], but you can also unlock [Profession-based Upgrades|UPGRADE], and even a handful of global, permanent bonuses, which are usually quite expensive.
Translation: 游戏开始时，你只能将[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成少数几种[职业|PROFESSION]；要增加选择，需要通过[研究|STUDY]解锁更多。你将[研究|STUDY]的大多数[“科技”|TECH]其实是[职业|PROFESSION]，但你也可以解锁[基于职业的升级|UPGRADE]，甚至少数全局永久加成，这些通常相当昂贵。
你会后悔说出这句话的。

Original: \n You will wish you hadn't said that.\n
Translation: 你会希望自己从没说过那句话。

Original:
You'll also want to start exploring your immediate vicinity in order to find any [Deserted Locations|DESERTED-LOCATION] and [Resource Deposits|DEPOSIT] that might be nearby (as well as threats, such as [BANDIT-CAMP:S]).

 Your Tribe has been collecting [Rumors|RUMOR] so you start with a few 'hints' as to what's out there in the world.
Translation: 你还需要开始探索周边区域，以寻找附近可能存在的[废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]和[资源矿藏|DEPOSIT]（以及威胁，例如[BANDIT-CAMP:S]）。你的部族一直在收集[传闻|RUMOR]，因此开局时你会有一些关于世界上有什么的“线索”。

Original:
You'll mostly be interacting with your [Clans|CLAN], which start inside your [SETTLEMENT] and can be [Trained|TRAIN] in various [Professions|PROFESSION], some of which allow them to [Move|MOVE-POINT] around the map as [Units|UNIT].

 The more [Clans|CLAN] you have the more you'll be able to do, but also the more [FOOD] your tribe will consume. New [Clans|CLAN] arrive every few turns at a rate determined by how much [FAME] you're generating.
Translation: 你主要会与自己的[氏族|CLAN]互动。它们一开始位于你的[SETTLEMENT]内，可以被[训练|TRAIN]为各种[职业|PROFESSION]，其中一些职业允许它们作为[单位|UNIT]在地图上[移动|MOVE-POINT]。你拥有的[氏族|CLAN]越多，能做的事情就越多，但部族消耗的[FOOD]也越多。新[氏族|CLAN]每隔几回合抵达一次，速度取决于你正在产生多少[FAME]。

Original: \n You'll spend most of your time in the World Screen looking at and interacting with the Map (with most of the rest being spent managing [Clans|CLAN]). Clicking on a Tile with a non-[Terrain|TERRAIN] object will bring up the Selection Panel, where you can learn more about the object in question and possibly interact with it (e.g. telling a [Unit|UNIT] to start [Harvesting|HARVEST]).\n
Translation: 你大部分时间会在世界界面查看并操作地图（其余大多用于管理[氏族|CLAN]）。点击带有非[地形|TERRAIN]对象的地块会打开选择面板，你可以了解该对象的更多信息，并可能与其互动（例如命令[单位|UNIT]开始[采集|HARVEST]）。

Original: \n Your ??? has entered a [Tile|TILE] [Controlled|CONTROL] by another Leader. This is not a friendly gesture, and he will not forget it.\n
Translation: 你的 ??? 进入了另一个领袖[控制|CONTROL]的[地块|TILE]。这不是友好举动，他不会忘记。

Original:
Your ??? is on a [Tile|TILE] that doesn't meet its [Supply|SUPPLY] needs.

 It can remain here for one [Turn|TURN] without consequences, but any more and it will suffer [Damage|DAMAGE] and lose [Morale|MORALE].
Translation: 你的 ??? 位于一个无法满足其[补给|SUPPLY]需求的[地块|TILE]上。它可以在这里停留一个[回合|TURN]而不受惩罚，但再久就会受到[伤害|DAMAGE]并失去[士气|MORALE]。

Original:
Your [Clans|CLAN] are the main building block of your tribe. You start with 3 and will end a (successful!) game with more than 40.

 Each [Clan|CLAN] can be [Trained|TRAIN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION], which allows it to [Produce Resources|PRODUCE], do something on the map as a [Unit|UNIT], like fight and explore, or provide some other effect.
Translation: 你的[氏族|CLAN]是部族的主要构成单位。开局你有 3 个，成功通关时通常会超过 40 个。每个[氏族|CLAN]都可以被[训练|TRAIN]成一个[职业|PROFESSION]，使其能够[产出资源|PRODUCE]、作为[单位|UNIT]在地图上行动（例如战斗和探索），或提供其他效果。

Original: \n Your [Relationship Level (RL)|RL] with another [Leader|LEADER] measures how much they like you, and ranges from -10 to +10. [Influence|INFLUENCE] is usually earned alongside [RL|RL], but is instead "spent" like money to get a Leader to do something for you. [Reputation|REPUTATION] is global, hard to earn, and can be spent as Influence with ANY Leader. [Leverage|LEVERAGE] is the total of all 3 of these stats and is what is checked when determining if a Leader will ultimately agree to one of your proposals.\n
Translation: 你与另一位[领袖|LEADER]的[关系等级（RL）|RL]衡量他们有多喜欢你，范围从 -10 到 +10。[影响力|INFLUENCE]通常会与[RL|RL]一起获得，但它像金钱一样被“花费”，用来让领袖替你做事。[声望|REPUTATION]是全局资源，难以获得，可以像影响力一样用于任何领袖。[筹码|LEVERAGE]是这三项属性的总和，用于判断领袖最终是否会同意你的提议。

Original: \n Your [SETTLEMENT] also has a [Control Level|CONTROL], which determines how far your [Borders|BORDERS] reach, and in turn allows your [Units|UNIT] to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] [Structures|STRUCTURE] and receive free [Supply|SUPPLY] during the [Winter|COLD].\n
Translation: 你的[SETTLEMENT]还有[控制等级|CONTROL]，它决定你的[边境|BORDERS]能延伸多远，并允许你的[单位|UNIT][建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]，以及在[冬季|COLD]获得免费[补给|SUPPLY]。

Original: \n Your crimes and bad behavior must be called out, and I am doing so now!\n
Translation: 你的罪行和恶劣行径必须被揭露，而我现在就要揭露它们！

Original:
Your first order of business is deciding which of your 3 [Clans|CLAN] to [Train|TRAIN] in what [Profession|PROFESSION]. We suggest starting with an [EXPLORER].

 Next, you need to choose a [Tech|TECH] to begin [Studying|STUDY]. We suggest starting with [AGRICULTURE].

 These are decisions you'll be making often.
Translation: 你的第一项事务，是决定将 3 个[氏族|CLAN]中的哪一个[训练|TRAIN]为什么[职业|PROFESSION]。我们建议从[EXPLORER]开始。接下来，你需要选择一项[科技|TECH]开始[研究|STUDY]。我们建议从[AGRICULTURE]开始。这些都是你之后会经常做出的决定。

Original: \n Your great deeds should be known across the world!\n
Translation: 你的伟业应当传遍世界！

Original:
Your high-level goals in the first few turns of the game are:

 [*] Revealing the map around you with an [EXPLORER] in order to find [Abandoned Ruins|DESERTED-LOCATION] (which often contain useful items) and [Resource Deposits|DEPOSIT] you can [Harvest|HARVEST].

 [*] [Training|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] as [Foragers|FORAGE] in order to [Harvest Deposits|HARVEST] you already know about.
Translation: 游戏最初几个回合的高层目标是：[*]用[EXPLORER]揭开周围地图，寻找[废弃遗迹|DESERTED-LOCATION]（其中常有有用物品）以及你可以[采集|HARVEST]的[资源矿藏|DEPOSIT]。[*]将[氏族|CLAN][训练|TRAIN]成[采集者|FORAGE]，以便[采集矿藏|HARVEST]你已经知道的资源。

Original:
Your supply of [FOOD] is dwindling!

 Each of your [Clans'|CLAN] [Families|FAMILY] [Consumes|CONSUME] 1 [FOOD] per [Turn|TURN].
Translation: 你的[FOOD]供应正在减少！你的每个[氏族|CLAN]的每个[家庭|FAMILY]每[回合|TURN][消耗|CONSUME] 1 [FOOD]。

Original: \n Your top priority during your first year is finding a reliable source of [FOOD] you can [Forage|FORAGE] for before winter arrives. Acquiring other [Resources|RESOURCE] such as [TIMBER] can also be quite useful, as this will allow you to start building [Structures|STRUCTURE].\n
Translation: 第一年你的首要任务是在冬季到来前，找到一个可靠的[FOOD]来源并进行[采集|FORAGE]。获取[TIMBER]等其他[资源|RESOURCE]也很有用，因为这会让你开始建造[建筑|STRUCTURE]。

Original:
Your Tribe only has a certain number of [Stored Turns|STORED-TURN] of [FOOD], and once you run out your people will [Starve|STARVE].

 Making sure this doesn't happen is very important!
Translation: 你的部族只有一定数量的[储备回合|STORED-TURN][FOOD]，一旦耗尽，你的人民就会[挨饿|STARVE]。确保这种事不发生非常重要！

Original:
Your ultimate [goal|WINNING] is to [Build a Kingdom|DECLARE-KINGDOM] powerful enough to topple the [Roman Empire|ROME], either militarily or by more indirect means.

 You'll start each game by [Foraging|FORAGE] for [FOOD] before eventually [settling down|DECLARE-KINGDOM] in one place and building more advanced and permanent [Structures|STRUCTURE] from [STONE-BLOCKS].
Translation: 你的最终[目标|WINNING]是[建立王国|DECLARE-KINGDOM]，强大到足以推翻[罗马帝国|ROME]，无论是通过军事手段，还是更间接的方式。每局开始时，你会先[采集|FORAGE][FOOD]，最终在一个地点[定居|DECLARE-KINGDOM]下来，并用[STONE-BLOCKS]建造更高级、更永久的[建筑|STRUCTURE]。

Original:
Your ultimate goal is to grow strong enough to take on one of the [Roman Empires|ROME] directly and capture their Capital [CITY].

 In time you'll grow much stronger and the [Romans|ROME] much weaker, but for now it's definitely best to stay on their good side.
Translation: 你的最终目标是变得足够强大，能够正面对抗其中一个[罗马帝国|ROME]并夺取其首都[CITY]。随着时间推移，你会强大许多，而[罗马人|ROME]会弱很多；但现在最好还是与他们保持良好关系。

Original: \n You're getting a little too close to my territory.\n
Translation: 你离我的领土有点太近了。

Original: \n You've caught my eye, and not in a good way. I advise you to change your ways.\n
Translation: 你引起了我的注意，而且不是好事。我建议你改改做法。

Original:
You've found ???, another major Barbarian Tribe!

 They are one of the several opponents you're competing with over land, resources and glory.

 You can (and will) battle against other kingdoms, but diplomatic cooperation can also be fruitful - especially when times are tough.
Translation: 你发现了 ???，另一个主要蛮族部族！他们是与你争夺土地、资源和荣耀的几个对手之一。你可以（也将会）与其他王国作战，但外交合作也可能很有成效，尤其是在艰难时期。

Original: \n You've found [the Romans|ROME]! Well, some of them, anyways. There are actually two distinct and independently-run [Roman Empires|ROME]. Both are quite strong in the early going, and picking a fight with them is very dangerous.\n
Translation: 你发现了[罗马人|ROME]！好吧，至少是一部分。实际上有两个彼此独立运作的[罗马帝国|ROME]。两者在早期都相当强大，和他们挑起战斗非常危险。

Original:
You've found a [Deserted Location|DESERTED-LOCATION]!

 Deserted Locations are scattered around the map, and visiting one with an [EXPLORER] can provide [Resources|RESOURCE], useful information, and sometimes even free [Clans|CLAN].
Translation: 你发现了一个[废弃地点|DESERTED-LOCATION]！废弃地点散布在地图各处，用[EXPLORER]访问它们可以获得[资源|RESOURCE]、有用信息，有时甚至能获得免费[氏族|CLAN]。

Original:
You've found a [Structure|STRUCTURE] owned by a [Neutral Tribe|NEUTRAL]!

 Neutral [Structures|STRUCTURES] like this are scattered around the map, and can be recognized by their white flag.
Translation: 你发现了一个属于[中立部族|NEUTRAL]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]！这样的中立[建筑|STRUCTURES]散布在地图各处，可以通过白旗识别。

Original:
You've found a group of Bandits!

 You can always recognize Bandits by their black flag.
Translation: 你发现了一群强盗！你总能通过黑旗认出强盗。

Original:
You've now seen all of the game's help tips, so from here your primary tool to continue learning about the game is the tooltip system. If you're ever confused or have further questions feel free to ask our community over on the official At the Gates forums.

 We hope you enjoy the game, and good luck in your quest to topple Rome!
Translation: 你现在已经看完了游戏的所有帮助提示，从这里开始，你继续学习游戏的主要工具就是提示框系统。如果你感到困惑或还有问题，可以到官方 At the Gates 论坛询问我们的社区。希望你喜欢这款游戏，祝你推翻罗马的征途好运！

+1 Mood bonus for all Clans. Permanently at war with all Factions which don't follow the 'Nicene Christianity' Religion.
Translation: 所有氏族获得 +1 心情加成。与所有不信奉“尼西亚基督教”的派系永久交战。

Original: +1 Move Point for all Units. Can Train Horse Archers. All Units require 1 additional Supply.
Translation: 所有单位 +1 移动点。可以训练骑射手。所有单位额外需要 1 点补给。

Original: Advanced [Factions|FACTION] are powerful, as much so as the Human Player can possibly get by the late-game.
Translation: 先进[派系|FACTION]非常强大，大致相当于人类玩家在游戏后期可能达到的实力。

Original: After spending [###:NUM] [???:RESOURCE|###:NUM] future [Caravans|CARAVAN] will reliably (but not always!) have:
Translation: 花费 [###:NUM] [???:RESOURCE|###:NUM] 后，未来的[商队|CARAVAN]将稳定（但并非总是！）拥有：

Original: All Clans will have at least one positive Trait and no fully negative Traits. -50% Fame.
Translation: 所有氏族至少拥有一个正面特质，且没有完全负面特质。名声 -50%。

Original: Can Train Horse Archers, and starts the game with one. Cannot own Structures.
Translation: 可以训练骑射手，且开局拥有一队骑射手。不能拥有建筑。

Original: Cheese is a type of [FOOD] that can be [Produced|PRODUCE] by [CHEESEMAKER:S], the amount based on how many [CATTLE] and [SHEEP] you have in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].
Translation: 奶酪是一种[FOOD]，可以由[CHEESEMAKER:S][产出|PRODUCE]，数量取决于你[库存|STOCKPILE]中拥有多少[CATTLE]和[SHEEP]。
要求 - 贡品 - 食物
要求 - 贡品 - 财宝

Original: Developed [Factions|FACTION] are in what would roughly be a mid-game situation for the Human Player.
Translation: 已发展[派系|FACTION]大致处于人类玩家的游戏中期状态。
每个[氏族家庭|FAMILY]每回合消耗 0.1 [FOOD]。
每个[氏族家庭|FAMILY]每回合消耗 0.2 [FOOD]。
每个[氏族家庭|FAMILY]每回合消耗 0.3 [FOOD]。
每个[氏族家庭|FAMILY]每回合消耗 0.4 [FOOD]。

Original: Each Apprentice assigned to this Structure provides:
Translation: 分配到此建筑的每名学徒提供：
扩大此[建筑|STRUCTURE]的[控制|CONTROL]范围。
首次会面 - 要求 - 接受
首次会面 - 要求 - 强硬拒绝
首次会面 - 要求 - 弱拒绝

Original: First Meeting - Gift - Accept but don't Reciprocate
Translation: 首次会面 - 礼物 - 接受但不回礼
首次会面 - 礼物 - 回礼 - 食物
首次会面 - 礼物 - 回礼 - 财富
首次会面 - 礼物 - 拒绝
首次会面 - 问候 - 礼物 - 食物
首次会面 - 问候 - 礼物 - 财富
首次会面 - 问候 - 回礼

Original: Fish are a type of [FOOD] that can be [Harvested|HARVEST] from special [sources|DEPOSIT] by [FISHERMAN:S].
Translation: 鱼是一种[FOOD]，可以由[FISHERMAN:S]从特殊[来源|DEPOSIT]中[采集|HARVEST]。

Original: Fruit is a type of [FOOD] that can be [Harvested|HARVEST] from special [sources|DEPOSIT] by [REAPER:S] and [WHEAT-FARM-1:S].
Translation: 水果是一种[FOOD]，可以由[REAPER:S]和[WHEAT-FARM-1:S]从特殊[来源|DEPOSIT]中[采集|HARVEST]。

Translation: 我也有礼物送给你。（食物）

Translation: 原始[派系|FACTION]开局比人类玩家略强，大致相当于玩家进行到第 50 回合时的状态。

Original: Roman Roads are engineering marvels of antiquity, and allow [Units|UNIT] to [Move|MOVE-POINT] over them very quickly.
Translation: 罗马道路是古代工程奇迹，允许[单位|UNIT]在其上快速[移动|MOVE-POINT]。

Original: Starts the game next to the ocean with a free Galley. Bonuses provided by Deserted Locations doubled.
Translation: 开局位于海边，并拥有一艘免费桨帆船。废弃地点提供的加成翻倍。

Translation: 开局拥有 30 食物和 8 个氏族（默认 3 个）。

Translation: 开局拥有 40 食物，且所有资源矿藏都已识别。无法将任何氏族训练为采集职业。

Translation: 单位不再需要补给，除非位于另一个派系的边境内。

Original: Very Advanced [Factions|FACTION] are juggernauts the Human Player can never hope to compete with.
Translation: 非常先进的[派系|FACTION]是人类玩家永远难以抗衡的巨头。

Original: Very Primitive [Factions|FACTION] start basically at the level of the Human Player: a single [SETTLEMENT] and a handful of [Clans|CLAN].

When Angry a [Clan|CLAN] becomes much less effective, both economically and militarily.
Translation: 处于愤怒状态时，[氏族|CLAN]在经济和军事方面都会大幅变弱。

Original: When Happy a [Clan|CLAN] becomes slightly more effective, both economically and militarily.
Translation: 处于高兴状态时，[氏族|CLAN]在经济和军事方面都会略微增强。

Original: When Jubilant a [Clan|CLAN] becomes much more effective, both economically and militarily.
Translation: 处于欢欣状态时，[氏族|CLAN]在经济和军事方面都会大幅增强。

Original: When Resentful a [Clan|CLAN] stops working entirely, and also reduces the [Morale|MORALE] of other Clans on the tile. This state is permanent.
Translation: 处于怨恨状态时，[氏族|CLAN]会完全停止工作，并降低同一地块上其他氏族的[士气|MORALE]。此状态是永久的。

Original: When Upset a [Clan|CLAN] becomes slightly less effective, both economically and militarily.
Translation: 处于不悦状态时，[氏族|CLAN]在经济和军事方面都会略微变弱。

Original: You can spend [TREASURE] to bribe the [Caravan|CARAVAN] owner to bring a larger and more diverse quantity of goods, starting with the next time they visit. The cost of doing so doubles each time.
